name: Full Mag News
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3bd997caa37472d931cfef061b0f833&_e=05vsozcAXqT0RhWXMn4F64VWkTLi5P4zPQhXxpL5sPtpodqQMKdK8tnKF_Jdy0eVFkGn5hSfwtTMcP_r6ma04AHFid49pLvPTdM1Ea3VpfdeRlg6qDgvIW1DWx58gauyiJjWlRT1AP9t_O8TFjFVKDXyVPb9fVgbzPOfKkEeq8VZz2HzRur14S0XPMqN73bvm4tZ0O-UmtYo4gLEjlaIkWGr0QjyyXX-HywhLxfe7gAUby9dpTmcK9asy9UDvObiMXLrhckT-kd9rCL7EriSIsrFP55Es4Q2T2nIjvby4crCElfx4jwurfnIMY6o__mQ_FusVKrQy3apBSOKrgZk-UbEFKx6qeTRa8XbGLui9h92Tp8sXqkMovqLH6aNTL-c5Nz6nyyAIPZVPUc4gtKgng%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3bd997caa37472d931cfef061b0f833&_e=05vsozcAXqT0RhWXMn4F64VWkTLi5P4zPQhXxpL5sPtpodqQMKdK8tnKF_Jdy0eVFkGn5hSfwtTMcP_r6ma04AHFid49pLvPTdM1Ea3VpfdeRlg6qDgvIW1DWx58gauyiJjWlRT1AP9t_O8TFjFVKDXyVPb9fVgbzPOfKkEeq8VZz2HzRur14S0XPMqN73bvm4tZ0O-UmtYo4gLEjlaIkWGr0QjyyXX-HywhLxfe7gAUby9dpTmcK9asy9UDvObilaAOkBSK8Sc7So-RmtBZQoscYkkAbf_Zb-UfZr22Evblpy1ygquMZAooI4RX_kORIETl4LLrqV6Ppi3yZFum9yLRBk6a0hymzpEWXveZLZ8aVSlBjbWehFmo4sBiyqj8-HjoLBssIHulqNUs2dIfMw%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3bd997caa37472d931cfef061b0f833&_e=05vsozcAXqT0RhWXMn4F64VWkTLi5P4zPQhXxpL5sPtpodqQMKdK8tnKF_Jdy0eVFkGn5hSfwtTMcP_r6ma04AHFid49pLvPTdM1Ea3VpfdeRlg6qDgvIW1DWx58gauyiJjWlRT1AP9t_O8TFjFVKDXyVPb9fVgbzPOfKkEeq8VZz2HzRur14S0XPMqN73bvm4tZ0O-UmtYo4gLEjlaIkWGr0QjyyXX-HywhLxfe7gAUby9dpTmcK9asy9UDvObiB_H4RROAQbqWU0L4oiD7stJxlvjbHlhrbMAjv0SDe8QWyx1IMeeodEUVGuE4lRfly5h36HqgZ387lHO4NTeXwyuVdmYqB1sh8wDX2WWsEg_JPUWxDuxc8n_84FS8VAaNDcz2L6KdNvtORfh7Vyxmxw%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Full Mag News subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Nat Flanagan, URD VP
subject: Peter, let me introduce myself…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
I'm excited to serve as URD's Vice President | | | It's nice to meet you, Peter. My name is Nat, and I am URD's Vice President. Here's a little bit about me: I'm a lover of vinyl records, can always be seen with a cup of coffee in my hands, and will talk about Ohio politics to anyone who will listen. **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gco_dNvHp8mOPHN_ybwdRCyDMgCukIb2S-1J5_VQiCfDECLkMJ7PX8VOHgOU1q2Px5mnX2GIrYFi9Rz73yn1dSkP6gQxg-3U5eAoMyLjtzxVyPkxfAG-uaDzZyh3YBfqJTEDhvrOmwZOKi_iMolTx6yZbMd8rOj_lCpCDFG1aGfMwlz4YxvnQxrp5XMbV2YfLISysR6mrDpedl1d41kog1tGlttq6U2UCP4oDGeJsdJgAx523UJ6rEHjgHzspQ6SqZYWnk_5prk0k0_FS-AZFJr8Hps3H1eLM81vt2xrdfI2--7kqrI26Wq8B5ol62yNygOixuz75Vhi2tIWCU1SrK6ZefiNpT7KIc-pp-FXU1BQs/3t0/VVPeoGp5SEmAB_LqnTW5tQ/h0/fIRKRWhvChC2-YZdspFmyeOvRPudM1dL7YPk8bET0Rc)** Rural America is my home. I'm a lifelong Ohioan and a resident of Appalachian Southeast Ohio. I know how rural Americans feel when they are neglected by politicians at the state and federal levels because I’ve lived it. I’ve seen firsthand what it looks like when your community is left behind by both Democrats and Republicans. My hometown in Ohio voted for President Obama in overwhelming majority twice before flipping and voting for Trump twice. Our communities are being forgotten as America moves forward. **[Can you help me fight for my communities by chipping in any amount you can?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gco_dNvHp8mOPHN_ybwdRCyDMgCukIb2S-1J5_VQiCfDFV4h4tb03LmBlDlGi1LxOtIOTTEWfy1fLMAqzUgsmYPDDF0PnK1_OvOuHTinmnY9-RWR_V1zUyiYqJTMnbUeu_Z6_PdMHfJyeCiyea0LJRsA7K1DTN-iZbO62O-xEuJYR_hX2YZTkvD3k5nNQbjHvumFI3LrjSL1Vy8ecLDeigWEhJszpmzveNd-P_lcAZ7X5v49g6Wb1n5AUUjwYjz6IzKlF2xIapcL0BNK4aMcl8RxsrBEgyfUZJ-aK3-yp4BHfwTSjFQHEx-gMtv6F4wR-__w5iNAHVmt5ZfR809C06jWXdTT9nLBZM0b4SyNswc3k/3t0/VVPeoGp5SEmAB_LqnTW5tQ/h1/4AEQh3PiHByMzC3hvAe0MTyKsdTw-eQ-dHMEqLsQi8w)** I got into field organizing because there's nothing more important to me than knocking on the doors of my neighbors, talking directly about the issues that matter most to them as Americans living in rural areas. There’s no better way to grab the walleye by its gills than direct voter contact! When more rural residents can get out and make their voices heard at the ballot, that's a win for rural communities and all Americans. But more than anything, I'm in this fight because it's personal to me. Republicans across state legislatures in the Midwest continue their attacks on young trans women, like me, just for being who we are. **I'm proud to be trans, but I unapologetically reject being used as a pawn by Republicans to implement policies that will hurt queer, specifically transgender, folks.** That's why I'll keep fighting back against Republican legislators who continue to hurt both my rural and transgender communities. Being in leadership at United Rural Democrats allows me to fight back by supporting candidates who champion our values and understand the needs of both of these communities. To succeed this year, our team needs all the resources we can get to continue speaking directly with voters and Democrats who care. **[Peter, will you help me fight for the issues that matter most to us by sending a contribution to United Rural Democrats?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gco_dNvHp8mOPHN_ybwdRCyDMgCukIb2S-1J5_VQiCfDGA4Y8kPUxg_dsytm4y8zOEjWtqhxT0_F7emoCozo87gQxh-piJcEjc517yJp77A3eQf-qWFONPw5oOyUBfoKfBgC3q52hUPPm7BfYYMAkzCDSLGki1KIwEBC0UkpZAIEvu3tszT3MuY2SuV9HxbDjv8EDCkqx3TILjLlELm82Tp07mibhxEeUsS7QEJrj8lLFF55FLZmABHO8o1IMMzEDefZLs9vsB-WTeXEruT5cLgIsA1nZtTX6cOucxHvQdhzZHWXEjXZ-kmuBtugPd0LpHmqZ9mYXIDJoc9x29JEnQUsdtMd0vXI3UDvNTRwhF4JU/3t0/VVPeoGp5SEmAB_LqnTW5tQ/h2/wnkWZpKbjqQTTUAjK5CyLpW7CiDVxKXindFHiozsUHs)** clean_body: I'm excited to serve as URD's Vice President | | | It's nice to meet you, Peter. My name is Nat, and I am URD's Vice President. Here's a little bit about me: I'm a lover of vinyl records, can always be seen with a cup of coffee in my hands, and will talk about Ohio politics to anyone who will listen. Rural America is my home. I'm a lifelong Ohioan and a resident of Appalachian Southeast Ohio. I know how rural Americans feel when they are neglected by politicians at the state and federal levels because I’ve lived it. I’ve seen firsthand what it looks like when your community is left behind by both Democrats and Republicans. My hometown in Ohio voted for President Obama in overwhelming majority twice before flipping and voting for Trump twice. Our communities are being forgotten as America moves forward. I got into field organizing because there's nothing more important to me than knocking on the doors of my neighbors, talking directly about the issues that matter most to them as Americans living in rural areas. There’s no better way to grab the walleye by its gills than direct voter contact! When more rural residents can get out and make their voices heard at the ballot, that's a win for rural communities and all Americans. But more than anything, I'm in this fight because it's personal to me. Republicans across state legislatures in the Midwest continue their attacks on young trans women, like me, just for being who we are. I'm proud to be trans, but I unapologetically reject being used as a pawn by Republicans to implement policies that will hurt queer, specifically transgender, folks. That's why I'll keep fighting back against Republican legislators who continue to hurt both my rural and transgender communities. Being in leadership at United Rural Democrats allows me to fight back by supporting candidates who champion our values and understand the needs of both of these communities. To succeed this year, our team needs all the resources we can get to continue speaking directly with voters and Democrats who care. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Nat Flanagan Vice President, United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This was my view when I was stationed in Iraq:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
A message about burn pits — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.

| Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [split a donation of any amount between my campaign and UniteDemocrats.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57529738/388275214/70822501?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230119_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2ZjkxZjdjLTU1OTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NDq-fMFu3L8gb-lGobXox4ne5h8zX9Xe38Ab6r57BDo=) **But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57529739/388275215/70822501?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230119_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2ZjkxZjdjLTU1OTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NDq-fMFu3L8gb-lGobXox4ne5h8zX9Xe38Ab6r57BDo=) It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.

It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.

Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.

For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.

**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**

When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.

Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.

So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger?

I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.

Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.

These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**

I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.

**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have. **[If you’re with me, please split a donation of $10 or anything at all between my grassroots campaign and UniteDemocrats today. »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57529740/388275216/70822501?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230119_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2ZjkxZjdjLTU1OTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NDq-fMFu3L8gb-lGobXox4ne5h8zX9Xe38Ab6r57BDo=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57529748/388275225/70822501?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230119_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2ZjkxZjdjLTU1OTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NDq-fMFu3L8gb-lGobXox4ne5h8zX9Xe38Ab6r57BDo=)

[Or a custom donation »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57529753/388275229/70822501?amount=20&amounts=10,15,20&refcode=UD_20230119_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2ZjkxZjdjLTU1OTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NDq-fMFu3L8gb-lGobXox4ne5h8zX9Xe38Ab6r57BDo=)
I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter.

Thanks for hearing me out,

— Lucas Kunce

clean_body: A message about burn pits — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. | Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to = But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. = It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi. It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us. Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty. For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely. Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country. When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there. Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer. So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger? I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits. Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war. These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it. I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter. name: Lucas Kunce (via RBG)
subject: This was my view when I was stationed in Iraq:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
A message about burn pits — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.
| Hi there, it’s Lucas Kunce.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**split a donation of any amount between my campaign and Ron Be Gone.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15158?t=7&akid=1656%2E564421%2ESSzlsE) **But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.** [ ](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15159?t=8&akid=1656%2E564421%2ESSzlsE) It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.

It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.

Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.

For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.

**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**

When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.

Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.

So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger?

I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.

Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.

These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**

I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.

**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.** [**If you’re with me, please split a donation of $3 or anything at all between my grassroots campaign and Ron Be Gone today. »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15158?t=10&akid=1656%2E564421%2ESSzlsE) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Lucas Kunce will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15165?t=16&akid=1656%2E564421%2ESSzlsE)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15166?t=17&akid=1656%2E564421%2ESSzlsE)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15167?t=18&akid=1656%2E564421%2ESSzlsE)
I’m proud to have you on this team, friend.

Thanks for hearing me out,

_— Lucas Kunce_

clean_body: A message about burn pits — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. | Hi there, it’s Lucas Kunce. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi. It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us. Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty. For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely. Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country. When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there. Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer. So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger? I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits. Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war. These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it. I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have. [**Please donate $25, $50, $100, or more today to help cover the legal costs for the DOZENS of January 6th peaceful protesters who I’m fighting for in the courts!**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkUtvhCAUhX-N7jQIis7CxUztdNFH0u66miDgDBMeDkLN9Nf3amwXJYTAd869hINsC1qXRU1QQVPRMsoGKVLVYoQBYQSDkCpHZdM35U5gXmMiGU1KJA1TOmfFzLx3zuTcmfTSUilo2eyQqHdoaHqEmBCokU3NuBhwg1LdXkIYp4TsE3yEOUkevcxnZb0USxNglgXlLNMZd3YKKsTtqNmcRQt78Fxpxn38zqCAHGMwp8lFz2VCuk1JMF2wkUJF8HTOZLPfIGdmZOpsAZseGDMu2gAnXP06nA1yRZbr7L2v_COhU8lAPlmtBAj_4EUJeFX32pOhZIeX1LdinJXWaqI1xHVe41pCgru1Gu5tUh8SjNcyjNc88O1zNj5ezfNT9rH_ym70zVSLiB9gDfdR_jm3Jvn6Cwutux-4UJCK)

**I’ve been in D.C. since last week defending my client, Lloyd Cruz, in a HISTORIC January 6 case!**

Lloyd Cruz is a loving husband and father of 5 children, including his nephew who has been welcomed into the Cruz family with open arms. Let me tell you, Lloyd is a great man who has an unfortunate story like so many others.

On January 6, 2020, Lloyd went to our nation’s capital to support President Trump. He didn’t riot, break anything, or hurt anyone. He was actually getting lunch at a nearby food truck when he heard loud noises from the Capitol building, so he left his friends to see what was going on.

**Lloyd simply walked into the Capitol building, saw everything was fine, and walked back out without touching a single thing. There were no signs stating not to trespass, no barriers, and not even a single Capitol police officer discouraged him from entering – but now he’s facing TWO years in prison.**

I’ve seen case after case like this... Leftist politicians went on their witch hunt, vilifying peaceful men and women and “making an example” out of them, just to prove their political point.

**But here is where Lloyd’s case is different. In Lloyd’s historic hearing last week, we challenged the unconstitutional warrant that allowed the FBI to conspire with Big Tech to gather the location data of every cell phone around the Capitol building.**

**This is huge! We’ve entered a stipulated trial agreement so we can pursue this historic appeal, which could impact HUNDREDS of other J6 cases!**

The rights and liberties our Constitution bestows are rapidly being trampled, violated, and rescinded by the socialist Left, and I’m done watching our corrupt government destroy the lives of good Americans.

I’m representing dozens of January 6th peaceful protesters in court – more than any other legal team! But legal costs are mounting...

[**Will you donate $25, $50, $100, or more today to help cover the legal defense for Lloyd and the dozens of other January 6 peaceful patriots I’m fighting for in the courts?**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkTtvwyAUhX-NvdnCFxsng4c8lAxtOnTLFBHACRGPBEOt9Nf32ko7FCEE3zn3Ig6qq1hbVy0lFctlxxnvlcx1BwQQAcFBaVOSenFe1EsJogWqOMtqoizXpuTVyEPw3pbC2_za1XAG2kJNGJULzhihijZV1bSkJxWBZW66a4z3IaOrDHY4ByVSUOWoXVByaoLM8ai946YQ3g1Rx_Q6Gj4WyeEePTdWiJC-CyyguxTtafApCJXR7UvJgE3YKqkTerbeFmN4QcHtneuLQ2zPyLj1yUU8QfPr8C6qGTlhCrk_NnIjDnBF-eSMlij8g1ct8VXbw5n2NV-_56GT91EbowfWYlyXOa4pJLzb6P7ZZe06A5jLAOY84HEcbUg3-7YvPldfxYN92GYSYYNrfN7Vn_PVpJx_YaLt9geNjo8f)

Every dollar makes a difference in the lives of these persecuted patriots, but also for the future of our democracy and freedoms.

Thank you for your support and for standing with me in the defense of our beloved Constitution and our great country!

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Founder and General Counsel
National Constitutional Law Union

| Friends,
With a solid record of working as a team to get things done for the people of Virginia, and one of the most conservative voting records in Virginia, I am very humbled by the growing support for my campaign to be your next State Senator. Dear Supporters,

I recently announced that I am running for U.S. Senate in Indiana. I am determined to continue fighting for our shared conservative values and to put America first.

However, I am not a millionaire who can afford to spend endless personal money on my campaign. I’ve always relied on the support of committed, grassroots conservatives like you, friend. It is time to put the needs of the American people first and ensure that our government works for all of us. clean_body: Can you help me out? | Dear Supporters, I recently announced that I am running for U.S. Senate in Indiana. I am determined to continue fighting for our shared conservative values and to put America first. However, I am not a millionaire who can afford to spend endless personal money on my campaign. I’ve always relied on the support of committed, grassroots conservatives like you, friend. And I need your help now more than ever — | In the Senate, I will fight to protect our Constitution and stand up to the radical Left’s socialist agenda. It is time to put the needs of the American people first and ensure that our government works for all of us. | | ---|---|--- | | I truly appreciate your support. | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57530202/388291871/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTk2YTBhMC01Yjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7wlkJCQ_Qo6NOYoSwWv27-baAp7iBqRpi_quK3tsy9Q=&emci=b52bc468-5698-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=8596a0a0-5b98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579)

| | Peter, After I was elected to Congress, I just couldn't wait to get sworn in. **But the House Republicans had a different plan, if you can call it that.** Instead of allowing Congress to move forward with our constitutional obligations and regular business, the extremists of the House GOP caucus held us up for four (4!) days while the rest of us tried to elect a Speaker of the House. When they finally got their act together (sort of), House Republicans spent their opening moments in the majority predictably pushing policies which help no one and hurt everyone: First they voted on a bill which adds $100 billion to the federal deficit by letting tax cheats off the hook. House Republicans are fine letting taxpayers' refunds go unpaid while their billionaire backers skip out on their obligations and leave the working families footing the bill. I guess they looked around to see if there were more criminals they could go easy on, because next, they gutted the Office of Congressional Ethics. This move comes at a time when multiple House Republicans are under investigation. **That's not a coincidence.** On top of all this, House Republicans voted for more restrictions on abortion access, launched bogus investigations into President Biden's family, and abolished the House Select Committee on Climate Change. We're getting exactly what McCarthy and House Republicans campaigned on: dysfunction, conspiracy theories, special favors for their wealthy donors and ramming through radical right wing policies for the rest of us. I'm fighting hard to stand up for our values, and I plan on continuing to do so as long as I am elected to represent Oregon's 4th Congressional District. The race to November 2024 has already begun, and we know Kevin McCarthy is going to come after this district again in hopes of placing someone who will further support his extreme agenda. **I need to prepare for what's coming, Peter.[Please, chip in $7 and help me fight back against McCarthy and GOP extremism in Congress name: Adam Schiff
subject: Federal panel of judges rules SC-01 racially gerrymandered; ordered redrawn by April
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| That’s right — Republicans openly violated the Voting Rights Act to help themselves and deny Black Charlestonians their Constitutional rights.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1595%2E5257348%2EOQWCRX)
Derek, a panel of three federal judges just made a stunning ruling on South Carolina’s First Congressional District.
You have to read it for yourself:
_**“The movement of over 30,000 African Americans** in a single county [Charleston County] from Congressional District No. 1 to Congressional District No. 6 **created a stark racial gerrymander in Charleston County.** The percentage of African Americans in Charleston County in Congressional District No. 1 fell from 19.8% at the time of the enactment of the 2011 plan to 10.3% in the 2022 plan.”_
That’s right — **Republicans openly violated the _Voting Rights Act_ to help themselves and deny Black Charlestonians their Constitutional rights.** This racial gerrymander potentially cost Democrats yet another seat in the House, and continued an ugly legacy of discrimination.
And with Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans directing priorities in the House, the GOP is sure to take their strategy of Jim Crow 2.0 voter suppression from South Carolina across the country.
[**Derek, the Senate must oppose this effort and take action immediately to abolish the filibuster and pass voting rights legislation. Add your name to my petition calling on Senate Democrats to fight back against Republican efforts to disenfranchise the American people.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230119-sc01-gerrymandering.Djfglh&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230119_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1595%2E5257348%2EOQWCRX)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230119-sc01-gerrymandering.Djfglh&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230119_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1595%2E5257348%2EOQWCRX)
---
Republicans are using the same strategy for voter suppression as they did for abortion bans — pass as many laws at the state level and appeal them up to the right-wing Supreme Court majority, where they could receive a favorable ruling.
The Supreme Court has already dramatically weakened the _Voting Rights Act_ after 2013’s _Shelby County v. Holder._ Now, MAGA Republicans are looking for a knockout punch.
**In any democracy, the voters should choose the politicians, not the politicians choosing the voters.**
[**If you agree, add your name to my petition and join me in calling on Senate Democrats to abolish the filibuster and the gerrymander, and take up voting rights legislation immediately. Our democracy depends on it.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230119-sc01-gerrymandering.Djfglh&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230119_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1595%2E5257348%2EOQWCRX)
Thanks for raising your voice,
Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1595%2E5257348%2EOQWCRX) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1595%2E5257348%2EOQWCRX)**

body:

I am so grateful for all the friendship, family, love & support you continue to extend to me! | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: The FBI briefing on Eric Swalwell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Service and Honor A joint fundraising committee established by Jake Ellzey for Congress and 31 Days PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

_**We know**_ Eric Swalwell is a risk to national security.

_**We know**_ Eric Swalwell was involved with a Chinese spy.

_**We know**_ Eric Swalwell doesn't deserve to serve on the intelligence committee.

And so I'm firing him from his role on it.

Believe me- if you saw the FBI briefing that I did...I'm sure you would have done the same.

But that doesn't change the fact that he is still a member of Congress that caters to the demands of the woke mob and far left. I'm sure he's using his recent termination as a means to raise money, flip seats, and re-install himself in a position of power.

__**We can 't let Swalwell off the hook this easy. Don't let him gain any steam or notoriety for his disgraceful conduct. Don't let the Democrats take advantage of me fulfilling my promise to you and the American People. **__

__**I 'm asking you to sign on & endorse our firing of Eric Swalwell right away. **__

---
| | [FIRE ERIC SWALWELL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62226681:69Pw_KGNS:m:1:3331421248:785C3FEA6B0B35857C2CEAC60FAF421E:r "Fire Eric Swalwell")
---

Thank you,

Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9ft81pp60406d45t5o5lqi566a71djqdlqo47n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i64ob0cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf7jbj3dlcqisf3dcf0tr3vl0adi4k7o70ji9v3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i64ob0cth2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2fhej17jloiq988epv6rph0g6un297jgq06qa0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i64ob0cth2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Action News
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq8e96o7i31f058kdo1n1orijlluhpp2fhel0e10_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i64ob4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7p51pf0a4ffa9m7k4u1kpqmtt8r0qmnpmh0ufe0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i64ob4cph2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z86rrqg1qovgpvm4p3kik2gr1tsr51ond2vtqbt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i64ob4cph2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0opln4ij3gnaiudh6p100keur75aa4m66lb19i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i64ob4cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8h9v0viqd4g7fn7obbrqpiljuhs5e3ku6qkadto_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i64ob4cjh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbnp7gsrnrjioc7avtkc2am381csu6pieim7sfgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i64ob4cjh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We could lose it all.
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._NAZoSd7MVw)
---
Fellow Patriot **I firmly believe the World Economic Forum (WEF) will completely destroy everything we hold dear, unless we act quickly to EXPOSE their wicked plan.** A secretive cabal of international elitists plans to force free citizens, like YOU and me, to surrender to their sinister Great Reset agenda. This shadowy group wants to re-engineer your behavior, your lifestyle, and the entire world as we know it. _There is too much at risk: this radical global agenda could soon take control of OUR country, OUR lives, and OUR freedom ... which means EVERY patriot needs to help EXPOSE this villainous group IMMEDIATELY!_ [**Turning Point USA and I are LEADING THE CHARGE against the WEF and their destructive GREAT RESET agenda -- and I am asking America-loving patriots like YOU to help EXPOSE their harmful plan by signing the GREAT RESET petition today. **](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-PlWQd55Hllw-qA)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Maybe you've heard of the Great Reset before, or maybe this is all new to you. The World Economic Forum has made their goals for the Great Reset clear ... in fact, the WEF has even published some expectations for 2030, including:
* The U.S. won't be the world's superpower
* Fossil fuels will be eliminated
* You'll own nothing and be happy
* You'll eat bugs and like it
* Western values will be pushed to their breaking point.
* A billion people will be displaced by climate change.

**Patriots like you and I MUST understand the TRUTH about the Great Reset and the critical role we can play in stopping it dead in its tracks.** _To preserve Freedom and American Greatness, EVERY real patriot reading this critical message must help EXPOSE the TRUTH and be prepared to fight back to help stop the radical takeover of America._ [**Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... so I need as many patriotic Americans AS POSSIBLE to help EXPOSE and DEFEAT their radical agenda by signing this petition right away. **](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-SJBoorkluaZw)
---
[**Sign The Great Reset Petition**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-37lZCUj5Ptg)
---
I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against globalist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. If you want to preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandchildren ... then I urge you to sign this petition now.
---
| | **[We must fight back against this radical agenda and demand a return to American Greatness. Please sign the Great Reset petition now to make your voice heard.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** **_And, if you're able to make a gift of any amount to help us continue spreading the word, you'll get a FREE copy of our new book,_ The American Response to the Great Reset!** Either way, I hope you'll take action right now by signing this important national petition.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._XiJAdsSbSjrDeuFvBfCw)
---
| | Thank you for helping Turning Point USA EXPOSE and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
---
[Sign the Great Reset Petition](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDIwLWFkNDk5MjM2YzZkMTQ4MTY4MjI0NjQ5NTliNWRjM2Q0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/JXQgkxl6ZVO96DjaLx1z6w) to unsubscribe.

name: American Briefing
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg6c4mrmh8dl76nkil9h5adj4hhtue6vrql29rv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i66o36cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2bch5aafbgvmtpd3j42ovfig1b3iqvsl04asn00_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i66o36cph2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvfgmmia4q9gscicp490odgni41eqtvm66jnjh90_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9i66o36cph2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2zf4k4s7t3oec1l0ug7lm6tqoaeoi68u2vrtqgrtg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Shift WA
subject: A state income tax?
body:
The State Supreme Court will hear Democrats argue for a state income tax income tax. Democrats did not just suddenly pass a state income tax on capital gains during the 2021 legislative session. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61403538:s0utkoDeN:m:1:2610672541:601E1E76D6BB6F440025F13FEB7CCCB5:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Next week, the State Supreme Court will hear Democrats argue for a state income tax. The hearing will begin at 9 a.m. on January 26 - ultimately, the Court will decide whether to stand up against the unconstitutionality of the state income tax that Democrats have attempted to enforce for years.

We here at Shift WA have reported - and warned - of Democrats' efforts to bypass our state's ban on a state income tax (by claiming an excise tax on capital gains) for years.

In 2015, we called out Democrats for their efforts to [pass a state income tax (on capital gains) as part of their 2015-17 budget](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61403539:s0utkoDeN:m:1:2610672541:601E1E76D6BB6F440025F13FEB7CCCB5:r). We also held Jay Inslee accountable for claiming that capital gains income is not, in fact, income - a false statement that is [not supported by the IRS or the U.S. Supreme Court's past decisions](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61403540:s0utkoDeN:m:1:2610672541:601E1E76D6BB6F440025F13FEB7CCCB5:r).

More recently, in 2021, we [interviewed former Washington State Attorney General Rob McKenna (2005 - 2013)](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61403541:s0utkoDeN:m:1:2610672541:601E1E76D6BB6F440025F13FEB7CCCB5:r) on the lawsuit now before the State Supreme Court. McKenna will be arguing the case on behalf of the Opportunity for All Coalition. McKenna provided our readers with the critical legal arguments for the case that the state income tax (on capital gains) is unconstitutional and the many state legal precedents supporting those arguments.

Of course, Democrats did not just suddenly pass a state income tax on capital gains during the 2021 legislative session. They've been building toward the unconstitutional tax for many years - **and Shift WA has been there to cover their efforts every step of the way.** And that's why our efforts are so important.

**We are the only communications outlet working to hold Democrats accountable in our state.** You simply cannot trust mainstream media companies to challenge the Left. They do everything possible to protect Democrats and cover for their unpopular and failed policies.

**Our efforts depend entirely on grassroots supporters like you.** _**[Will you consider contributing $100, $50, or $25 to help us keep the lights on?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61403542:s0utkoDeN:m:1:2610672541:601E1E76D6BB6F440025F13FEB7CCCB5:r)**_

Between the upcoming lawsuit against the state income tax on capital gains and the 2023 legislative session, a lot is happening in our state. **And you can count on us to continue bringing updates to you.
**
**But we need your help.**_**[Will you consider contributing today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61403542:s0utkoDeN:m:1:2610672541:601E1E76D6BB6F440025F13FEB7CCCB5:r)**_

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61403543:s0utkoDeN:m:1:2610672541:601E1E76D6BB6F440025F13FEB7CCCB5:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14117232&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/os0utkoDeN).
---

We are the only communications outlet working to hold Democrats accountable in our state. You simply cannot trust mainstream media companies to challenge the Left. They do everything possible to protect Democrats and cover for their unpopular and failed policies. Our efforts depend entirely on grassroots supporters like you. Between the upcoming lawsuit against the state income tax on capital gains and the 2023 legislative session, a lot is happening in our state. And you can count on us to continue bringing updates to you. But we need your help. Thank you, The Shift WA team | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can to do so. You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on & . name: Andy Biggs
subject: It’s time to get to work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62226906:6EEpeKGmN:m:1:3331421248:14076E0FE506BD1AF03335306784AC21:r)
---
| Peter,
As a dedicated conservative, I've always remained committed to putting the best interests of the American people first.
And that's why I'm leading the fight to hold bureaucrats accountable and demand moderates and Democrats do too.
We've made our demands clear and have already accomplished so much because of your support...but now we need to ramp up our efforts.
**So I 'm taking on the IRS, calling for lower taxes for all Americans, and fighting to preserve innocent life.**
I'm working as hard as I can, **[but I need your help to make sure Congress hears our message and gets these things done.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62226906:6EEpeKGmN:m:1:3331421248:14076E0FE506BD1AF03335306784AC21:r)** | | | | [DEMAND ACTION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62226906:6EEpeKGmN:m:1:3331421248:14076E0FE506BD1AF03335306784AC21:r)
---
**The IRS is a bloated bureaucracy that wastes billions of dollars every year while stifling economic growth and violating the privacy of American citizens.**

We need to put an end to this and give hard working Americans the freedom to keep more of their own money.

At the same time, we must also work to protect the lives of the unborn. Every human life is precious and should be protected under law.

**We cannot stand idly by while Democrats make it easier to take innocent lives.**

That's why I am asking for your support. With your donation, we can fight to defund the IRS, lower our income taxes, and defend the rights of the unborn with our new Republican Majority.

**[So please, help me put pressure on GOP moderates and Democrats to demand they put Americans first and tackle the real issues.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62226906:6EEpeKGmN:m:1:3331421248:14076E0FE506BD1AF03335306784AC21:r)**

Thank you for your support,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

| MAJOR NEWS: TWO YEARS SINCE BIDEN WAS SWORN IN Yes, you read that right. It really has been only two.
Friend
It's officially been two years since Biden took office, and I'm sure you're getting a lot of emails, polls and surveys asking how you think the first two years went.
I'm not gonna ask how the last two years went, because YOU already know having to live through the mess. Instead, I want to know if you will join me in the fight to hold him accountable for what he has done, and what he will try to do for his final two years in office.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0dhqicv28k0go7v87s75ejgeunh82r8vsa9jp7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9h6coj2cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zil8t2oreo3p9sp1qb17iean36iuums6k2lngkeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9h6coj2cth2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi49ldfroh1npcqhq3bk5m30ennta47juv2r9v58_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9h6coj2cth2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| An invasion of our country along the Southern Border... An Inflation Crisis not seen in 40 Years... Troops purged from the military for refusing experimental vaccines... A weaponized Deep State targeting political opponents and Constitutional rights...
All of this has become the new normal in Joe Biden's America.

name: Josh Shapiro HQ
subject: Hitting the ground running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, It’s been three days since Governor Shapiro and Lt. Gov. Davis were sworn into office. Because you played such an important role in helping them get to where they are, we wanted to drop you a quick note to let you know that they are already hitting the ground running. After assembling a cabinet and senior staff comprised of the most historically diverse, bipartisan, and well-qualified public servants in our history, Josh is wasting no time getting to work for the people of Pennsylvania. That means defending our fundamental freedoms, strengthening our democratic institutions, supporting our schools, investing in our children, and delivering real solutions that will expand economic opportunity for families across our Commonwealth. The opportunity to make this kind of progress is only possible because together, we built a historic coalition of Pennsylvanians — folks from towns and cities that may look different from each other, but where people really are asking for the same things. Good schools for our kids, safe communities, and an economy that lifts everyone up. That’s exactly what Josh and Austin are committed to delivering for our Commonwealth — and the opportunity to do that exists because of you, Derek. Sincerely, Team Josh Shapiro

name: Keep PA-17 Blue
subject: Here’s what Kevin McCarthy has been up to in his first month as Speaker:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
THE KEVIN MCCARTHY AGENDA.
HERE'S WHAT REPUBLICANS HAVE DONE IN THEIR FIRST FEW WEEKS IN THE MAJORITY:

Passed a bill attempting to defund the IRS, which would help billionaires evade paying their fair share in taxes.

Passed two anti-abortion bills that would criminalize abortion nationwide, putting women and their doctors behind bars.

Shared their plans to gut Medicare and Medicaid, putting millions of Americans' healthcare at risk.

Threatened to shut down the government, which would hurt essential services like air traffic control and Social Security.

Chris Deluzio is standing strong against Kevin McCarthy's extreme agenda, and he needs your support.

WILL YOU CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP FIGHT BACK?
FIGHT BACK » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-jan2023?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.20_b1_kpa17b_all&amount=15

----------
Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine.

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. Improving equality? Let Gwen know what important issues you’d like to get updated on. It’ll only take two seconds of your time. Thank you! | | Brenda, Gwen Moore for CongressProudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | =| =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. name: Full Mag News
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b8d71c40efc4f4980f656b75da9fd4b&_e=VaWySq0h5TCJMITGhvXiNuyfusxfJRwkZkJ2jv-6wsnb7sDBLVHYtUx1lc9UnWY-ewYqY1GkgJaFEErchCApL3-3xhptOkZndroKjkMoWIurOTwsqDfilmHAvywPwK70okyTltn3Jk0HO7YzRN134mSpgc1WgebbgY77pvs5CHi-D73ZSKjyr8hK-43uHhtWgXSYZ-JF_TQhN9EUQddtpKPVWwiA6rsU3DAR-jEDfFbXjl5WIDqnvgHliKbPB_h2Ftcf7mkU3tmMiEo1tWacR4LJHXikvBliJmo6K0nHdS3zqPFaAmKUhpo-oBGsPTcaRR3_4JX5pB5em-ObdXdHTBWFplv5gKsHeoTd3OQbllE1uytvkow341aAFg0tZ4onxRKeNPQ33gl7kGbTc1jT30tRcLpJFXACcgeJi_C9ANU%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b8d71c40efc4f4980f656b75da9fd4b&_e=VaWySq0h5TCJMITGhvXiNuyfusxfJRwkZkJ2jv-6wsnb7sDBLVHYtUx1lc9UnWY-ewYqY1GkgJaFEErchCApL3-3xhptOkZndroKjkMoWIurOTwsqDfilmHAvywPwK70okyTltn3Jk0HO7YzRN134mSpgc1WgebbgY77pvs5CHi-D73ZSKjyr8hK-43uHhtWgXSYZ-JF_TQhN9EUQddtpKPVWwiA6rsU3DAR-jEDfFbXjl5WIDqnvgHliKbPB_h2NiJHutnY3eQtT483cS-CKTHKYFqx4OIoeapFNxOZJEdYUPoVI8315gb7yHJn1u-xfdT3zK60af87V-vpsnQ7JulCwz8Gm-p7iwN8XFbA4QInqLezMIDoDf1bQhQQEkBgolxbmEQpzsn0oArBXnQzvMWn5vwitTC0h89tPYL7OyI%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b8d71c40efc4f4980f656b75da9fd4b&_e=VaWySq0h5TCJMITGhvXiNuyfusxfJRwkZkJ2jv-6wsnb7sDBLVHYtUx1lc9UnWY-ewYqY1GkgJaFEErchCApL3-3xhptOkZndroKjkMoWIurOTwsqDfilmHAvywPwK70okyTltn3Jk0HO7YzRN134mSpgc1WgebbgY77pvs5CHi-D73ZSKjyr8hK-43uHhtWgXSYZ-JF_TQhN9EUQddtpKPVWwiA6rsU3DAR-jEDfFbXjl5WIDqnvgHliKbPB_h2mYmBiZAR82OQSJx4jIHHmAB5PZRshmKPlpSnucYwWk-cL98oeogL_HhJCQAi5DDnR7PJmM4AOLQlpJbh20-z5xR1c_fWO0Vf35s4f2svPgK8cdp17R3bnkd3Q7LKDXdvLQwzLA8L3bzMJuIvax3hlqM9drGo3tt-I4k32dw4NYo%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=618e42289fe94ddd9c13da3d68d5bb2f&_e=hp_pb8z6r4m6J39hdJQfByszWV8b3oI542qvq6POmGaZS6F6Z9Fv3AxzjZ5eQCSfAPT617kvXM4Jb5G3TghZDi6eSi4n_lenoZOnk_iyvdxnSL6_tc50IXt6287TEzqy1bAHqockT5O6rtOs_B0dloO-IaJJ-LhM-qCxVENkBzzes4pFEJTXyDhVuK1ngdt33ukpjNGJV2njP4ZDPRZHIW3kUwHhavD6Q4DKGOaC4UkpMF9NfOn-V0FxamRLoxnQcTxrkwt83MHkI2GowowtCF-dcbjtJrJmRP8NhCQ3Z0Mt_XJA8JWNXYMirLpGuQTlYu-6dtBQj-sl3Cp85iMZHZA2j8dVcjR2pp0aJnQCXSU%3D) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

"House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public. "_

**Yes, you read that right - the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they're trying to bury that evidence until everyone they've falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms - especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!

** And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.
