name: Matt Gaetz
subject: It's time to abolish the ATF
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

With the stroke of a pen, Joe Biden just turned millions of Americans into felons.

The Biden regime just ordered all Americans who own firearms with commonly used stabilizing accessories _to register their guns with the government or face lengthy prison sentences_.

Disabled veterans who sacrificed for our nation could face the FBI banging on their door, ready to drag them away in handcuffs unless they obey

**_I won't stand for that._** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61404512:sYfnpoDNI:m:1:2365227053:6EED2D96685FB8278F32880C43CAA5AE:r) **I've introduced the "Abolish the ATF Act," and I need you to [become a Citizen Co-sponsor in this crucial fight by signing your petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61404512:sYfnpoDNI:m:1:2365227053:6EED2D96685FB8278F32880C43CAA5AE:r) to stop Joe Biden's unconstitutional gun grab.**

| | [ SIGN YOUR ABOLISH THE ATF
PETITION RIGHT AWAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61404512:sYfnpoDNI:m:1:2365227053:6EED2D96685FB8278F32880C43CAA5AE:r)
---

**[And after you sign, please consider going the extra mile by chipping in $10, $25 -- whatever you can afford -- TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61404512:sYfnpoDNI:m:1:2365227053:6EED2D96685FB8278F32880C43CAA5AE:r).**

**With your support, I can mobilize the MAGA movement to urge the Republican majority to vote on my bill to abolish the ATF and end Biden's assault on our Second Amendment rights.**

Peter, Joe Biden weaponized the FBI to target the Democrat Party's political opponents.

The FBI never staged a manhunt to arrest the BLM terrorists that burned down American cities during the summer of 2020.

Anti-fa roams free to set up autonomous zones in Democrat-run cities.

Illegal aliens pour across the border by the millions.

But what is Joe Biden's number one priority?

Criminalizing gun owners.

The ONLY reason the gun grabbers want a national gun registration database is so they know whose guns they need to confiscate if the day ever comes.

I'm putting the ATF in the crosshairs.

But I need your help.

**[I need you to join this fight: become a Citizen Co-Sponsor by signing your"Abolish the ATF" petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61404512:sYfnpoDNI:m:1:2365227053:6EED2D96685FB8278F32880C43CAA5AE:r)!**

| | [ SIGN YOUR ABOLISH THE ATF
PETITION RIGHT AWAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61404512:sYfnpoDNI:m:1:2365227053:6EED2D96685FB8278F32880C43CAA5AE:r)
---

**After you sign, I hope you will[chip in $10, $25, or more today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61404512:sYfnpoDNI:m:1:2365227053:6EED2D96685FB8278F32880C43CAA5AE:r) to help me build momentum across America to ABOLISH THE ATF.**

I don't take any PAC money.

I don't take any corporate lobbyist money.

I am 100 percent funded by the grassroots America First conservatives.

And I need you in my corner to win this fight.

**So after you[sign and become a Citizen Co-sponsor, please give your most generous contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61404512:sYfnpoDNI:m:1:2365227053:6EED2D96685FB8278F32880C43CAA5AE:r) to help me fight to pass my bill so I can dismantle Joe Biden's gun control scheme and abolish the ATF.**

_Sincerely,_

Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

* * *
| **Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We can win the House back in 2024, but that depends on building from a firm foundation of holding onto our most vulnerable seats. This includes supporting Rep. Marcy Kaptur of Ohio, who now holds a +3 Republican-leaning district. She’s not a big national name though, and that’s why she needs our help to prepare now for 2024.
body:
Firm foundations for 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdc2fb54-6e50-4f69-9214-2a862f4bacfb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _We send you a congressional seat we absolutely MUST KEEP in 2024: Marcy Kaptur’s, whose 9th district of Ohio is now +3 Republican-leaning._ _Kaptur is a star. Republicans in Ohio, with forethought of eliminating her from Congress, gerrymandered the 9th district from Dem leaning to +3 Republican._ **_She responded by saying, ok, you think that's gonna be enough, and went ahead to beat J.R. Majewski, 56-43%. She stared down their sexist attacks, and responded the best way possible--by crushing them._** Kaptur has the advantage of the relationship and recognition she’s built with local voters, and a solid record of representing her voters’ interests in Congress. She can hold onto this seat again. But **Republicans are betting that dumping enough money into her district after their obscene gerrymandering tactics will leave her vulnerable**. If we want to get back the House majority in 2024, **Republicans need to lose that bet**. [**_Will you join us, giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Rep. Marcy Kaptur's reelection?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a789e20-d9fc-4a75-be25-852dda5328ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We're down only 5 seats in the House. People switch parties, they get ill and even pass away...and then there's George Santos, from a Democratic district who likely has a future date with a prison cell in New York City or Sao Paulo._ **_The point is, this could get even closer, and we can and will win the House back in 2024. __But it starts with holding onto our most vulnerable seats. Which includes Rep. Marcy Kaptur of Ohio._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6143ce2-e503-4aed-934c-9f622fa77621/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Yes, Majewski, with his Republican-like lies about his record (said he served in Afghanistan and Iraq, really loaded cargo in Qatar) and conspiracy theories about the election and pretty much everything else, helped her out. But **_it was her experience as a longtime lunch-pail Midwestern Democrat that was key here,_** and led to one of three huge Democratic upsets in Ohio House races. _Now Republicans will throw everything--and I mean EVERYTHING--at her. So we must be there to protect this amazing Democrat who fights for her values._ As you can see by the results of the last election, she'll do her part. _We must do ours, providing her with the resources to run a great campaign._ [**_The Blue Amp Action community's behind Kaptur now, as we must start early to fend off attacks by Republican billionaires. Will you join us, giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Rep. Marcy Kaptur's reelection?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2cf81201-8c0a-4744-af38-786e7a8cea73/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for helping us win back the house from these (dragging) knuckleheads, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9915555-cbd5-4ad1-b9b8-d4883b823f41/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/holdingmarcykaptursseat2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6e1483f-bbe6-471f-a80a-22349a5d4416/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |

| | [](http://trk.libertyledger._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMTIwX0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVOX0FFLUxMTyJ9/iGlh0ZCNhJBWmc8isBvvVw)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](http://trk.libertyledger._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMTIwX0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVOX0FFLUxMTyJ9/1JYly7qkbsMCFsQzg44UwQ)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections...__... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children...And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it![**Specifically, I'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://trk.libertyledger._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMTIwX0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVOX0FFLUxMTyJ9/41O2j95se3pI_mqnZeo2pw) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change...And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on.Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors.Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them.The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable......and that's where you come in.[**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://trk.libertyledger._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMTIwX0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVOX0FFLUxMTyJ9/5lZuxteKBwZ0zEJQbG6Hpw)Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://trk.libertyledger._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMTIwX0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVOX0FFLUxMTyJ9/FkdQZgvM-mVryTpVo8eLtQ)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children...With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://trk.libertyledger._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMTIwX0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVOX0FFLUxMTyJ9/4j_37uSXt8YyTExVWapRWg) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them.Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again.[**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://trk.libertyledger._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMTIwX0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVOX0FFLUxMTyJ9/GiWI9_oMND6-AjPjclTHFw)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://trk.libertyledger._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwMTIwX0JER19DRkFMX0NDQUxfUkVOX0FFLUxMTyJ9/IK_jkSEUHzZDwVX8S_Tk6A)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementa

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=71772d297e584c91841da5845bc057e0&_e=lcAzC-KmVeB8kJ18OUm7_WfDRu8FftBZ-6Fg7RLgxUapRZwAr3U9rK1-TGMVcEeiFmqUr4wWz6LhsIzN2ikVKek3nHeI_5vtMPlgHGmNxpCKDeMQ23ex-jHe8SIFmII7IIZXcEskHorAJWIeVu9Bh_VEsmGZc5LFnQ4JbiiSz1-1fKywS47lLic3dJLMZSuFzWBGP8xfy6gf5dYdObky5lmr9IA7l6uu-bd8rSHbfbyHuDYTqZnhqAuU8QbWZNSCJ6OLlQ5N_Tq2J_DzNt7NI4hGdsRMVt-BhdP2TGbrtx_tr9xpHkMtQgtsKLf56g4mIoNk2JdTT3S-ztmg0hjKFlCkKkKa9X8uTjZDngIiyf6y9ln3h-UsVesv702CKL4EshsOiv_4XGio-yrNdF4lkg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, **“The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism.”**
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=71772d297e584c91841da5845bc057e0&_e=lcAzC-KmVeB8kJ18OUm7_WfDRu8FftBZ-6Fg7RLgxUapRZwAr3U9rK1-TGMVcEeiFmqUr4wWz6LhsIzN2ikVKek3nHeI_5vtMPlgHGmNxpCKDeMQ23ex-jHe8SIFmII7IIZXcEskHorAJWIeVu9Bh_VEsmGZc5LFnQ4JbiiSz1-1fKywS47lLic3dJLMZSuFzWBGP8xfy6gf5dYdObky5lmr9IA7l6uu-bd8rSHbfbyHuDYTqZnhqAuU8QbWZNSCY7e2SDe2zb_D90hv5yxrWC4YkypX_3mj3S-e6dMtOtG-EHyjeek7rT8LQwjgxS49gTi4Fki-cTG7f_zq7ScftD8-6r00VF-ykVHd3Sdz1WEDZZKMvbNBCgYpm-mxNhumKQMLbH7jFe3vTzjYUQoHhg%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=71772d297e584c91841da5845bc057e0&_e=lcAzC-KmVeB8kJ18OUm7_WfDRu8FftBZ-6Fg7RLgxUapRZwAr3U9rK1-TGMVcEeiFmqUr4wWz6LhsIzN2ikVKek3nHeI_5vtMPlgHGmNxpCKDeMQ23ex-jHe8SIFmII7IIZXcEskHorAJWIeVu9Bh_VEsmGZc5LFnQ4JbiiSz1-1fKywS47lLic3dJLMZSuFzWBGP8xfy6gf5dYdObky5lmr9IA7l6uu-bd8rSHbfbyHuDYTqZnhqAuU8QbWZNSCKpFIylBtbRf8DDaNK8VfSv5akJhVE3iXbhdXBZPwCJxC1YGGVQRTRv7YJ8vSLsUnl04o3QRvnYRZfcIsTHnj8NQu2A87wmHffIkmANLk6YXNcWVFqcm8NRbpvuXBWuZXxrl1LPl5nnMl7UhLCe6VLA%3D%3D)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand—and learn how to confront—the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

---
Patriot,

No one in their right mind believes that Katie Hobbs won the election -- even 69% of DEMOCRATS in Maricopa County believe Americans have been deprived of the right to vote in this election.

**So much fraud has already been uncovered, but it will take more time to reveal the true scale of the corruption that influenced our election.** **[We just need to hold the line.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656298%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zODyFu1il6gtN89KRuzDjg&sysid=1)**

**The Fake News Media is painting me as a villain because the establishment has directed them to crush our movement. They want to make asking questions a crime.**

**[It doesn’t matter who’s against us.

As long as I’m still breathing, I will not stop uncovering the truth.

](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656299%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nkxRHem1AQE4aXssO8UEMg&sysid=1)** | [**JOIN THE FIGHT!** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656290%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=74L2ddwvuefWBbPSgVIDMw&sysid=1)
---

Every day more light is shed on the simple fact that **the Arizona election was RIGGED.** Americans are waking up to this undeniable truth.

Unfortunately -- the fact is we’ve got a tight timetable.

**At MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, we’re going to be dangerously close to running out of funds. If we lose our cash flow, we lose the ability to fight -- that’s the sad reality.**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c001129d66a8455887bbbb32e9b14426&_e=Z3bqZ8yHvSAR1KJvqKmNz2K7qz8mvk1nRyktgZmge6JApJTJBvfEhcOVScBQ1CB5kol2UTie1dTU5O1NEfiguMKjDr897ddnaSvAabMTfmkQ_YMF1ouupXh_uTDHeyqEgNwyuxE16n64WHQNgKrA_pVrT9Zeit5xsC3CZjq2IK0MJTAQev2yqE7mLvfAULWhHCTFb8pEoGEcSS9U05lbyomQ9v73bbtiNSi0t1r4rwf8PO0A5Xn7gUR3zZjarVpwtNH98VRZbvTyEpRQ3YkxUGpWoqJGXluGVqZu9dCNC8EGCkv4DczeYKEkAV8PDYAnAqdGiMqHpEmz2BWY4oKcLjSsTZmVR8pAvBx7M4cB9PAfmTwVVfwV-4iTld2Xi80CLDERojB9DQe5H1tfhQkFSjcl7DusYzAPTaUkAwTzqoc%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c001129d66a8455887bbbb32e9b14426&_e=Z3bqZ8yHvSAR1KJvqKmNz2K7qz8mvk1nRyktgZmge6JApJTJBvfEhcOVScBQ1CB5kol2UTie1dTU5O1NEfiguMKjDr897ddnaSvAabMTfmkQ_YMF1ouupXh_uTDHeyqEgNwyuxE16n64WHQNgKrA_pVrT9Zeit5xsC3CZjq2IK0MJTAQev2yqE7mLvfAULWhHCTFb8pEoGEcSS9U05lbyomQ9v73bbtiNSi0t1r4rwf8PO0A5Xn7gUR3zZjarVpw1MBgG-ErRaV9ajSXaoIlqeLlvmKdnI4IJ_ePy6bdN5vBqh1hUBD4MCkn9LjyYodgGkZ9JZc9_O5xEGxhCAjAWBw6okhPfHELhThY8O36Rl-1aTCarl0psBgnISaDL05yq38rnT8D7XVqYp3ZptnI0rv2MziRsGiu4JuHc_4mKwY%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c001129d66a8455887bbbb32e9b14426&_e=Z3bqZ8yHvSAR1KJvqKmNz2K7qz8mvk1nRyktgZmge6JApJTJBvfEhcOVScBQ1CB5kol2UTie1dTU5O1NEfiguMKjDr897ddnaSvAabMTfmkQ_YMF1ouupXh_uTDHeyqEgNwyuxE16n64WHQNgKrA_pVrT9Zeit5xsC3CZjq2IK0MJTAQev2yqE7mLvfAULWhHCTFb8pEoGEcSS9U05lbyomQ9v73bbtiNSi0t1r4rwf8PO0A5Xn7gUR3zZjarVpwjN0iTwVGNxCgN8Ndpje7o2IaXtK9Oe1IVgXJMyytPWnUGhZQRgwmqLy2JdE-MJj0Opl31lB0CH6Mb9YZjju96Px-k3KXbvdKitwOpSlZYf1vIgYKqYLZlkkjxdEZqfAJEotMDQujd5AniPDM_0ZTwBIKoFFQJRI9ZrTW68gpU60%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Democracy works best when everyone can participate
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57554905/388381510/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjBiMDA5MS1lODk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4DCfJ4daeUtU1UBK0G2Y7t8Xq65kXJXSMALSdynL8U=&emci=068bd0f1-9e96-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=160b0091-e898-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Since our state adopted vote-by-mail in 2000, Oregon has seen some of the highest voter participation rates in the country. And in the most recent election, it was the highest in the nation. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57554906/388381511/-2044921950?refcode=2023-01-20-vbm&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=160b0091-e898-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjBiMDA5MS1lODk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4DCfJ4daeUtU1UBK0G2Y7t8Xq65kXJXSMALSdynL8U=) Vote-by-mail is easy, accessible, cheaper, safer, and opens the doors to democracy for every single person wanting to make their voice heard. This is why, year after year, I've fought to expand Oregon-style vote-by-mail nationwide. Because every American deserves the right to vote the Oregon Way: from the comfort and safety of their own home. **Because I believe that Democracy works best when _everyone_ can participate. ** Nationwide vote-by-mail will not only allow more people to express their voices, but it will also increase accountability for our leaders. Plus, it creates an "unhackable" system to verify election outcomes. So, why do Republican legislators continue to resist vote-by-mail? Because they're scared of fair and free elections. They would rather rely on dirty methods – long lines, voter purges, disinformation, racist ID requirements – to keep voters away from the polls, especially people of color. As a result, it has become harder and harder for Americans to exercise their fundamental right to vote. **I believe in America's founding ideals: a democracy where everyone's voice is represented. And I want to make sure**** _your voice is heard_****.** I promise to continue the fight to make voting easier and more accessible to every eligible American. clean_body: | | | | Since our state adopted vote-by-mail in 2000, Oregon has seen some of the highest voter participation rates in the country. And in the most recent election, it was the highest in the nation. = Vote-by-mail is easy, accessible, cheaper, safer, and opens the doors to democracy for every single person wanting to make their voice heard. This is why, year after year, I've fought to expand Oregon-style vote-by-mail nationwide. Because every American deserves the right to vote the Oregon Way: from the comfort and safety of their own home. Because I believe that Democracy works best when everyone can participate. Nationwide vote-by-mail will not only allow more people to express their voices, but it will also increase accountability for our leaders. Plus, it creates an "unhackable" system to verify election outcomes. So, why do Republican legislators continue to resist vote-by-mail? Because they're scared of fair and free elections. They would rather rely on dirty methods – long lines, voter purges, disinformation, racist ID requirements – to keep voters away from the polls, especially people of color. As a result, it has become harder and harder for Americans to exercise their fundamental right to vote. I believe in America's founding ideals: a democracy where everyone's voice is represented. And I want to make sure your voice is heard. I promise to continue the fight to make voting easier and more accessible to every eligible American. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Ten years of work
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za725ev5ahodaqk2tnhaju7ckeint74r82po6og8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6ao72cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zubpj6pd3ee50r85tlis4fhduoeeeni1b627342o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6ao72cdh2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdn6gms23og81lkvlg4lb613nrsnd79k9bu3sas0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6ao72cdh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znk30rvl2gh1kmk1b1hiief46vjg4vpcu44b0vag_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6ao72cdh2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjamn437ad3eddbfk7cmnsntmq2m0j11qv49lukg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6ao72cdh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9jotupmcmitinooh3044q8ipai48ve9fubajvto_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6ao72cdh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf109a1tq3921mf1arnp2a791bomnjtshrj08fh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6ao72cdh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdl1cclonc0srk06dqkall19q68nmfqrd6au6eq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6ao72cdh2bs)
---

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57556780/388386238/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzY0NWQ2YS1lYzk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOUwMpDcn3va-DInfKWiKIctRIlUK1Fw0GglgcgEsI0=)
Hi there — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! If you have a minute or two today, I wanted to take a moment to tell you a little more about myself, why I ran for U.S. Senate, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important. When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents who raised me began to look for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. However, because of my previous illness, they couldn’t find such a policy. Not from _any_ insurer. Not at _any_ price. They had to pay for my healthcare out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child who had been labeled with those words:**“pre-existing condition.”** I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. **Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.** Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed that health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plans up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans launch a new attack on our healthcare or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. They’ve spent years playing politics with people’s lives. **And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.** I’ll never back down, folks, but we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us to protect this seat, so I’ll need your support every step of the way. [**Will you split a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and Michael Bennet? I’ll never stop fighting to ensure every American has access to quality, affordable healthcare — regardless of whether or not they have a pre-existing condition — and it’d mean a lot to me to have your support in that fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57556782/388386240/-358576059?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzY0NWQ2YS1lYzk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOUwMpDcn3va-DInfKWiKIctRIlUK1Fw0GglgcgEsI0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tammy Baldwin & Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57556784/388386242/-358576059?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzY0NWQ2YS1lYzk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOUwMpDcn3va-DInfKWiKIctRIlUK1Fw0GglgcgEsI0=)******

Thank you for reading, and thanks for your support today.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: How We Win
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsjs7mfu74jmrht3mhnsv69detsnjmj2ou91v7r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6eor6clh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl3g2nqgdsalbp6fp76f6tvrks1ldiffou064vl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6eor6clh2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdbf719qgnfrhd44se1a382ia4ift3aah1huncmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6eor6clh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj1av3k28vjiqeb6igo9v1j692mfs811j076rij8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6eor6clh2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z89bg3v0svmkom4i672dd5ii7r29jvnoik7trong_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6eor6clh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt728ig7ejtj8v37rp60o857beld5al19jjtped8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6eor6clh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhn288v15j2rglh8nh2j91eplef2ntktiodh9hq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6eor6clh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl6d3ohikbpp78v7q8hmkikrflr57ugnvt0qi68g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9j6eor6clh2bs)

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

How We Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will FIGHT for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. How We Win is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America... ... we're DOING IT! With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. | | For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Re: Climate change.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It’s urgent.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57558684/388391897/823540626?refcode=ea.4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTFkOTIwZC1mMjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvt_y1rOXC3a-_EIdiECTPk6W2J0y9fYl2HMFCyh8G4=&emci=a8ded6c1-de98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — North Carolinians deserve reliable, sustainable electricity at a reasonable cost. But because of increasingly severe weather and aging fossil fuel plants, that result could be less certain. As we saw during last month’s severe cold weather, more than half a million North Carolinians were left without power during the Christmas holidays. Families spent Christmas Eve without lights or heat because of equipment failures at five different fossil fuel plants. It’s unacceptable, and North Carolina is taking action to prevent future power failures. **We now have a plan to ensure more reliable and sustainable electricity by moving more quickly toward low-cost renewable energy.** **[Peter, I’ll explain in a moment. But first, will you sign this petition to support our plan to fight climate change and make North Carolina’s electricity more reliable and sustainable?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57558685/388391898/179941711?refcode=ea.4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTFkOTIwZC1mMjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvt_y1rOXC3a-_EIdiECTPk6W2J0y9fYl2HMFCyh8G4=&emci=a8ded6c1-de98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** The plan to transition from fossil fuel-generated electricity to more clean energy is a crucial step in the right direction. In October 2021, I signed a bipartisan law to set the first-ever carbon reduction goals for our state while working to keep costs low and reliability high. We’re also making sure our electric grid is prepared to handle our everyday power needs and is resilient enough to withstand future severe storms. My administration is planning investments in federal funding from the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and the Inflation Reduction Act to help North Carolina build a more modern, resilient energy grid delivering reliable, lower-cost, clean energy to our homes and businesses. And let’s not forget the great jobs the clean energy economy is already bringing to North Carolina. Not only did CNBC rank our state as the best in the country to do business, but so did Business Facilities magazine, which cited growth in our clean energy sector as a driving factor. Clean, reliable, and low-cost electricity is the backbone of our communities and a strong economy. **[Signing this petition is a step toward putting more money in the pockets of North Carolinians and fighting against climate change>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57558686/388391899/179941711?refcode=ea.4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTFkOTIwZC1mMjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvt_y1rOXC3a-_EIdiECTPk6W2J0y9fYl2HMFCyh8G4=&emci=a8ded6c1-de98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | ****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57558687/388391900/179941711?refcode=ea.4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTFkOTIwZC1mMjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvt_y1rOXC3a-_EIdiECTPk6W2J0y9fYl2HMFCyh8G4=&emci=a8ded6c1-de98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4a1d920d-f298-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)****
---
North Carolina has a history of forward-thinking innovation that has been the foundation of our success as a state. Let’s continue to deploy that tradition and tackle our 21st-century energy challenges together.
Thank you for joining me in support of such a critical investment in North Carolina’s future.

clean_body: It’s urgent. | Peter — North Carolinians deserve reliable, sustainable electricity at a reasonable cost. But because of increasingly severe weather and aging fossil fuel plants, that result could be less certain. As we saw during last month’s severe cold weather, more than half a million North Carolinians were left without power during the Christmas holidays. Families spent Christmas Eve without lights or heat because of equipment failures at five different fossil fuel plants. It’s unacceptable, and North Carolina is taking action to prevent future power failures. We now have a plan to ensure more reliable and sustainable electricity by moving more quickly toward low-cost renewable energy. The plan to transition from fossil fuel-generated electricity to more clean energy is a crucial step in the right direction. In October 2021, I signed a bipartisan law to set the first-ever carbon reduction goals for our state while working to keep costs low and reliability high. We’re also making sure our electric grid is prepared to handle our everyday power needs and is resilient enough to withstand future severe storms. My administration is planning investments in federal funding from the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and the Inflation Reduction Act to help North Carolina build a more modern, resilient energy grid delivering reliable, lower-cost, clean energy to our homes and businesses. And let’s not forget the great jobs the clean energy economy is already bringing to North Carolina. Not only did CNBC rank our state as the best in the country to do business, but so did Business Facilities magazine, which cited growth in our clean energy sector as a driving factor. Clean, reliable, and low-cost electricity is the backbone of our communities and a strong economy. | ** North Carolina has a history of forward-thinking innovation that has been the foundation of our success as a state. Let’s continue to deploy that tradition and tackle our 21st-century energy challenges together. Thank you for joining me in support of such a critical investment in North Carolina’s future. Roy = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18867?t=1001&akid=2908%2E346206%2EYQybGP ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230120-2908-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2908_346206_YQybGP&akid=2908%2E346206%2EYQybGP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2908%2E346206%2EYQybGP

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zulrnm4u95oj0q68bdmfl7j80bt230g8kgqvqs1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm0pj2cth2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zevoi357cb4qf1j3hdo96aq62rjjmhr5m94u18v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm0pj2cth2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr8gi6o0uf5lssdm3mr6i42pq3n67m0si5do06j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm0pj2cth2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi8o4k2ijqmdnto5batin1t6eouttha5bgs71rs0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm0pj2cth2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z267sb75mbiqo0mkr6j0tkmhh2canpib9ui72bi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm0pj2cth2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmj6l7tnelkj32ilj0h0bvnunlifvksaklfbdm38_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm0pj2cth2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrpbeviirqhplobvdfpbl0udgakguav0onv925p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm0pj2cth2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn85pre1218r1eb57ks091sa4g4ukdnuqm3ton78_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm0pj2cth2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsdmj3ljgn5bl5ujmetkji19snqqc7hbdgcb3148_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm0pj2cth2bs).
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zaviop5ji6dc6ep3il40sp39ed8ef5qkbrecccl8).

Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see . China admitted to knowing the COVID genetic sequence to develop a vaccine in __early January 2020._ __

_ Our tax dollars funded a Chinese Military Research Institute, where a coronavirus scientist **_developed a COVID vaccine_** _**_in February 2020_**_** _, well before COVID became a pandemic._****_

_**[_**> > HELP RAND UNCOVER THE TRUTH ABOUT COVID <<**_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c105f2c505&e=fdefed58de)**
** U.S. intelligence agencies refuse to name the “scientific experts” used to oversee China’s gain-of-function research.

One of the “scientific experts” taking part in these gain-of-function experiments brought NIH funding directly to the Wuhan Institute of Virology, where the COVID lab leak took place. **Friend, the intelligence community can try to cover up what REALLY took place throughout the COVID pandemic, but we’re not letting this go.** **_We’re going to uncover the truth because the_**** _millions_**** _of Americans who died during the pandemic deserve better._**[ _**I AGREE >>**_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0fc1df6801&e=fdefed58de) [_**Stand with Rand: Chip in to pull funding from the intel community for their COVID cover-up. >>**_](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=40ca162232&e=fdefed58de)

name: American Defense News
subject: Anti-Americanism in higher education
body:
But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life.

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk6i73pdnuga6n7k3tk0j16e1kehsp9rml0bfsu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm8oj4chh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life.
Today it asserts itself in many forms--including critical race theory--in our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the media, in sports, and even in our military.
The last gubernatorial election in Virginia brought the corruption of American K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our national conversation.
The breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed patriotism--without which self-government is impossible--is not something we can allow to continue.
While there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead.
**Education is where this attack on America began --and it is the battlefield on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government. **
Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale's mission, to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost.
That's why we are expanding our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions**.

You can support this vital project through this link: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/preserve-freedom-for-future-generations**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl5ht2rcjstff8juv3ic3pk255mdaersrndjhgqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm8oj4chh2bs)_
**The Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** will give informed patriots across the country the effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we need your help.
The** ** project has three key objectives:
1. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.

2. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," and "American Citizenship and Its Decline" with Victor Davis Hanson.

3. **Launch**** ** additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the new **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...
Hillsdale College** conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty**--as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
So, to expand this effective program, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25 **and **$100**. This is the range in which most supporters give. We will also need a significant number of **$500 **to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.
We urgently need your help.
**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: ** [**_https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/preserve-freedom-for-future-generations_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn941ifftc9c2bmli80t4v7q5ukme5o70ugbn1eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm8oj4chh2bs)
As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture, and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage them ever more aggressively--including on the central battlefield of education.
That's why I hope you'll make your most generous gift in this critical time for America.

Every dollar you can give will help expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions**.
Thank you for your generosity. I hope you'll stand with us. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life. | | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear fellow American, Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life. Today it asserts itself in many forms--including critical race theory--in our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the media, in sports, and even in our military. The last gubernatorial election in Virginia brought the corruption of American K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our national conversation. The breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed patriotism--without which self-government is impossible--is not something we can allow to continue. While there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead. Education is where this attack on America began --and it is the battlefield on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government. Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale's mission, to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost. That's why we are expanding our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. You can support this vital project through this link: The Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions will give informed patriots across the country the effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we need your help. The project has three key objectives: 1. Expand the circulation of Imprimis , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans. 2. Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," and "American Citizenship and Its Decline" with Victor Davis Hanson. 3. Launch additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the new Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers. And your generous support is critical to our success. Here's why... Now that Becca has a bigger platform, the internet trolls are coming out of the woodwork 🙄.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57560807/388399691/231998268?refcode=E20055-20230119-TrollsForward-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTdlMmRjYS1mODk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9kBKuCoi5cTGyOF5_J097XB2kX-QKD1NtY59QyFl-t0=)
