clean_body: I wanted to make sure you got the message: we’ve got a troll problem... | | Peter: In case you missed this email from my team last week, I wanted to make sure you got the message: we’ve got a troll problem... Since I took my oath of office, we’ve seen a huge surge of bot accounts and right wing antagonists targeting my social media pages. Now, while most of the time it’s best to ignore them (don’t feed the trolls!), these accounts have been spreading viscous misinformation about my record and what I plan to prioritize in Congress. If we don’t fight back, these trolls will dominate the narrative about me online. That’s why it’s critical that we get our digital operation back to full strength ASAP. A robust digital campaign was one of the keys to our success in last year’s midterms, but we left it all out on the field leading up to Election Day – and we need the help of our grassroots community to fund our digital operation from the ground up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you! Becca Balint \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Becca <beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com> Date: Thu, Jan 12, 2023 at 3:24 PM Subject: Here come the trolls 🙄 = Peter, Now that Becca has a bigger platform, the internet trolls are coming out of the woodwork 🙄. = Look, we know that these accounts are ridiculous, and only exist to tear down everything that Becca does. They aren’t worth a lot of our time or energy. But they do have the potential to reach hundreds of people online and spread misinformation about Becca, her track record, and her commitment to being an effective leader for Vermont. So here’s our plan: We will keep running a campaign focused on courage and kindness – but we will run a robust digital campaign operation to promote Becca’s priorities, fact-check the trolls, and counteract their negative content with facts, news, and updates on Becca’s achievements in Washington. Countering the increasing number of trolls Becca is facing this year will take some serious resources – and we’re counting on our grassroots team to help support our efforts.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With courage and kindness – we win. Thanks for your help, Team Becca Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, ** = If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P.O. Box 291, Burlington, VT, 05402

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: A historic March for Life
body:
The first march since Roe v. Wade was sent to the ash heap of history [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7883%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=fM5bFssbrELmOA92pXbSCw&sysid=1)

The first march since Roe v. Wade was sent to the ash heap of history
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92369%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5D2rtw5xamnlSFAMfBjFig&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
---
Today's March for Life will be unlike any other.
---
It will be the first march since _Roe v. Wade_ was sent to the ash heap of history and our country entered a new _Dobbs_ era.
---
But while we'll be marching with a spring in our step in celebration of this landmark pro-life victory, it's clear that our battle is not over...
---
**_...So long as it is still legal to kill an unborn baby in America, our fight must go on._**
---
That's why I've set an ambitious goal in honor of today's historic march to ensure we have every resource we need to fight back against the Big Abortion Lobby's latest attacks on the unborn.
---
[**Please make a contribution to SBA Pro-Life America's March for Life Goal to protect life in 2023.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92360%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WVz7IILdyXAfVOqoc%2fkVJA&sysid=1)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $35](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92361%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tKBVJcypdbBYJUT5W6wo8g&sysid=1)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92362%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w%2bTW8U%2feDIzD9gABmSkZcQ&sysid=1)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92363%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nPH9e9mHYhwaARWlIm0cVw&sysid=1)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92364%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t20pwXx1hTSvSytJWjPIvA&sysid=1)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92375%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B9ii6eKwww7cYwdEoLyv3g&sysid=1)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92376%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=64QSF5Ph9kzxNKSKBzPPKQ&sysid=1)
---

As we've witnessed, the Big Abortion Lobby has gone to extreme lengths to keep its death business fully running.
---
**Now, they've set their sights on expanding the market for dangerous chemical abortions.**
---
_Biden's FDA has already cleared the way for dangerous do-it-yourself abortion drugs to be distributed at retail pharmacies and even to be sent discreetly in the mail..._
---
Of course, the FDA is already misleading patients on chemical abortion.
---
Below is taken directly from the FDA's website:
---
**Is it safe to use mifepristone?**
Yes.
---
But the TRUTH is that chemical abortions are even more dangerous to the life of the mother than surgical abortions, with an increased risk of 53% for ER visits following a chemical abortion.
---
Multiple peer-reviewed studies as well as the research of SBA Pro-Life America's own education and research arm - the Charlotte Lozier Institute - have shown that the drugs can lead to severe side-effects including heavy bleeding, intense pain, and in some instances, _even death for the mother_.
---
**But of course, there's one life who is _guaranteed_ to die - the innocent unborn child in the mother's womb.**
---
_That child is who we are marching for today._
---
It's incredible to think that we're approaching what would have been the 50th Anniversary of the _Roe v. Wade_ decision.
---
But thanks to the fierce determination of our pro-life movement, this march will commemorate the beginning of our new _Dobbs_ era.
---
Friend, my heart breaks for the many veteran pro-life activists - who marched with us for years and years - but never got to live to see their hard work come to fruition through the historic _Dobbs_ decision.
---
But today, we will march with them in spirit - as we carry the torch and keep fighting until every unborn child's rights are recognized and restored in America.
---
[**Please make a contribution to SBA Pro-Life America's March for Life Goal to protect life in 2023.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92360%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WVz7IILdyXAfVOqoc%2fkVJA&sysid=1)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92369%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5D2rtw5xamnlSFAMfBjFig&sysid=1)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2b5b05b2234400dbff1ac70553a52e0&_e=gUuImfii_LEy90Tt_N1oM1KJmYDiFkJuFe1OllS4j0rqocmjbq5PDoH_syqFHeSf65r0tUQGFF4N-ZsOZiUxPwB07FTAM-z9wAmmoxNoRmdund2iZ5CdK_ZOa5lYM2Vd0a9dia9F1DbO0I4NW3HdWS4jWECZQd8kik5eUALW7m0ctd6Xb9XpI8kVc4b2REOQvj3a_tmyvRhVbyoBHc775CbCwE-IT6DgzSLj4wgsDyWZy6w3yrj5Qcm6E-p5bEaWalqnEHqMIuLyyeJ503Vis-I5pPBBfRvmLT1NjIMyVswBtpqXHaOph_BcIw96QmmmOSmCrA4KVDoFnqz6d5hQ0NiQlKQ0ll1w8e18tVtDjgYr20ekdeZb2uuJ9gyQzHwvqKUlI6jdwVc76OYtkxHjcg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2b5b05b2234400dbff1ac70553a52e0&_e=gUuImfii_LEy90Tt_N1oM1KJmYDiFkJuFe1OllS4j0rqocmjbq5PDoH_syqFHeSf65r0tUQGFF4N-ZsOZiUxPwB07FTAM-z9wAmmoxNoRmdund2iZ5CdK_ZOa5lYM2Vd0a9dia9F1DbO0I4NW3HdWS4jWECZQd8kik5eUALW7m0ctd6Xb9XpI8kVc4b2REOQvj3a_tmyvRhVbyoBHc775CbCwE-IT6DgzSLj4wgsDyWZy6w3yrj5Qcm6E-p5bEaWUibIuzjI9aQ92S3E-mqBVdDOXKBlTfTZjO4WCyHfT0sR5BJqr-MUjCk_UgMNprcYgpGKnjgDvTkzmzw-dNX91RkudLUsW4fCjMncx-aPCp_S0NmHyxiP-ZXXWR50rknxZjGOU5Dx2IbKvyegWtqlAA%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2b5b05b2234400dbff1ac70553a52e0&_e=gUuImfii_LEy90Tt_N1oM1KJmYDiFkJuFe1OllS4j0rqocmjbq5PDoH_syqFHeSf65r0tUQGFF4N-ZsOZiUxPwB07FTAM-z9wAmmoxNoRmdund2iZ5CdK_ZOa5lYM2Vd0a9dia9F1DbO0I4NW3HdWS4jWECZQd8kik5eUALW7m0ctd6Xb9XpI8kVc4b2REOQvj3a_tmyvRhVbyoBHc775CbCwE-IT6DgzSLj4wgsDyWZy6w3yrj5Qcm6E-p5bEaWlTcaZsz9EwuHfJsHxEvNWs-ZxoNEnCnt6oDwotI0k6bNK4lMlkrXQ_dTfCfkNkHS1fRy0HNxF9tCNoUAQCYSITZ0fRBdfTpDI8NhqKBameqz6wXsm3EL8u74kh73FMsZCAEU4b4YP7Np6y0jmBioZg%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?” | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Friend, Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?" It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans. To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, " The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism." | | In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions. You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Letitia James
subject: Will you join my focus group, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562476/388405781/265476937?code=jtk945-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzOTYxZi1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45Pt7tFgOSR925_yDTOPtBv9xL8mb_I-aYIA32jbQC8=)
---
**Peter, you were in the top 5% of my supporters during my campaign last year. That’s why I’ve selected you to participate in my exclusive 2023 focus group. **
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562477/388405782/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk945-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzOTYxZi1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45Pt7tFgOSR925_yDTOPtBv9xL8mb_I-aYIA32jbQC8=&emci=72e33b50-3a98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3103961f-fd98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
I’m counting on your response because when I made history and became New York’s attorney general, I vowed to _always_ let the people’s voice guide my work. As someone who grew up without a platform to speak out against the things that directly affected my neighborhood, I knew that I _never_ wanted to let another New Yorker feel as powerless as I once did.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. As one of my top supporters, you’re someone I can trust to speak honestly and openly about which fights to prioritize this year – **but it looks like you still haven’t accepted my invitation to participate in my focus group.**** **
| | **FOCUS GROUP RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
FOCUS GROUP PARTICIPATION ID: **PARTICIPATED IN FOCUS GROUP?: **NO DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.
---
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562478/388405783/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk945-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzOTYxZi1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45Pt7tFgOSR925_yDTOPtBv9xL8mb_I-aYIA32jbQC8=&emci=72e33b50-3a98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3103961f-fd98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
**This focus group is only open until midnight tonight, and I need another 549 fearless fighters to respond in order to reach statistical significance.****[_Please, will you participate in my focus group now so I know what’s most important to the people I represent? It’ll only take a moment of your time. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562479/388405784/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk945-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzOTYxZi1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45Pt7tFgOSR925_yDTOPtBv9xL8mb_I-aYIA32jbQC8=&emci=72e33b50-3a98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3103961f-fd98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Together, we made ___real_ progress in our fight for the voiceless and vulnerable in 2022 – but we can’t afford to let that momentum falter in 2023. Because this January, _millions_ of Americans have entered the year without the right to an abortion, _millions_ of parents have entered the year without confidence that their children will be safe at school, and _millions_ of LGBTQ+ individuals have entered the year fearing for their safety.

Peter, with the chambers of Congress now divided, federal action on reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun safety reforms will likely continue to be stalled – and it’s up to state attorneys general like me to continue the fight for justice and progress.

**But before I solidify my plans for the year ahead, I need to know what you think. Please: [_Will you accept my personal invitation to participate in my exclusive focus group? Click here to access your personalized link:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562480/388405785/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk945-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzOTYxZi1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45Pt7tFgOSR925_yDTOPtBv9xL8mb_I-aYIA32jbQC8=&emci=72e33b50-3a98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3103961f-fd98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562481/388405787/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk945-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzOTYxZi1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45Pt7tFgOSR925_yDTOPtBv9xL8mb_I-aYIA32jbQC8=&emci=72e33b50-3a98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3103961f-fd98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard.

Letitia

name: Great America Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7543%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=j9Ef058C44Rs2uKoEY34Nw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78642%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bsm4arcscaQY9NMJztWLIA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78643%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BTRmvUnJvAAzRs1uhqQPXQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78643%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BTRmvUnJvAAzRs1uhqQPXQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7543%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=j9Ef058C44Rs2uKoEY34Nw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7543%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=j9Ef058C44Rs2uKoEY34Nw&sysid=1)

body:
The bottom line is we are building a better America, and that’s thanks to folks like you. | |
---
Two years ago today, Kamala and I were sworn into office on the steps of the United States Capitol. And since I took my oath on those steps, we’ve made remarkable progress. Because of the support of this grassroots team, we nominated and confirmed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to the Supreme Court, passed historic legislation to combat climate change, and brought the unemployment rate to its lowest in 50 years. We’ve lowered costs for families, worked to rebuild the middle class, and passed the first significant gun safety law in nearly 30 years. _And I’m barely scratching the surface here._ **I often say that there’s not a thing we can’t do if we do it together, and I really mean it, Derek. We are building a better America because of folks like you who support our party and our work.** **[But there’s still more we need to do together. That is why I am coming to you directly. Will you show you’re committed to delivering for families across the country by making a $7 donation to the DNC?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wACnsPEIiRS7LuVBOIrplrAHg97kztwb4FNDbT87ndBwi5AAkPH5VD71HYHg2eYv4WsqYkxwQV-vqkPrQc4arNLkVFBeRYxJnNuGj2P7odvITk-y9yfxq3ccKtah4tC79PuwjnlPHWUyPBEoGJuQwiQW2gmUSv5AMgpfamMuwr_atRxeKbRXu3k-vKrGgkjj2XGI8YKZsIilWqu6V91dILpliBjm_3YPBNyFkP6Z4dHnCvsIDf7UnIwFZv0w7EhbISkCnifY2_grZhOkM943vzU2jmrgZnyPZ6lAxmn8grWs5fC5xrBJYHhCwwSMkxjpmRNKp4aHgTQMsEGMUUhM3jEFscnWOw3o-h4N5POGsVa5WlElLPzFjmtRzg7R02ROxPk0orldcAEx6OSe07n86gRFoMMSPf18RAAA_K8ee38EQeBQphmP8iHlwtSbf6qcSV1L2AQtlKydPmbhOcMH8DTu1Vu1a4AvxHmewr-3VymUHD87K2tIobTMO-l0NLYlNyPQh1MwbWj3D3dqVidQS7DDYCLiDbnEybER3rhQnPp7OfM3IBirH23GUsBuzGI8o/3t0/i-VL1oWhTSeFnxAI0kieOg/h0/kZH0S099SUHIzSqEbZs3RgURtJTJK6ELgEZJP07LtIY)**

clean_body: The bottom line is we are building a better America, and that’s thanks to folks like you. | | Two years ago today, Kamala and I were sworn into office on the steps of the United States Capitol. And since I took my oath on those steps, we’ve made remarkable progress. Because of the support of this grassroots team, we nominated and confirmed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to the Supreme Court, passed historic legislation to combat climate change, and brought the unemployment rate to its lowest in 50 years. We’ve lowered costs for families, worked to rebuild the middle class, and passed the first significant gun safety law in nearly 30 years. And I’m barely scratching the surface here. I often say that there’s not a thing we can’t do if we do it together, and I really mean it, Derek. We are building a better America because of folks like you who support our party and our work. ** We’ve accomplished so much already. Now we have to keep making the case about who we are as Democrats, what we stand for, and what we will do to help folks in their everyday lives. We’re going to need you -- to organize, talk to folks, and build up the DNC and our party so we can elect more Democrats up and down the ballot. I need you to continue fighting alongside Kamala and me to build a better America. Keep the faith, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: The Giffords Team
subject: [GOOD NEWS] This week’s gun safety victory
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The ATF’s decision to regulate stabilizing braces will save lives
#

Friends -
This past week, we gained another victory for the gun safety movement—a victory we helped achieve together.
The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) published a rule that clarifies pistols with stabilizing braces are short-barreled rifles and therefore strictly regulated.
Stabilizing arm braces make already deadly weapons even more dangerous. They are an attachment that can be added to a firearm to make it easier to use with one hand, and they can be easily concealed while firing with rifle-like accuracy and firepower.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230120-1-15-p&t=27&akid=4066%2E3935704%2EMJxnYf)
We saw how lethal stabilizing braces can be when they were used to modify the guns utilized in both the 2021 shooting at a Boulder, Colorado grocery store and outside a bar in Dayton, Ohio in 2019.
Short-barreled rifles are regulated by the National Firearms Act, and so with this new ATF ruling, modified firearms with braces can now be regulated as well. This is a significant step forward that will save countless lives.
We’re proud to have been a part of the effort to close this loophole in our country’s gun laws. We led a public campaign to regulate stabilizing braces, and thanks to you, we drove thousands of public comments to the ATF. Our persistence pushed the ATF to make this lifesaving change.
Although this victory is an important step towards safer communities, we still have much more work to do.

clean_body: The ATF’s decision to regulate stabilizing braces will save lives Friends - This past week, we gained another victory for the gun safety movement—a victory we helped achieve together. The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) published a rule that clarifies pistols with stabilizing braces are short-barreled rifles and therefore strictly regulated. Stabilizing arm braces make already deadly weapons even more dangerous. They are an attachment that can be added to a firearm to make it easier to use with one hand, and they can be easily concealed while firing with rifle-like accuracy and firepower. We saw how lethal stabilizing braces can be when they were used to modify the guns utilized in both the 2021 shooting at a Boulder, Colorado grocery store and outside a bar in Dayton, Ohio in 2019. Short-barreled rifles are regulated by the National Firearms Act, and so with this new ATF ruling, modified firearms with braces can now be regulated as well. This is a significant step forward that will save countless lives. We’re proud to have been a part of the effort to close this loophole in our country’s gun laws. We led a public campaign to regulate stabilizing braces, and thanks to you, we drove thousands of public comments to the ATF. Our persistence pushed the ATF to make this lifesaving change. Although this victory is an important step towards safer communities, we still have much more work to do. Your support is crucial in the fight to end gun violence. \- The team at Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The last remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Ohio is already shaping up to be a must-win battleground.
#
I’m up for re-election in 2024, Peter, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. _(There’s already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me.)_
NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than this year’s Senate race in Ohio -- and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.
**[Peter, it’s going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Patty’s as we begin the new year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562721/388407646/1999012498?refcode=pm_em_230120_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTg1YTdhYy1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yi00jeg0HGoteIYmBp8UasSH1RoKV1lO58jDZT6cjsU=)**
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.
I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago -- a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.
Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.
That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about, Peter. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do -- whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips -- your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.
**[I need you in this fight, too, Peter. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in our average online contribution of $26 -- or whatever amount makes the most sense for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562722/388407647/1999012498?refcode=pm_em_230120_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTg1YTdhYy1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yi00jeg0HGoteIYmBp8UasSH1RoKV1lO58jDZT6cjsU=)**
With gratitude,
Sherrod

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562723/388407648/1999012498?refcode=pm_em_230120_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTg1YTdhYy1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yi00jeg0HGoteIYmBp8UasSH1RoKV1lO58jDZT6cjsU=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

name: Carlie Kotyza-Witthuhn
subject: We passed the PRO Act!
body:
Friend,
I am overjoyed that the House DFLers were able to pass the PRO Act, codifying reproductive freedom into state law. This is a relief for so many Minnesotans who have been fearful of their rights being taken away ever since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last June. It was an honor to author such a monumental bill. I am grateful to have your support, friend, so we are able to protect the fundamental rights of all Minnesotans.
When writing the PRO Act, I put Minnesotans and their families at the forefront of the legislation. House DFLers are working hard to make sure all Minnesotans have fair and accessible reproductive rights, and that those rights are protected. Codifying abortion into our state law is a huge step in the right direction, and we couldn’t have done it without you.
I, along with the other DFL members of the House, are committed to getting things done for you this legislative session. Thank you for all your support.
Carlie Kotyza-Witthuhn
Representative
Minnesota House of Representatives
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?refcode=012023]

clean_body: | | | Democrats have tried to push their woke ideology into Mississippi for years, YET we remain a conservative stronghold. This election for Governor is no different. Democrat Brandon Presley is pulling plays out of the liberal playbook to get ahold of our state. Let’s look at a few: He is turning Republican politicians and voters against each other with baseless lies and accusations. He is disguising himself as moderate but has a track record of far Left and woke policies. Brandon claims he cares about small town Mississippians but takes high dollar donations from big corporations and big tech companies. But I am hoping for this ploy of his to not work here in Mississippi. I am here to keepCONSERVATIVE** values in Mississippi! | | Thank you, Tate Reeves | | Paid for by Tate for Governor | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Tate for Governor P.O. | | Peter, this isn’t an exaggeration – a Georgia Republican in the House of Representatives was just caught on tape saying **_he wants to cut Social Security and raise the retirement age._**

[**_We can’t let this become a reality. Will you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever it takes to keep Georgia blue in 2024?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57547696/388354112/710125701?refcode=20230120.1_GADems_1T&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY2N2Y2My1kNzk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QNj035t1Vq729qEtccsLTbYtKZgjT2rouAG559DeLmA=)

If Donald Trump or Ron DeSantis win, this will be one of the first bills they sign. They’re coming for Social Security just like they came for Medicaid, the Affordable Care Act, and abortion rights.

We can’t let them win.

Georgia is our best chance at stopping the GOP from retaking the White House and enacting their extreme goals. [**_Will you donate right now to help stop them in their tracks?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57547697/388354113/710125701?refcode=20230120.1_GADems_1T&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY2N2Y2My1kNzk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QNj035t1Vq729qEtccsLTbYtKZgjT2rouAG559DeLmA=)_

Friend,
Under no circumstances should Republicans vote to cut a single penny from Medicare or Social Security to help pay for Joe Biden’s reckless spending spree.

While we absolutely need to stop Biden’s out-of-control spending, the pain should be borne by Washington bureaucrats, _**not by hardworking American families and American seniors.**_
_We must cut the hundreds of billions of taxpayer dollars going to corrupt foreign countries._

**We must cut the mass releases of illegal aliens that are depleting our social safety net and destroying our Country.**

_We must cut the Left-wing gender programs from our military._

**We must cut the billions being spent on climate extremism.**

_We must cut waste, fraud, and abuse everywhere that we can find it, and there’s plenty of it._
But DO NOT CUT the benefits our seniors worked for and paid for their entire lives. Save Social Security, don’t destroy it. The Democrats are looking to destroy Social Security. We’re not going to let them do it.

As always, thank you for your support.

| It's not talked about enough just how dangerous the Mexican drug cartels are. These are not little, unorganized gangs. The cartels are militant, well-equipped, and highly trained organizations that are more like ISIS than they are the mob. The cartels are at war with us and the Mexican government and they're killing American citizens by trafficking fentanyl into our country. They have complete control over our southern border and are the largest profiteers of the border crisis.
I recently introduced an AUMF (authorization for use of military force) with several of my colleagues in Congress against the cartels. This is only one of the many ways that we can deal with this threat, but we need bipartisan support. We also need the administration to use this authorization as leverage over the Mexican government, which so far has been unwilling or incapable of addressing this threat that poses a national security risk to both Mexico and America.
I'm also continuing to call for the impeachment of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas, whose deliberate dereliction of duty has emboldened these cartels and endangered America's safety, sovereignty, and rule of law.

| The left is engaging in serious hypocrisy in their defense of Joe Biden's mishandling of classified documents.
Here's what we know:
Classified documents were discovered in early November at the Penn Biden Center in Washington, D.C. (which, by the way, is described as a target of foreign influence peddling by our adversaries like the Chinese Communist Party) - yet the American people were kept in the dark about this for two months. It's no surprise that the White House wanted to keep this a secret until after the midterm elections on November 8.
Then, in late December, Joe Biden's own attorneys just "randomly" decided to inspect Joe Biden's garage in Wilmington, Delaware and found another batch of classified documents. Finally, in January, the White House Counsel's Office admitted to the public that they found classified materials in November. Did they do this in the name of "transparency?" No, of course not. | The hero of the radical environmentalists, Greta Thunberg, staged a fake arrest this week during an anti-coal protest in Germany. It was a publicity stunt, obviously, but it represents a warning that I talk about repeatedly when it comes to energy policy: Do not follow the lead of European countries, especially Germany, when it comes to reducing emissions. Let me explain.
Germany has spent hundreds of billions of dollars (whether through direct subsidies or artificial price caps) to prop up unreliable renewable energy sources like solar and wind. Predictably, Germany is now facing severe energy shortages and they're having to shift away from unreliable renewables to... coal and even wood burning. Sounds good for the environment, right?
Unfortunately, Germany left themselves with little options after destroying their own energy portfolio and causing average household prices to skyrocket by 3X, with some of the most expensive electricity bills in the world. Germany has closed nuclear plants over the years and taken natural gas offline, even effectively stopping any new exploration for natural gas. They decided instead to pursue solar and wind at the demand of the environmental left, and as a result became reliant on natural gas from Russia to make up for the unsurprising disappointment in the energy produced from solar and wind.
And, also unsurprisingly, Germany's emissions haven't reduced much at all. All cost, zero benefit. Remember, just because a policy feels good does not mean it will do good. Let's not repeat the mistakes of Germany and other European countries who want to ignore fundamental truths about energy delivery and instead listen to the shrieks from the radical environmentalists like Greta.

| You're going to hear a lot of hyperventilating from the left over the upcoming debt ceiling debate. Put simply, the debt ceiling is the maximum amount of money that the American government can borrow. When we reach the debt ceiling, Congress usually raises it to avoid defaulting on our debt.
Obviously, the Biden Administration and Congressional Democrats have been flagrantly irresponsible when it comes to fiscal restraint. As expected, the White House is demanding that Congress raise the debt ceiling without action to rein in out of control spending. That would be like a teenager demanding their parents raise their credit card limit without any action to prove they can responsibly manage their money.
Now that Republicans took control of the House, we're going to create a budget that outlines our priorities to cut wasteful spending. It will be very clear to the White House what a Republican majority is willing to accept when it comes to government spending and it will be very clear to them what we are demanding in return for raising the debt ceiling. Remember, Congress holds the purse strings when it comes to spending taxpayer dollars, not the White House. The White House will express fake outrage and claim Republicans are holding the American people hostage in order to rip away government services, but of course that is hyperbolic rhetoric that is divorced from reality.
The reality is that the White House, Congressional Republicans, and Congressional Democrats are going to have to come to the table and negotiate this. Discretionary spending has been increasing over the last few years at double the rate of inflation, especially under Joe Biden, and that's not even counting other bills like the so-called "Inflation Reduction Act" and the unnecessary COVID spending bill, which was almost $2 trillion, and the infrastructure plan which was over a trillion dollars. A lot of this money - your money... taxpayer dollars - has flooded through these government agencies with a rubber stamp from Joe Biden and Democrat leaders in Congress.
All Republicans are asking for is a commonsense approach to cut spending to start getting our fiscal house in order. The national debt is a serious threat to the stability of our country on multiple fronts. It's time for Democrats to wake up to that fact and come to the table.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week I continued to call for more forceful action against the drug cartels that are poisoning Americans with fentanyl and threatening our national security. I also called out the hypocrisy in the aftermath of Joe Biden's mishandling of classified documents, exposed the fallacies of the radical environmentalists' arguments on climate change, and outlined the negotiations over the debt ceiling. As always, thank you for your support. Here's your brief: | | | | | | | | THIS IS HOW WE FIGHT THE CARTELS | | | == | == | | | It's not talked about enough just how dangerous the Mexican drug cartels are. These are not little, unorganized gangs. The cartels are militant, well-equipped, and highly trained organizations that are more like ISIS than they are the mob. The cartels are at war with us and the Mexican government and they're killing American citizens by trafficking fentanyl into our country. They have complete control over our southern border and are the largest profiteers of the border crisis. I recently introduced an AUMF (authorization for use of military force) with several of my colleagues in Congress against the cartels. This is only one of the many ways that we can deal with this threat, but we need bipartisan support. We also need the administration to use this authorization as leverage over the Mexican government, which so far has been unwilling or incapable of addressing this threat that poses a national security risk to both Mexico and America. I'm also continuing to call for the impeachment of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas, whose deliberate dereliction of duty has emboldened these cartels and endangered America's safety, sovereignty, and rule of law. == | | | | | | | | "TRANSPARENCY" | | | == | == | | | The left is engaging in serious hypocrisy in their defense of Joe Biden's mishandling of classified documents. Here's what we know: Classified documents were discovered in early November at the Penn Biden Center in Washington, D.C. (which, by the way, is described as a target of foreign influence peddling by our adversaries like the Chinese Communist Party) - yet the American people were kept in the dark about this for two months. It's no surprise that the White House wanted to keep this a secret until after the midterm elections on November 8. Then, in late December, Joe Biden's own attorneys just "randomly" decided to inspect Joe Biden's garage in Wilmington, Delaware and found another batch of classified documents. Finally, in January, the White House Counsel's Office admitted to the public that they found classified materials in November. Did they do this in the name of "transparency?" No, of course not. They only did so because news organizations began to report on it. And since then, the White House admitted that more classified documents were found at Biden's home in Wilmington than they originally disclosed. This was after the White House Press Secretary stood at the White House podium and promised us that the search was "complete." This is next-level hypocrisy, even for the left. Remember, Joe Biden felt the need to go on national television and slam Trump's handling of classified documents as "irresponsible." The FBI ransacked Trump's home and Democrats in Congress and their allies in the media acted like this was the largest threat to our national security. But now that the standard bearer of their party, Joe Biden, did the exact same thing? Nothing but equivocation, political spin, and downplaying the severity of storing classified documents in Biden's garage. The left created the rules of the game when they reacted to Trump's handling of classified documents with such outrage. Those are the rules we are going to play by now, even though it doesn't suit the left's narrative anymore. == | | | | | | | | GRETA'S "ARREST" EXPOSES THE RADICAL ENVIRONMENTALISTS... AGAIN | == | == | The hero of the radical environmentalists, Greta Thunberg, staged a fake arrest this week during an anti-coal protest in Germany. It was a publicity stunt, obviously, but it represents a warning that I talk about repeatedly when it comes to energy policy: Do not follow the lead of European countries, especially Germany, when it comes to reducing emissions. Let me explain. Germany has spent hundreds of billions of dollars (whether through direct subsidies or artificial price caps) to prop up unreliable renewable energy sources like solar and wind. Predictably, Germany is now facing severe energy shortages and they're having to shift away from unreliable renewables to... coal and even wood burning. Sounds good for the environment, right? Unfortunately, Germany left themselves with little options after destroying their own energy portfolio and causing average household prices to skyrocket by 3X, with some of the most expensive electricity bills in the world. Germany has closed nuclear plants over the years and taken natural gas offline, even effectively stopping any new exploration for natural gas. They decided instead to pursue solar and wind at the demand of the environmental left, and as a result became reliant on natural gas from Russia to make up for the unsurprising disappointment in the energy produced from solar and wind. And, also unsurprisingly, Germany's emissions haven't reduced much at all. All cost, zero benefit. Remember, just because a policy feels good does not mean it will do good. Let's not repeat the mistakes of Germany and other European countries who want to ignore fundamental truths about energy delivery and instead listen to the shrieks from the radical environmentalists like Greta. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | GET READY FOR THE DEBT CEILING DEBATE | == | == | You're going to hear a lot of hyperventilating from the left over the upcoming debt ceiling debate. Put simply, the debt ceiling is the maximum amount of money that the American government can borrow. When we reach the debt ceiling, Congress usually raises it to avoid defaulting on our debt. Obviously, the Biden Administration and Congressional Democrats have been flagrantly irresponsible when it comes to fiscal restraint. As expected, the White House is demanding that Congress raise the debt ceiling without action to rein in out of control spending. That would be like a teenager demanding their parents raise their credit card limit without any action to prove they can responsibly manage their money. Now that Republicans took control of the House, we're going to create a budget that outlines our priorities to cut wasteful spending. It will be very clear to the White House what a Republican majority is willing to accept when it comes to government spending and it will be very clear to them what we are demanding in return for raising the debt ceiling. Remember, Congress holds the purse strings when it comes to spending taxpayer dollars, not the White House. The White House will express fake outrage and claim Republicans are holding the American people hostage in order to rip away government services, but of course that is hyperbolic rhetoric that is divorced from reality. The reality is that the White House, Congressional Republicans, and Congressional Democrats are going to have to come to the table and negotiate this. Discretionary spending has been increasing over the last few years at double the rate of inflation, especially under Joe Biden, and that's not even counting other bills like the so-called "Inflation Reduction Act" and the unnecessary COVID spending bill, which was almost $2 trillion, and the infrastructure plan which was over a trillion dollars. A lot of this money - your money... taxpayer dollars - has flooded through these government agencies with a rubber stamp from Joe Biden and Democrat leaders in Congress. All Republicans are asking for is a commonsense approach to cut spending to start getting our fiscal house in order. The national debt is a serious threat to the stability of our country on multiple fronts. It's time for Democrats to wake up to that fact and come to the table. | | | | | | | | QUOTE OF THE WEEK | | "The political left's attempts to silence ideas they cannot, or will not, debate are a confession of intellectual bankruptcy." -Thomas Sowell | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | == | | | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS WSJ: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == DAILY WIRE: == THE HUGH HEWITT SHOW: == WSJ: == | | | That's it for this week's campaign brief. If you like my message and want to help me grow our conservative movement, ==. I can't do it without your support. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

body:
Troy wants to hear what you think. Take one minute to fill out the poll >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/83c25addd93819a7/27a594a1a5a9c579c3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
Several states and the U.S. Senate have prohibited the use of the Communist-China _TikTok_ app on state devices due to legitimate concerns of data mining. TikTok gives the Chinese Communist Party the ability to track our location, track what websites we visit even when we’re not using the app itself, and what news we see on the app. It’s no secret just how much our government loves to collude with big tech... **Do you think TikTok should be banned
to safeguard American taxpayers?**
---
| | [**YES!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/83c25addd93819a7/98433b895c88edc4c3d6b838967d376c/35193)

Team -- A major poll by AARP shows that Americans almost **_universally_** support Social Security!

**But despite its widespread popularity, key Republican senators have hatched a plan to GUT Social Security behind closed doors.**

Millions of Americans depend on the Social Security benefits **_they earned_** through decades of hard work -- so we've launched an urgent LIVE POLL to confirm the AARP’s numbers. **We still need 11 responses from 18326 -- tell us where you stand before the poll expires at MIDNIGHT:**

**Do you support Social Security?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/11606?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230120-UrgentAlert-AARPSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230120-UrgentAlert-AARPSocialSecurityRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9465%2E9716520%2EgIaF2t)

body:
Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda

---
Friend, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdj8ra7tvh2mi8s3uuh0ah78smqrd632onf59u60_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm6or0clh2bs)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just one dollar!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2lade7cbulvf7il9k5gv2qv1e26gc6keb4qdeq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm6or0clh2bs)

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7895%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=YCJEflFNNGFip1ookZtUTw&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92381%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cPN9tfv4ZDuC74mtdCJrwg&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92380%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C4wXWwxTxswXPTRTrC3Pyw&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92382%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aztOQvUBbDqEi2ZRGoaMyQ&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92380%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C4wXWwxTxswXPTRTrC3Pyw&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92383%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xv24hhZ7OYh5NVP0kQPG4w&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92384%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ot%2bG0a2rWEcQuNCuKozFuQ&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92395%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QJzjWzzah3XSLkdqkUNpPw&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: How We Win
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhks62iphemb7s0qcg92ou77e32fflo5c5uvd57g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1ob4cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztenhetvtisut7h66m62jeig5kdtg1jhu37h573o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1ob4cph2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk4gooot63sdq1nv56s418hue54lqhcic6htag28_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1ob4cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmbvlfneecqjgsjne865q2vjbnai00hpp7t9ara8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1ob4cph2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlgfl5pi3gmdf84fk90d4eqjjgk3j3vbvefn4180_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1ob4cph2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu57i1gfm5amggim6msavf0ql42o3eoa7pvf7it0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1ob4cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z56ecn994p5390ue50r2s4cujfck3g3dpor8752g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1ob4cph2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp7luo3moq36nh0o64h6d5a68gr6ah7r0ivpvtag_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1ob4cph2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmfs4r3icqouek7bp2ge775a3m64d42qcoe8eub0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1ob4cph2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Team, In case you missed it, Yvette Herrell teased a 2024 run for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District again on a far-right news outlet: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57549392/388360444/1850399781?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230120mm2_tv_od60ds_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmI2MjJjMi1kYjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jwNx7JYGJp-NvxiTInCzx4fyoxisoapav4GOtmuHk_U=)

_“All options are on the table and I will definitely be staying in the fight and next year we’ll definitely be making some announcements for sure.”_
**We already know that Herrell has filed to run against Gabe in 2024, so we have to start preparing for a rematch — especially since Gabe won by a slim 0.68% margin.**
While Gabe is already hard at work in Congress introducing legislation and opposing the far-right’s attempts to roll back reproductive rights and gut Social Security and Medicare, Herrell is plotting a comeback so she can work to move New Mexico backwards again. We can’t let that happen.
**[Our first 2023 fundraising deadline is approaching in less than two weeks: can you rush $10 or whatever you can afford today to refuel our movement and support Gabe in a rematch against this far-right extremist?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57549400/388360448/1850399781?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230120mm2_tv_od60ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmI2MjJjMi1kYjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jwNx7JYGJp-NvxiTInCzx4fyoxisoapav4GOtmuHk_U=)**

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjtdjqs2lv4noot67kab995s57qqrhbp9vk14te0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1oj0s5h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqn35jpfn4mjd23o7c7n7217jtfislo2rtr3t7hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1oj0s5h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbh42inc0f422c63ocncb3don28gic1i66rco218_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1oj0s5h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1iu36dd6la7kjff5h9f1887j3un4de227v80bj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1oj0s5h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsd4bfcmj21qceeja0khvmkh4k4oc17kdtlf59mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1oj0s5h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zum06tb6is5t6rlcs77f9fa2gfeqhlb803ro1pp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1oj0s5h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp8f5heqdn86rhbn45ufmd0tjn47r5rjao3gshko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1oj0s5h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z03vrufbsrjja6uvsakj8vr3uvduo8d5ekj28nko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9gm1oj0s5h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

body:
We’re asking for your support.

|
---
Derek, Here’s what the 2023 political landscape looks like in Virginia: The GOP holds the governorship, the Lt. governorship, and the Attorney General’s office, and holds a majority in the House of Delegates. Democrats hold the Senate of Virginia, **the ONLY check on Glenn Youngkin’s GOP and the ONLY reason women can still get reproductive healthcare in Virginia.** This November, all 100 seats in the House of Delegates and all 40 seats in the Virginia Senate are on the ballot. This is our opportunity to protect our progress and take back control of the General Assembly. **Together, we can make Glenn Youngkin’s last two years as governor toothless and ineffective. [CHIP IN NOW!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57565216/388415481/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230120-landscape&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmU4MWMzMC0wNjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOyoqhcAQd6tBmmAWhPtDYqTQRPmqUPesN3-WlXg_jU=)** If the Youngkin administration gets a rubber stamp House and Senate, he could do irreparable damage to our Commonwealth. **That’s why we’re asking for your support.[Can you join our grassroots team of donors to help us defend our Commonwealth from Republican overreach and failed policies?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57565217/388415482/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230120-landscape&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmU4MWMzMC0wNjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOyoqhcAQd6tBmmAWhPtDYqTQRPmqUPesN3-WlXg_jU=)** Virginia Democrats | [****************************](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57565218/388415483/-500518466?refcode=dpva-em-230120-landscape&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmU4MWMzMC0wNjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOyoqhcAQd6tBmmAWhPtDYqTQRPmqUPesN3-WlXg_jU=)**********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57565219/388415484/-500518466?amount=10&refcode=dpva-em-230120-landscape&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmU4MWMzMC0wNjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOyoqhcAQd6tBmmAWhPtDYqTQRPmqUPesN3-WlXg_jU=)**********

This is our opportunity to protect our progress and take back control of the General Assembly. Together, we can make Glenn Youngkin’s last two years as governor toothless and ineffective. = If the Youngkin administration gets a rubber stamp House and Senate, he could do irreparable damage to our Commonwealth. That’s why we’re asking for your support.= Virginia Democrats | =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: Let us explain the stakes in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire:
body:
Every vote, every donation, and every second of our hard work that was put towards our historic wins could go to waste if Republicans take back any of these seats. | | |
---
| | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PI0wzYsKQ2vEhG6zcnbq3msuVos1aXLqONcoMRcuv8oiu0t8WjnX8qPsx9fIivRRnYj2R7tUArEEtbRc8SLQXXMe3QUQnpx99g--UNZin3-NI-PSOlQ3tsbSMmb1q5gCMtRvsE5KibgFmUJqpVeie-sCNkr3y1WTySHdRFwJXC00tLVHvJIxMUq_jKSED9jzVEMk6B2wxdcsv8qC6ZdBqn-Vq16LinufdMV9ebFx6Br54kywbRrGjSV8DMiKHp-CQljaKik46pZwSJHG_sGuUAYL58psKtMWQwF9XJ-n4MLmXBnM7PHCv3x-NFjnrHmYBFXufGDa7WRWASaofYmE9ZCAihECi5evyIuxTgUur60nh7dZ0FiGxPwtn9ddoFTHvVkTLa_rwbLLooKYXat8Fx4rqfhXG-GHNturjUx_MJc98nFl_KoSk2vk0cTvbKZR6X8pMoiFZlSck6YSf3tjr7x1yUQDPTIdaKza_EOm4tJGYA-YVHkxj6dBPuCzeLxY5tJzu6Ua7vJWXTRjPxZOgrs/3t0/vBp56CzrSI6h_kz6VPwIVg/h0/6bvKnCfa9Lo5a7hjH1vl1pR887Gdgms1YQtropcEjro) We’re less than a month away from five special elections happening in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire that are strong opportunities for Democrats to win BIG. **But it won’t be easy – here’s what we’re up against:** ➝ In Pennsylvania, House Democrats narrowly flipped the chamber in November’s midterms, but now there are _three_ special elections happening on February 7 that could determine control of the chamber.**All three seats are critical for a Democratic majority.** ➝ And in New Hampshire, this race is a toss-up leaning in favor of Democrats – where we're just _four seats away from a majority._ **If we can secure this win, it will help us lay the groundwork to potentially FLIP this chamber.** Republicans currently control 28 state legislatures, and flipping legislatures one seat at a time takes constant, unrelenting support from grassroots supporters like you. Special elections like these are how we change the game, so these races are critical for state Democrats. In Pennsylvania, the GOP is gearing up to push constitutional amendments banning abortion and a voter ID requirement if they win these special elections – so whether we can come together to build strong enough campaigns for these candidates to win will have real consequences. [Voting in these elections will start soon and campaigning is already in full swing. clean_body: Every vote, every donation, and every second of our hard work that was put towards our historic wins could go to waste if Republicans take back any of these seats. | | | | | We’re less than a month away from five special elections happening in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire that are strong opportunities for Democrats to win BIG. But it won’t be easy – here’s what we’re up against: ➝ In Pennsylvania, House Democrats narrowly flipped the chamber in November’s midterms, but now there are three special elections happening on February 7 that could determine control of the chamber.All three seats are critical for a Democratic majority. ➝ And in New Hampshire, this race is a toss-up leaning in favor of Democrats – where we're just four seats away from a majority. If we can secure this win, it will help us lay the groundwork to potentially FLIP this chamber. Republicans currently control 28 state legislatures, and flipping legislatures one seat at a time takes constant, unrelenting support from grassroots supporters like you. Special elections like these are how we change the game, so these races are critical for state Democrats. In Pennsylvania, the GOP is gearing up to push constitutional amendments banning abortion and a voter ID requirement if they win these special elections – so whether we can come together to build strong enough campaigns for these candidates to win will have real consequences. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | It’s so simple: We need leaders who are ready to step up with real solutions, which is why we work so hard every day to elect Democrats. Special elections are a great opportunity to do that and build power during an odd-numbered year, so we need to be laser-focused. Plus, special elections like these have a notoriously low turnout – so every dollar, touchpoint, and vote we can get right now really counts. Thanks for all you do – we're so glad to have you in this fight.
