name: NDRC News
subject: Did you see A.G. Holder on Jeopardy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
“As Obama's A.G., he took on the issue of trying terrorists in civilian rather than military court; today he fights gerrymandering.”
|
---

Team, if you were watching Jeopardy last week, you might have seen this: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57551099/388367308/-218668516?refcode=20230120.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwMTgyYWM2LWRmOTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aJXNVdkoM7Y41pGYkkPf4_DaXeIUJ2ZsBp1Az-9H9Nw=&emci=f837a546-2c98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=70182ac6-df98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)

**ANSWER:
Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr. founder of the NDRC!**
We were _so excited_ to see A.G. Holder featured – and we thought it would be fun to test our supporters’ knowledge with a few questions of our own!

**So, this...is... _Gerrymandering Jeopardy_.

Check out the first clue below, then click to take the quiz:**

Derek- **** It’s been 2 years since President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris were sworn into the White House and we are halfway through their first term. And look at all we have accomplished because Democrats are in the White House:
* _**I** nsulin costs have been capped _
* _Purchasing electric vehicles has been made more affordable_
* _Student Debt has been frozen and close to being partially forgiven_
* _Thousands of non-violent marijuana possession charges have been vacated_
* _Marriage Equality has been recognized throughout the United States_
* _The President has signed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS and Science Act, and many more policy wins._

Livin' on a prayer. | | Derek- ** It’s been 2 years since President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris were sworn into the White House and we are halfway through their first term. And look at all we have accomplished because Democrats are in the White House: I nsulin costs have been capped Purchasing electric vehicles has been made more affordable Student Debt has been frozen and close to being partially forgiven Thousands of non-violent marijuana possession charges have been vacated Marriage Equality has been recognized throughout the United States The President has signed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS and Science Act, and many more policy wins. But we still have more work to do. . Right now, Young Dems in Virginia and New Jersey are working on key races in their state legislatures that will help decide reproductive freedom for thousands of people in 2023. Young Dems throughout the country are working on municipal and local races that will decide how their everyday lives are run. And we are all preparing to ensure that there is Democratic Congress and that we will have 4 more years of Democrats in the White House in 2024. We are getting ahead of the curve early and investing money and time into our Young Democrats to make sure we are ready to fight, run, and win. We want you to be on board with us early as well. subject: Joe Biden has presided over a term that must be mentioned in the same breath as FDR’s. He needs our support as he prepares for the State of the Union, and the critical 2024 general election.
body:
Joe Biden’s had our backs, we need to have his
| | | | |

| | |

| | | | | Peter, _Joe Biden gives his State of the Union speech in just over two weeks. He will announce his intention to seek a second term as President of the United States. _ [**_Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight for Joe Biden's presidency!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taac14b65-1ad0-4b85-95ed-8e53241dd6cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The President's presided over a term that must be mentioned in the same breath as FDR's. He got GOPers to support bipartisan measures, passing a huge infrastructure bill and first gun-safety legislation in a generation._** **_He went it alone when Republicans refused. The Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS, helping students in debt to predatory lenders, funding historically Black universities, reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act._** _**When the midterm approached, The President aggressively called out MAGA "semi-fascists."** Per historian Michael Beschloss, he had the strongest midterm congressional showing of any President in 88 years. _So, now that Republicans (barely) have the House, all we get threats like this from empowered weirdos: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta320652c-731a-4fd7-8e55-e7b7e5a6e96b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_They're autocrats weaponizing government to destroy Joe Biden_\--via smear, lie, conspiracy--as Trump tried by extorting Ukraine's President Zelensky, resulting in his first impeachment. **

**Thank you. There will be no more important race--maybe in our lifetimes--than this one.** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. clean_body: And if you try to disrupt any of that, you’re now a target. | | | Peter, I said what we were all thinking. | | I wish I was surprised, but we know this is just how Washington operates. If you support the big-government , pro-spending , and anti-liberty agenda , you get a pass. But if you try to disrupt any of that, you’re now a target. FIRST , it was the IRS under Obama that illegally used its position to target conservative organizations, THEN , we saw the entire system try to take down and obstruct President Trump at every turn. NOW, we have the DOJ weaponized against parents and the IRS planning to go after the American people. Peter, the left has corrupted nearly every facet of government. It’s time for conservatives to clean house and drain the swamp before it’s too late. Thank you, Claudia Tenney | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | 28 S Main St Canandaigua, NY 14424 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | |

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=069ddad1c93f44b3baacde6e27cbc5f7&_e=F15_HOtT_MR1YfFQ94AbB8NNPbuhzFY-FfE_QbaKVPifEAHYvZ0YutzBXatL3o3hJlpZf9AvC-RMFwxggACE7eyh1pkE9TFw1a6xDNCe1qF5OiJ_L44Saa2Y56VY4AXX-mGMgV7m8UJFZgBWi9NNGzUvoTyoeFkKjJIrx7ZAEC4h1qZKsE3Tp7g0Ni2bKHuXe1C-CU8QqXrGQIri_7EGRuH_l8tdvYz96W7VrquvmfOrO9Uz069cyJVp3M-5eKl4RLHESDLZmrOaBPIebPYzJjkroYr7HVTi-JSF5bMTD344rZZIy0HngqaGQboDTKew)

Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=069ddad1c93f44b3baacde6e27cbc5f7&_e=F15_HOtT_MR1YfFQ94AbB8NNPbuhzFY-FfE_QbaKVPifEAHYvZ0YutzBXatL3o3hJlpZf9AvC-RMFwxggACE7eyh1pkE9TFw1a6xDNCe1qF5OiJ_L44Saa2Y56VY4AXX-mGMgV7m8UJFZgBWi9NNG-PfXwWh2JuMCiaxbhE-uDFNqmYySHo9g35noQShVNSCfB-waGL0ySzrKDErMUIHWHYUj8qc67IugRacTjlQ0AJ1bt1UxoCOH8RTot2mqumzFb7feJG4SXHAtJ3GwuCoRXy3F-OG7EBKxdzthQECmC2PRLZJAgXE9qiFR1NhE8OD)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=069ddad1c93f44b3baacde6e27cbc5f7&_e=F15_HOtT_MR1YfFQ94AbB8NNPbuhzFY-FfE_QbaKVPifEAHYvZ0YutzBXatL3o3hJlpZf9AvC-RMFwxggACE7eyh1pkE9TFw1a6xDNCe1qF5OiJ_L44Saa2Y56VY4AXX-mGMgV7m8UJFZgBWi9NNG3uAQiLjC9gZQ04u2toBxmw3SwYQ573DNrgPxGwutUzbAee2S2AKqOJ1gM280V3Je-cF-XHF1_kza-KcnMpXvhuXZd6rTug40lIKQTR84jteW5moftNpuIlMtL91O3eKCtFjtryxo0ue2skajebWASe-GflQeaFEjzxjaafMaEnt)
---
[Get my book](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=069ddad1c93f44b3baacde6e27cbc5f7&_e=F15_HOtT_MR1YfFQ94AbB8NNPbuhzFY-FfE_QbaKVPifEAHYvZ0YutzBXatL3o3hJlpZf9AvC-RMFwxggACE7eyh1pkE9TFw1a6xDNCe1qF5OiJ_L44Saa2Y56VY4AXX-mGMgV7m8UJFZgBWi9NNG_vPbQUVu6zxEWW18PGcFWxw-F6NBIQSIocsddKSmRY5_c78pnOmEpa7Qox6MynYz5r3cqVEjTwMV8JXP4Ogbbd5xWsE1lOiHy9NoLRMFr82Lo8WZ9qwaKXmGnG82p9MiWQQV6vvghPSf5CzlXHahKH_KtZM7MaH0VfXM7e0Rewh)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=069ddad1c93f44b3baacde6e27cbc5f7&_e=F15_HOtT_MR1YfFQ94AbB8NNPbuhzFY-FfE_QbaKVPifEAHYvZ0YutzBXatL3o3hJlpZf9AvC-RMFwxggACE7eyh1pkE9TFw1a6xDNCe1qF5OiJ_L44Saa2Y56VY4AXX-mGMgV7m8UJFZgBWi9NNG51msMAFwR92YYEfZj1GcUbufHydtF_xAgd3IYKrRxDtjcg4shdnCUYEHPklQJfW0uadIMGnvYF9DPpAm_r6jLXd3qVZkKJeS2tn8PUfRiI-vGYi5d3H2HgUwfW2R_c5WFG-cOF6-x4neXJP7FpAYrdL3rgzToyuUCu2QWA2001S) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=069ddad1c93f44b3baacde6e27cbc5f7&_e=F15_HOtT_MR1YfFQ94AbB8NNPbuhzFY-FfE_QbaKVPifEAHYvZ0YutzBXatL3o3hJlpZf9AvC-RMFwxggACE7eyh1pkE9TFw1a6xDNCe1qF5OiJ_L44Saa2Y56VY4AXX-mGMgV7m8UJFZgBWi9NNG45h21K5oO7HBUHYlHMYmK0jeT8hAKvQLNd-2mqdZcYaSxEgvzu7qtGy4eXVZeOZyjOwXqkqs6hD88KRQYsBbbDJRVrNDSLSVuFyHBUJM7Pm9vEYYKunns1bdrrL8xczRwriuXptRCSvz02pXMtuqmEFP1lNFT7Do7cHMeyk6IJB)
---
[Get my book](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=069ddad1c93f44b3baacde6e27cbc5f7&_e=F15_HOtT_MR1YfFQ94AbB8NNPbuhzFY-FfE_QbaKVPifEAHYvZ0YutzBXatL3o3hJlpZf9AvC-RMFwxggACE7eyh1pkE9TFw1a6xDNCe1qF5OiJ_L44Saa2Y56VY4AXX-mGMgV7m8UJFZgBWi9NNG_mgcHx_BN4TJAUKcGp_q5eZYZ25zIUtDtS5OkNC87bsHuCOgIQJKAW-LT-3atn0EVhsbv2FeIyJV9m8gQjZZYZqHwBU6zFD6IqDsK2hwMQha9J3mfF6FvKNbR4jisL0wUfGbeQ6UTvrr7lhUSKfOo7FqWYNRNZehMROVQxpcVq6)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=069ddad1c93f44b3baacde6e27cbc5f7&_e=F15_HOtT_MR1YfFQ94AbB8NNPbuhzFY-FfE_QbaKVPifEAHYvZ0YutzBXatL3o3hJlpZf9AvC-RMFwxggACE7eyh1pkE9TFw1a6xDNCe1qF5OiJ_L44Saa2Y56VY4AXX-mGMgV7m8UJFZgBWi9NNG6wbXnJOTvb8QALPHTQg8fueZL84UqodTGy5s0HLkgXYQHZrjEAtx2gzHiyLX9J_xbPwEAKWa0Np-pm2kqeeA6Z293SbmIRxXyGlDjsL1zD-aA_Wg4wo62OtrrWQ6xvIDITH39vDmeziOXnf7CgesXnsbvGEVrsvC8sPFC-R4ouA)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg7kjcfa9e170vap6ufchlv3q3bu6bmoqknjcupg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9imcpj0c5h2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0gmesguogrgchviioiolvj90qs5v64bh1p7oer0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9imcpj0c5h2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zehh6admp410r8lsutcu76r3pvke29lf8d5gl1m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9imcpj0c5h2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl0fe3v5qgqmcbee9dlnonv4259ftecsma42tqfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9imcpj0c5h2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zij4pja9ag5rvj2a4q7qic2ho7gfl2ha3lb1vvbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9imcpj0c5h2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zujifko1s4on1vn7noh8qbta7r9pps1106nuftm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c9imcpj0c5h2bs)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Buy the ticket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Take the ride
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16215%2E3422442%2EOb9Hya)
My motto is _buy the ticket, take the ride._
When fossil fuel companies profit off of destroying our planet, they should be held accountable for helping fix it.
When my kids’ wrestling match left a hole in the wall, they learned about drywall repair.
And now, **I’m committed to winning this Senate race because Californians deserve a Senator who will stand up to special interests and fight for working people.**
But winning is going to be a ride. It takes serious resources to win a competitive primary and general election in the most populous state in the country. **[Can you become a Founding Donor today by making a $5 contribution?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15765?refcode=EMAF20_1_TIC_2023020_V1_F&t=2&akid=16215%2E3422442%2EOb9Hya)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15765?refcode=EMAF20_1_TIC_2023020_V1_F&t=3&akid=16215%2E3422442%2EOb9Hya)**
Thanks for being a part of Team Porter.
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF20_1_TIC_2023020_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=16215_3422442_Ob9Hya&akid=16215%2E3422442%2EOb9Hya)**

body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c278267476c4507a784737706a3da12&_e=9CwNLGpYSb99E1bduosPiPfjZ7KbEkOHo0-rvj1L05vTvNJsXT6sMENhFawNMeg__7agKDCFMFbB1QO3Z9lfXVmQ2667thlCz2HpNJeTYiC0ad4mJKZTg_1Jo5EypFLc8uLQqUb5DtRHtZxtqMAYom_A7C4_gbHRchem9wtzALKXNV6c7R4iFnxEcESx3QICOznednvFE-X5lKI_pgE2RevHUYSqkyNpjLkuckt0XctsQdcHVh0PE32KMkVl5JgjhCm-0uOyi47dp5JaEFyk-DIF56RLFqP9aZB4o1AvaK6BjwtESoC02FXy7pv4qRoi)
---
Friend, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c278267476c4507a784737706a3da12&_e=9CwNLGpYSb99E1bduosPiPfjZ7KbEkOHo0-rvj1L05vTvNJsXT6sMENhFawNMeg__7agKDCFMFbB1QO3Z9lfXVmQ2667thlCz2HpNJeTYiC0ad4mJKZTg_1Jo5EypFLc8uLQqUb5DtRHtZxtqMAYoqA48PN5PedtxoNXWlLs0quMXiRVj4gEb6OMtH-jw5-jlLgcLsPUhSsITuNJPiUpSyk3bLHWuAPFnquk6tyIAwpVSf75lfEuz5IqV53P3Hpl5H-TmMIDv9EelWOUNrxBgVSB-teAaWmKecZ8foweshhLRnSoSHZ9XvVuEqXCuxj4)

I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. _Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _

Did you see this week’s headlines? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57568312/388424320/-1947088922?refcode=E20076-20230120-NM-graphic-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODJhNTYyYy0xNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9W-fxjaH57e5A7NW74Wg0h7ThXAXe4mcjjXJHFjFjSQ=) It’s sickening to see yet another far-right violent attack against public servants. And we know exactly who’s to blame. Republicans have allowed extremists to cozy up in their ranks — allowing toxic and violent rhetoric to **_evolve into real threats against Democrats across the country._** Your personal safety shouldn’t be on the list of considerations when running for office. Our democracy should be a sacred, safe, and civil process aligned with making our nation a more perfect union. **Instead, we’ve seen plots to kidnap governors, planned attacks on New Mexico elected officials, and a spike in threats to sitting members of Congress (including Eric).** In order to protect our democracy and stop extremist violence, we must stand strong. clean_body: Republicans have allowed extremists to cozy up in their ranks — allowing toxic and violent rhetoric to evolve into real threats against Democrats across the country. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Did you see this week’s headlines? = It’s sickening to see yet another far-right violent attack against public servants. And we know exactly who’s to blame. Republicans have allowed extremists to cozy up in their ranks — allowing toxic and violent rhetoric to evolve into real threats against Democrats across the country. Your personal safety shouldn’t be on the list of considerations when running for office. Our democracy should be a sacred, safe, and civil process aligned with making our nation a more perfect union. Instead, we’ve seen plots to kidnap governors, planned attacks on New Mexico elected officials, and a spike in threats to sitting members of Congress (including Eric). In order to protect our democracy and stop extremist violence, we must stand strong. That’s why Eric’s work is so important. The tech industry promised all of us better lives and faster communication; instead, _**it steals our private information, sells it to the Chinese, and then censors conservatives and others for daring to have an opinion.**_

[**DONATE HERE TO STAND UP TO COMMUNIST CHINA**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=7de65cae69b84847a2825282a7ea85db&_e=KK83d4Qwc3ms-dGBwt69DO0bOplLfirPWflYiVW6nj2TtqVRoWf8eFR23pvOsJKXHnUbjEDqMVyxKp1c0mXnZF44ua3aCsxCS1y9fCa5f43nHh6I8O3KaqujgiIZKxjLPI2gG0X1eHjsZ5aQj1uNeEcTZ0Fham0FSxD_rv5XuhgJnofXOJYXU0f84mMc8xZ4ZRq4TYoE_6RjOQ-Lx65R58H4PhbcRyDlncnk6855V7LANx5bJ5c5eyLkDA86O2o3ec39uLs05hWvAtD7lz2JsmFQj-xmVwYKPvgz44DOP5kJROkG0xWJnzgowuWOE44V3gDlgZHdSJqVgsi_mR0xNZxpGbR9tB3p4LJj4YOM0GDZUjBtjbWnS40CdeIDLqC6HDe5jkRgUDNYi-XGMiaScK8u8-ofNU4oNqP7MmanXnbRBXNq5AD9SCpPS-P2tkg1Vjhq3scodtMGynoS2heL3MnM3dS0FTXYrgu57MNx5SujNtX5mhBmfpO58QL3HSd0wnqPDhr6czQuMMSS7w83UA%3D%3D)

The solution is simple: we need to break up the big tech companies to reduce their power in our economy and our politics. We also need to ban the theft of our personal information and hold them accountable for censorship. If they want our data, it's time they paid for it.

clean_body: | Friend, Big Tech is after all of us. I know the technology industry well. I've seen it firsthand, and I'm sick of politicians who talk big about Big Tech but do nothing about it. | The tech industry promised all of us better lives and faster communication; instead, it steals our private information, sells it to the Chinese, and then censors conservatives and others for daring to have an opinion. The solution is simple: we need to break up the big tech companies to reduce their power in our economy and our politics. We also need to ban the theft of our personal information and hold them accountable for censorship. If they want our data, it's time they paid for it. Thanks, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. Friend, now that I’m settling into my new role in Congress, I wanted to take a moment to share with you the values I’ll be relying upon in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57568566/388424705/-2053298293?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.20_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjQwZjkyNS0xNjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h-eER1PenkGLNg9aE_XgEm_UMSrAq5a8TkEOgW6HV5Q=)

Friend, now that I’m settling into my new role in Congress, I wanted to take a moment to share with you the values I’ll be relying upon in Washington. [**In a moment, I’m going to tell you about my life and what led me to serve in Congress, but if you don’t have time to read this email right now, can you please chip in before you click away?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57568567/388424706/-2053298293?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.20_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjQwZjkyNS0xNjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h-eER1PenkGLNg9aE_XgEm_UMSrAq5a8TkEOgW6HV5Q=) | _[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57568568/388424707/-2053298293?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.20_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjQwZjkyNS0xNjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h-eER1PenkGLNg9aE_XgEm_UMSrAq5a8TkEOgW6HV5Q=)_
---
My dad immigrated to the U.S. from Mexico in 1950. He believed in the power of hard work to make a difference. He worked in the fields, served two tours in Vietnam, and took a union job to provide a path into the middle class for our family.
While we didn’t have a lot growing up, my family believed that through hard work, you can achieve anything. It took me seven years to graduate college – and I juggled multiple jobs, from painting houses to pouring coffee – but I put in the hard work and earned that degree.
My daughter was born 18 years ago, and my family’s hard work gave me the determination that I needed to leave the world a better place for her. That’s why I stepped up to join the Oregon legislature.
As a state legislator, I fought for more affordable health care, helped Oregon begin to tackle our climate crisis, and passed the nation’s most progressive paid family leave bill. It takes hard work to get these things done, but I was determined.
**With that same level of determination, I’m fighting for families just like mine in Congress, but I know I can’t do it alone.**
[**That’s why I’m asking: Will you please chip in $10 or whatever you can to my re-election campaign? I relied on grassroots support from folks like you before the election, and I hope you’ll still support me today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57568569/388424708/-2053298293?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.20_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjQwZjkyNS0xNjk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h-eER1PenkGLNg9aE_XgEm_UMSrAq5a8TkEOgW6HV5Q=)

clean_body: Friend, now that I’m settling into my new role in Congress, I wanted to take a moment to share with you the values I’ll be relying upon in Washington. = Friend, now that I’m settling into my new role in Congress, I wanted to take a moment to share with you the values I’ll be relying upon in Washington. = | = My dad immigrated to the U.S. from Mexico in 1950. He believed in the power of hard work to make a difference. He worked in the fields, served two tours in Vietnam, and took a union job to provide a path into the middle class for our family. While we didn’t have a lot growing up, my family believed that through hard work, you can achieve anything. It took me seven years to graduate college – and I juggled multiple jobs, from painting houses to pouring coffee – but I put in the hard work and earned that degree. My daughter was born 18 years ago, and my family’s hard work gave me the determination that I needed to leave the world a better place for her. That’s why I stepped up to join the Oregon legislature. As a state legislator, I fought for more affordable health care, helped Oregon begin to tackle our climate crisis, and passed the nation’s most progressive paid family leave bill. It takes hard work to get these things done, but I was determined. With that same level of determination, I’m fighting for families just like mine in Congress, but I know I can’t do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Andrea Salinas = | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

_Hi_ _–_ _Senator Hassan is laser-focused on serving families like yours in the Senate. So, we had to step in on the fundraising front.

Here’s the deal. We’re still paying off debt from 2022. And until we close the books on that, we’re fighting for the issues we all care about – abortion access, climate, health care – __at a huge __disadvantage.

We’re __still pretty short_ _of our_ _January projections, so_ _we’re stepping in so the boss doesn’t have to email you yet again.**[Will you please rush $3 or as much as you can before January’s out to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57556583/388385842/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2189-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGJmMDU1Yy1lYzk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3nT9z-VOyP-DiTnVMEBs4pemnmg9pQj8YUaz8J0Qk9c=)**

The longer we’re in debt, the longer Republicans have to gain a real edge on us. And since they now control the House, we absolutely can’t let that happen.

Thanks for helping.

Team Maggie_

Hey friends,

Going to keep this short and sweet.

Now that I have been sworn in for another term representing the people of Iowa in the U.S. Senate, I want you to know my top priorities include:

_**1\. Iowa (Iowa is always #1 on my agenda)
2\. Lower drug prices
3\. Bring fairness to the cattle market
4\. Back the Blue
5\. Write the new Farm Bill
6\. Secure our border
7\. Restore fiscal discipline
**_
**[Chip in if you're with me! I need your help to get all these things done. ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=5ad0cde767fe47ed8c6b30c3794d1ea9&_e=e8cnoFrLTclARz_fvm4tElQ9ueDpTLr9m7fin-LDvXPholl3gs6wrwCTltGBerf5MKsEySq-YcHHhSnsirFWLNpdcfh30J11fubdbN8UACSWjnB6nxn57PJfpUeoWHdkpuAq1ER6XNRnou3RRO1tRhTnYAswaYA_v0qGz3EyN7-jUxX9VvajqldwNP5mpGIsakgZbzsZVFtQAesRsNxRXkLtslZCBEfB3TEUXvdsnVr6PKaKryi5jgPSksZImzGXzTmjLNGbJOMgt-wHwYu0MwPHmFstGmP1Jcq4S3CqiyfUOXbNgT067CYGdIcmxs2hbdjaAp2jOBylf4nZTTkGNqVf-YTQPKr7SuQlGEfMEsO26Scg9KBrwqr06ytRadegE_IAnUphipbtRUh1fbY0LTXhVvxAdbWJczXRM6UYEuiMwBSL95Iia-FWmGOIvHPKrnM4A_7dIavTF0cTWg2NfTwz4ugQsHgSHJmGG8z4R2A%3D) **

name: TikTok China alert
subject: Should we ban TikTok?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,
TikTok is a poison.

It’s drawing our children into their phones and away from their families for hours on end.

**But more importantly, it’s giving the Chinese government a window into our homes and personal information.**

_And who KNOWS what they’ll do with all that info?_

**Congress BANNED TikTok on all government property phones - but some people want to go a step further.**

clean_body: | | | We have to be ready for anything | | | Team, If you thought you’d heard about Kari Lake for the last time, think again. Just recently, the chair of the Arizona Senate’s election committee – the bigoted Wendy Rogers – went on video to say she believes Kari Lake should be installed as governor. | ?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-az-gops-agenda-is-hate-2&emailreferrer=email1789832_subject2287057&emailsubject=alert-kari-lake-2024 Despite seeing their four leading election-lying candidates lose in 2022, it’s clear the AZ GOP is still willing to lie publicly, and put our democracy at risk to try and steal power from Arizona voters. If Rogers’ lies and attempts to install Lake weren’t bad enough, reporters are now saying that if Lake can’t convince lawmakers or the court to undemocratically make her governor, she’s eyeing a run for U.S. Senate in 2024. Whether it’s Rogers' comments, or Lake’s rumored 2024 run, it’s clear we aren’t done fighting for democracy and truth here in Arizona. We can’t let the Arizona legislature repeat their past “audit” shenanigans to try to install Lake illegally, and we certainly can’t let Lake win this Senate seat in 2024. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thanks for fighting together with us, Arizona Democrats Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . clean_body: | | | | Peter, We're counting down the days before our first major deadline of the year. To that end, we need to raise $6,218 more to hit our January goal by midnight on the 31st. = = January has been a whirlwind, Peter. In an epic display of dysfunction, House Republicans wasted four days and 15 votes in a historically embarrassing effort to pick a Speaker of the House. Then, they spent the rest of the month voting on policies that are asinine at best, and dangerous at worst. Peter, this is the first deadline of Val's first re-election. We have to make sure that Val has the resources to continue fighting for what the constituents of OR-04 and all Americans deserve – autonomy over their own bodies, access to affordable healthcare, a clean and healthy planet to leave for future generations, and so much more. And we can't win this fight without your support. = Team Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: Clean Campaign Pledge - PRESS RELEASE
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=h.826fImQQve0iI&b=7bTp0cSrVHoggGQFHcG2yg)
---
> > # RYAN CHAMBERLIN CALLS ON HIS COMPETITORS FOR STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 24 TO SIGN A CLEAN CAMPAIGN PLEDGE
>> FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
> January 18, 2023
>
> **Contact:** Matt Doster
> **Phone:** (850) 222-8156
> **Email:** [_press@flspr.com_](mailto:press@flspr.com "mailto:press@flspr.com")
>
> **Belleview, Fla.** — Today, Ryan Chamberlin issued a clean campaignpledge in the race for House District 24 and is calling on all his opponents to do the same. The pledge will hold all candidates to a high standard of conduct for the primary election.
>
> “A primary election is a great opportunity for the voters to choose their representative, and District 24 is looking for a proven conservative who will stand with Governor DeSantis and be strong on the issues,” said candidate Ryan Chamberlin. “For too long, the establishment and their chosen candidates have sold us a bill of goods on the campaign trail and have resorted to personal attacks to tear down true conservatives. I am fully expecting that the special interests and insiders in Tallahassee will get involved in his special election, and it is important that we let our records and commitment to issues be the focus for voters.”
>
>
> Chamberlin continued: “I have issued a clean campaign pledge. I have signed it and have sent a copy to each candidate to ask them to sign as well and return to our campaign. Afterward, we will distribute to anyone who asks. Those who don’t sign will indicate as to where they stand on this important commitment to the voters."
>
>
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=h.826fImQQve0iI&b=7bTp0cSrVHoggGQFHcG2yg)
---

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate

| | |

Two years ago today, President Biden was inaugurated as the president of the United States — ushering in a new era of steady leadership after the chaos of Donald Trump's presidency.
**Now, we need to show that Democrats are still standing with our president in the fight to move our country forward. That's why we're counting on top Democrats to respond to our live poll before midnight tonight — and your response is still missing, friend:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57570116/388428791/1945842634?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3852-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDNjMWM0MS0xZDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vr923mkwNHs3cBLIrbB-LT1XmkhNVTCgkQMeya8Z264=&emci=e3005999-8596-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=c43c1c41-1d99-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

**But now, President Biden is facing a GOP-controlled House majority — filled with extremists who are hellbent on obstructing his agenda and pushing their dangerous policies as we head into a new election cycle.**
**That's why it's so important for Democrats to come together in this moment to show that we're standing united behind President Biden. But time is running out before our poll closes at midnight, and we still need another 48 responses from your area — including yours.**
**Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=469b9305a83147139d9fbd5c76c5325c&_e=VevQ6YtCT2zsmBj8c3RA56Z_1AvqvoyQHgeM_1oRAh3tndUultLTz7VFw0U0EycyH-N2QG-7qossbmYtnHnYfL-SmXiGtFxjZ8IbUv__3dPHyFtKqAaQ73Uu2J9niOtG3XF9mCYwdPlbS_7yIgQHGazSRAcsUJXcFLnzYuqC7wfVGGBaWKuhdNF9G1LehS3lxKsJMW4TyjVILt5aDFRkXqSyMUywvyRGPVC82DsK3rgeh9Pq9k2Xif3sW9Kpj6L1iwJkHcWuO-ymRwUK-_kY1YTcNYErQw2VRApKdFfMuSqFuO_ZTCKGX27ZW0G1fCmSGYYXOWdAHI2O5GPviDrrE7F8yv6FVW84UXmAPuILM_zQ8O8xndalQ7G_cYLc2YcMpccTEUtM7LY-0ITtaKjAG9WSoP9_zkkKCFgzOCuHJ4BNbHfRfyU15KxELcHOsstpTC6q1g3qhSepr-dp57ggt7w_zHCgfh0ng9XpAg9ZQuE%3D)

I wish I was surprised, but we know this is just how Washington operates. If you support the **big-government** , **pro-spending** , and **anti-liberty agenda** , **you get a pass**.
But if you try to disrupt any of that, **you’re now a target. **
---

**_FIRST_** , it was the IRS under Obama that illegally used its position to target conservative organizations, **_THEN_** , we saw the entire system try to take down and obstruct President Trump at every turn. **_NOW,_** we have the DOJ weaponized against parents and the IRS planning to go after the American people. clean_body: And if you try to disrupt any of that, you’re now a target. | | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, I’m Claudia Tenney—I’m a small business owner, proud Marine mom, and conservative Congresswoman from New York. I said what we were all thinking. | | I wish I was surprised, but we know this is just how Washington operates. If you support the big-government , pro-spending , and anti-liberty agenda , you get a pass. But if you try to disrupt any of that, you’re now a target. FIRST , it was the IRS under Obama that illegally used its position to target conservative organizations, THEN , we saw the entire system try to take down and obstruct President Trump at every turn. NOW, we have the DOJ weaponized against parents and the IRS planning to go after the American people. Peter, the left has corrupted nearly every facet of government. It’s time for conservatives to clean house and drain the swamp before it’s too late. | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Claudia Tenney | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | |

name: James H. Harvey III, American Veterans Center
subject: The first "Top Gun"
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6Y-fyKwMAnmnrOU45de9gU6bN3FOoj5ofNDw1OD3v8z9ZGaGKAfVupwXgvort-v4X2GZd3OKZ4S-FFJg6t1xyUtdrsxthvU3yyoLw5kYgaWbD5WE0t3XzwaCYF2RGhUZARcB8WlV_R2QzeIWlSLEz-0%3D)
---

Fellow American,
I was one of the first “Top Guns” of the U.S. Air Force.
In 1949, I was on a small pilot team at the Air Force’s first Fighter Gunnery Meet.
Over multiple days, we competed against other squadrons in dive bombing, skip bombing, rocket firing, panel strafing, and aerial gunnery at 20,000 and 12,000 feet – _and we won_.
But the Air Force listed the 1949 competition winner as “Unknown” for 46 years because our team was composed of Tuskegee Airmen ... and they didn’t want people to know we were so good.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6Ww_To_hydt3sOP2MQtsZFzuMxCXq6KP03jyjl6RZeK8Tp2-tlr6rviqljrbBnTA_deXoTkcrWHFvIw0nHzMtXnelcvRqQl8LjFDqmpfht7z5hwNtK-1ohs3hH1y7t1GT3l4LlbK28HZs3wZ9MMciLU%3D)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center recorded a special video documentary about my military service in World War II and the Korean War._
---

**I** ’**m a proud 22-year military veteran who served in World War II and the Korean War with the 33rd Fighter Group, better known as the Tuskegee Airmen.**
In addition to being one of the Air Force’s first “Top Guns,” I was the first African-American combat pilot to fly in Korea, and I went on to fly more than 125 missions there.
I’m proud to share my story of patriotism, service, and hard work with the next generation and to see the Tuskegee Airmen I served with recognized for their skill and bravery – after so many years of stonewalling and silence.
**I truly understand the importance of recording and sharing veterans** ’ **stories so we can honor the men and women who served and inspire young Americans.**
That’s why, when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they needed to raise more funds to record veterans’ stories – from World War II to today’s Special Forces – I knew that I had to take action.
[**Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help support the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical work to honor veterans** ’ **legacies? As a non-profit organization, AVC depends on support from patriotic Americans like you.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6SXO-_3G9UdScmcrfAHk_yDRx1pot40m3VfdqVz68zWnW2cO5JDQ8V2_UY3AvcjKjtHHUxAektpoqimI3TfWIiGVFiZ4weNo6m_VlR5_cXKRyMOfiPk3aTX9WRtsGr4Z3CZYOkKnwZNw12Qd5nde8X4%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6QgQ0ZsLkWyIAQjmPkT2E66uFN9aKiMeN6JxHeVJxNg4w9daScVyq7t8iTxE36aT5WidsRbnXgLUpQo7mv1t5IGdfdZspa8-icWvX_6ULAlPKB16kRDzQF2Q4OO1lN1uJG8Z3yl0umySsT234ZAEJ3g%3D)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6d2cJdqdgI9-iPxV4Pybe0LtR2V0-seP_vPeQFy4KBJq14oonYiAmG4Cfce-2KaCz9TNdbnwyjFq5BBlcLnBeZ5UhHUFz-STNhW6zjUSwIv7o3s0M-lE5MbdgIOfSQi4vufo7QDL23YDU6EESGFqzYM%3D)
---
_Above: I was honored to join AVC_ ’ _s Annual Conference – alongside my fellow Tuskegee Airmen and in the company of hundreds more veterans, students, and military cadets – in Washington, D.C. this year._
---

I was proud to partner with the American Veterans Center for a 37-minute video documentary about my service in World War II and Korea – and also about the Tuskegee Airmen’s long journey to rightful recognition for our skill and service.
**No other group does as much as the American Veterans Center to safeguard our veterans** ’ **legacies and to let our veterans tell their own stories in their own words.**
[**That** ’**s why I** ’**m writing to you today to ask for your support of the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical work. Will you make your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6XVKz8nj8QObduUgLcPPGuJ1XCUjcP7tukX6Txm6jQkXlK4KloRO9iUas7lnGHF4WnPY7peRKmajxnH4KUZDQEVFu8tWbGpbv5s1Qhfq3mvYtEmqLF0bPMzHgvUkAPqrasbP_QwN-2C4oK_uJjpuQIA%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6XrGvgbJGujCAf5rBr77cU2eupKtL93u6etf9TcmAcVWkK3vH1wxqC57kMbWWO0NqJvysLlcAnXJb5suKRAe4PxksbBjKfSlLgAoWUTOUJr1L5Tws56sDkVdsIKOfE5iFU8a8o1FCRulDf574Y5V2xc%3D)
---

As a young man, I stood outside in my yard and looked up as a formation of P-40 Warhawks flew overhead. In that moment, I knew I wanted to become a pilot.
**Today, I hope that my story of serving America – in World War II, in the Korean War, and as one of the first** “**Top Guns” in the Air Force – will similarly inspire the next generation of young people.**
Every year, the American Veterans Center reaches _millions_ of Americans through their video documentaries ... their National Memorial Day Parade ... and their Annual Conference for veterans, students, and military cadets.
[**Will you join me in supporting the American Veterans Center – and helping them reach even more veterans and young people with their powerful programs – and make a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6bhLjQ3AGUyrbFsumNUbk0oxH8ODMffCFU2Q-HHW7nAj2xthcN9Y3x4Ndl1tN_lcGJBIS_T4zzTiX1maP-N2PwALei7tqyhMg8KTU4vddZJIA_1XgWeFZ64wVLUduCbqpfWHqEnFRdf7l4U6lIVV78w%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6Vso0v74YB3OO83yffYgnuE7G07zlQ-QcarUJsus6nB25cQNwKEie2Yq6icwwMP-Azhecz4KG3SMJLoGpBcQOMFUTl2q-JeJNLeLxoZKANIjCFiMyRAuTKR5bnxaJScnay3ctQqEdumlvJIncG4a7eo%3D)
---

Friend, your support will help the American Veterans Center pass on the lessons of veterans like me – lessons of service, sacrifice, patriotism, duty, and courage.
Thank you for helping the American Veterans Center preserve the stories of American heroes so together we can inspire the next generation.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6WExrA1qqCL_K4ZQKcAOy7VMPtL6XUloNO-ndYuZcqNBh-Jj7orDHJvnevucqBCbuRe0wKNxp2TONMktY-Ep7hVGzAv0NvJuQA76QVKH0AsQH4rGFr70-ObH8v1sLDwdruvN5V-TIbWNF1SXXWv_RQU%3D)
---

Lt. Col. James H. Harvey III U.S. Air Force (Ret.) For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd3bd89d43154b4d8517a928c0aaf2a9&_e=rAx6CfzlTpiMWCT88JpkvknjOxe6g-xdprLB6z7DdjGK_bGmPiTdDwGTtn50IwD3ATeNsLRns061F3fICOEPSFTBrqhYyLi_sOA4aELGkA3SNsSjyN-_lRnlSEIWtYVOvaEXId1LUbp76SiOznDM6RZMd3joT79XcXlX2K14c3knW6uflO6MWiiTGN6Qrfc3moQmSppcPMcFYUh_NUDLAfLiBKyCZbN8KKFg7_bKWvXOWr98Oy4TmCh9i2C5VXKXuO5l7sLF5-BooU1xnFFWSDFm6fHdiBdsxNekvK-voLo%3D)
---
|

name: Team Baldwin
subject: It’s been seven months since SCOTUS overturned Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Team — Last June, the Supreme Court’s right-wing majority overturned _Roe v. Wade_ in a devastating, out-of-touch decision _. _ Since then, 13 states (including Wisconsin) have implemented complete abortion bans. Other states also enacted harsh and restrictive blocks to prevent people from accessing reproductive healthcare, taking our country back in time. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57559784/388395892/778904136?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230120_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODMyZDhlZi1mNDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1nHDC38TV_IEMPBWp6GsoP2On4JNge1mYaciT_VwDo=&emci=0532d8ef-f498-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=0832d8ef-f498-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871) _— The New York Times_ This outrageous decision continues to endanger the lives of millions of people across the country who are now not allowed to make personal healthcare decisions over their own bodies because of six far-right Supreme Court justices in Washington, DC. We understand times like these can make us feel angry, frustrated, and even hopeless. **But together, we can channel these feelings into action by supporting leaders like Tammy, who are fighting to codify the right to a safe and legal abortion nationwide. ** The 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ is in two days, and instead of celebrating, we’re using this anniversary as a call to action. Tammy and our team want to send a loud message to all anti-choice politicians in the Senate: **_We will not stop fighting until we’ve secured and protected reproductive rights for every person in the country. _** [**If you’re with us, add your name alongside Tammy’s to our official Restore our Fundamental Rights Petition and call on the Senate to codify the right to an abortion and stop right-wing legislators from passing more restrictive bans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57559785/388395893/778904136?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230120_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODMyZDhlZi1mNDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1nHDC38TV_IEMPBWp6GsoP2On4JNge1mYaciT_VwDo=&emci=0532d8ef-f498-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=0832d8ef-f498-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57559786/388395894/778904136?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230120_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODMyZDhlZi1mNDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1nHDC38TV_IEMPBWp6GsoP2On4JNge1mYaciT_VwDo=&emci=0532d8ef-f498-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=0832d8ef-f498-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jen=20Kiggans?=
subject: This is just the beginning…!
body:
My First Co-Sponsored Bill | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=9df5d17f4d&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | |
---
| Dear Peter!

It is a great honor to be the Congresswoman serving the Second District! I am so proud to represent this great district in the halls of Congress. I can’t wait to get to work restoring American strength with our new majority in the U.S. House! During my campaign, I promised I would be a fighter for you...this past week I had the first of many opportunities to keep that promise. I am proud to say that I was a Co-Sponsor for H.R. 22, The “Protecting America’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve From China Act!” I’ve said it before, I’ll say it again: Energy Security is National Security! We should never be selling our strategic petroleum reserves to China, and this bill prohibits that from happening. I promised to fight for national security and that’s exactly what I’m doing. It will be a fight to keep this seat every election season. We never stop working or campaigning to get our message to the voters. It’s time to start building our foundation for the 2024 cycle and beyond.
---
| [Help Jen Start the Year Strong >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=a71ecc34e7&e=4955722b3e "Help Jen Start the Year Strong >>>")
---
| [Make your first donation of 2023 >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=8e450e6afe&e=4955722b3e "Make your first donation of 2023 >>>")
---
| I am just getting started fighting for you and the American people! Let’s get to work....! With gratitude, Congresswoman Jen Kiggans

subject: Reminder: What’s at stake in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www

Derek, The Supreme Court’s landmark decision in Dobbs, overturning Roe v Wade, has led to some state assemblies passing barbaric laws in many states, resulting in dangerous and disturbing stories of women who are unable to get life-saving care. **An abortion ban, and the consequences that follow, could be coming to our Commonwealth if the Virginia GOP is successful in keeping its majority in the House of Delegates and flipping just two seats in the Virginia Senate.** Virginia Democrats need to protect our majority in the Senate. **It’s literally a matter of life and death.** Remember, the Republicans hold the Lt. governor’s tie-breaking vote in the Senate — and with the Senate currently at 22 Democrats and 18 Republicans, they only need to flip two seats to pass an abortion ban. Glenn Youngkin already said he’d sign ANY abortion ban that comes across his desk. name: =?utf-8?Q?Border=20Security=20Coalition?=
subject: Two Whole Years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Border Security PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=50b1029f1a&e=fdefed58de)
---
PeterEverybody has significant dates in their lives. A birthday. An anniversary. The date an adoption took place.
Today is another anniversary, but it’s not one worth celebrating.On this day, exactly two years ago, Joe Biden was sworn in as President.... Which begs the question: DO YOU THINK YOU ARE BETTER OFF SINCE BIDEN HAS BEEN IN OFFICE?I can tell you the answer from here in South Texas. _The answer is a resounding NO!!_ Immigration numbers are at an all-time high and Biden is doing nothing about it.
| [SUPORT THE BORDER SECURITY COALITION TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0272a4e16a&e=fdefed58de)
---
You may have seen that our President finally, FOR THE FIRST TIME, visited our southern Border, except all he did was participate in some photo ops and cave in to the leftists who want open borders. He was nowhere near the children detained, the catch-and-release programs, or the human trafficking and drug cartels. He is simply pretending these things don’t exist!! UNBELIEVABLE!!Unlike when Trump was President, we’ve had record numbers of illegal immigrants pour across our southern border and the second two years of Biden’s term don’t look like they will be any different. These illegals are crowding our hospitals, taking our jobs and making it more difficult for my community to prosper.**JOIN ME IN FIGHTING ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION - EVEN IF OUR PRESIDENT WON’T!**
| [CLICK HERE: SUPPORT A SECURE BORDER TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5bdfbb77e9&e=fdefed58de)
---
I’m Irene Armendariz-Jackson and I started a PAC, called the Border Security PAC, to fight the illegal immigration I see every day in my backyard and I need patriots like you to stand with me to help secure our borders. Joe Biden and his sham administration are asleep at the wheel and have failed their duty to protect our homeland. My PAC will fight to bring back Trump-era policies that will prevent these illegal crossings.As you know, when you factor in the human trafficking element and the fentanyl crisis that comes along with illegal immigration, EVERY STATE IS A BORDER STATE!! Every American citizen needs to be ready for the real consequences of this ongoing border crisis, which is why you need to join me in this fight. We along the border see it first, but make no mistake, you will see it soon too! To maintain our national sovereignty, it is imperative that we have well-defined and secure borders.Will you stand beside me and support this movement today? Rush in $24 to represent the 24 more months it will take for Trump to be re-elected and finish the wall _once and for all!!_
| [DONATE $15.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9708536cea&e=fdefed58de)

body:
Are you with me?
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20945f620be04e699ad1e8a25325cb4c&_e=6r2m0UjbFChO-VPGMK0cF3h54_4oQvWqcnSawITbFVhzJArW451zTP1qr3vS2xMJufCzyZSB9H7RXl5ATCtA_NoA0n4JmWF_R_SQ2g3v5I98OgGBnL-kPTCh_j12842db514YCQR9tXfb8Y8qZqCmgppv8MDV1cWC7l-2gyhyBu175GMKW-R8VHAZsolWW98V59K8jQhbGAE4Tmkns7_zzrYleNVst3stODSG62knJ_aMLLgVaoebjDOfNh5Ac48pRLPmzOi3TlYFHGY1AWdfkzLjM7lHPcMJlZiWfHIqn1XO6pQPuEVOGvGBzejlnAf)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
As a dedicated conservative, I've always remained committed to putting the best interests of the American people first.
And that's why I'm leading the fight to hold bureaucrats accountable and demand moderates and Democrats do too.
We've made our demands clear and have already accomplished so much because of your support...but now we need to ramp up our efforts.
**So I 'm taking on the IRS, calling for lower taxes for all Americans, and fighting to preserve innocent life.**
I'm working as hard as I can, **[but I need your help to make sure Congress hears our message and gets these things done.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20945f620be04e699ad1e8a25325cb4c&_e=6r2m0UjbFChO-VPGMK0cF3h54_4oQvWqcnSawITbFVhzJArW451zTP1qr3vS2xMJufCzyZSB9H7RXl5ATCtA_NoA0n4JmWF_R_SQ2g3v5I98OgGBnL-kPTCh_j12842db514YCQR9tXfb8Y8qZqCmgppv8MDV1cWC7l-2gyhyBvH7YGyaTsQy4wKHGBARr65XE3D65JpUIq07Cqb4w4gWNqzUpvsWRc74y11eeYfrGlwC8bQZAAiXDw5Yqs3fm1woC16-Er4mbQ703Y9mGbIkd7lWFzls0xB2GTZBmB3robWqpLj1D_y8T4GSh2sK2Pr)** | | | | [DEMAND ACTION](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20945f620be04e699ad1e8a25325cb4c&_e=6r2m0UjbFChO-VPGMK0cF3h54_4oQvWqcnSawITbFVhzJArW451zTP1qr3vS2xMJufCzyZSB9H7RXl5ATCtA_NoA0n4JmWF_R_SQ2g3v5I98OgGBnL-kPTCh_j12842db514YCQR9tXfb8Y8qZqCmgppv8MDV1cWC7l-2gyhyBtLJIgScqlzZv8yOTJpw8ISY1qJW1oNckEh44GyACzHuhgpXqtkZ6vmGFzRDEGhFIDfyNc1jgClYq9etW4MwmBYnLp2ZUD_BN4qh4HgBJg7uDQU9HIl3tS9ffc0tKk1s-fQCxDesaDpNSDobi66Loqw)
---
**The IRS is a bloated bureaucracy that wastes billions of dollars every year while stifling economic growth and violating the privacy of American citizens.**

We need to put an end to this and give hard working Americans the freedom to keep more of their own money.

At the same time, we must also work to protect the lives of the unborn. Every human life is precious and should be protected under law.

**We cannot stand idly by while Democrats make it easier to take innocent lives.**

That's why I am asking for your support. With your donation, we can fight to defund the IRS, lower our income taxes, and defend the rights of the unborn with our new Republican Majority.

**[So please, help me put pressure on GOP moderates and Democrats to demand they put Americans first and tackle the real issues.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20945f620be04e699ad1e8a25325cb4c&_e=6r2m0UjbFChO-VPGMK0cF3h54_4oQvWqcnSawITbFVhzJArW451zTP1qr3vS2xMJufCzyZSB9H7RXl5ATCtA_NoA0n4JmWF_R_SQ2g3v5I98OgGBnL-kPTCh_j12842db514YCQR9tXfb8Y8qZqCmgppv8MDV1cWC7l-2gyhyBt9hOdE62RZFATiLxLcPxMdKYP_wnp2xe7JIRwaB38NhD3xkzlxH4Rhw3pBhEeQnkFITz8cocCw_rQwlNpwBik-bscw0bRxe5QTm8nFLmoyRv4stK4Y-ZiwY7UWaq9CR9-T1DOCkOlKXg0p6Ir0jm_K)**

Thank you for your support,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=20945f620be04e699ad1e8a25325cb4c&_e=6r2m0UjbFChO-VPGMK0cF3h54_4oQvWqcnSawITbFVhzJArW451zTP1qr3vS2xMJufCzyZSB9H7RXl5ATCtA_NoA0n4JmWF_R_SQ2g3v5I98OgGBnL-kPTCh_j12842db514YCQR9tXfb8Y8qZqCmgppv8MDV1cWC7l-2gyhyBv0kuErs25ayFaKQnnTjWQ0B_rKfuRqkZv0dPIHz8Bq8Ue-vesLyKje-Rb2xCp13lGRKYuuv_P47Li3cBkisa9SaBGshm3Oy2zHY3ZUps9C6wN_4WCV_RqjDfeSIRSKIJH-8nrPMu5nkX4prEXyrkFq)

subject: Our Farmers Deserve Better. #DemsDeliver
body:
Update from WAFLA and Cherry Institute Conferences Central Washington feeds this nation and our high value crops bring in money from foreign
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/25OMsYEXl/c?w=abycLETDvqbe96405VKh8v-I50N3ppfUaAqr0P6tNXE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3NvLzI1T01zWUVYbD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | without farmers therewould be no civilization
---
| |
---
| | Update from WAFLA and Cherry Institute Conferences
Central Washington feeds this nation and our high value crops bring in money from foreign markets and help strengthen alliances with other nations. Mike Hullet, CEO of Farm Fresh Direct said at the 80th Cherry Institute’s Summit that if a farmer addresses congress they listen. We have a representative in congress that claims to be a farmer and nobody listens to him! Under our past president and our current representative in Central Washington, challenges facing the farmers of CD4 and this nation have increased and yet the republicans in congress talking points are few: Consumer costs, Immigration and Food Security. And these are discussed in the most narrow of context and most emotionally divisive manner.
* Foreign Policy/ Markets
* Water
* Climate Change
* Small farms (farmers)
* Immigration
* Food insecurity
* Costs and supply chain

Farmers carry the entire cost and risk of their endeavor without knowing if they will be successful or not. How many businesses take such a leap?
At the 80th Cherry Institute Summit in Yakima a speaker announced that in the short term the US will import 50% of its produce!* What I believe to be true:
* Foreign policy and markets damaged under Trump and COVID demand more attention by this administration to reestablish and expand our markets.
* Under the Trump administration, and with the support of CD4 Representative Dan Newhouse, the US pulled away from its allies and markets. The result has been devastating for our higher end produce which benefited from a strong Asia market. Even though we have the superior product, other countries were quick to fill the gap.

* Water in Central Washington is currently sufficient, but water projects to ensure water security will not get the funding required with Rep. Dan Newhouse in office.
* Water will always be contentious, however upgrading and finalizing water projects will go a long way to creating efficiencies through conservation, more effective allocation and management thus repairing damage done by overuse of water while expanding our AG industry. Our irrigation systems have sections that are 100 years old and a chain is only as strong as its weakest link. The Columbia Basin Water Project has been slow walked and is still not complete after over a half century. Completion of this project would provide water for 300,000 additional acreage for farming, replenish the Odessa Aquifer, provide clean drinking water, reverse deep well drilling, and through water savings, damage done to lands can be repaired.

* Climate change is real, but with a Rep Dan Newhouse we will continue to fight to get funding and support for new crop research and to maintain our growing sustainable energy industry
* CD4 Representative Dan Newhouse has continuously fought to roll back advances in sustainable energy for reliance on fossil fuels. He has written legislation such as the American Energy Independence bill to undermine our sustainable energy industry and lobbied with other states to advance their energy programs over ours. Newhouse has voted and will continue to vote against funding for programs and services for farms and citizens. Washington State University along with other universities and farm organizations continue to be our support for research efforts.

* Small farmers are always at risk because policy and interest is focused on big agriculture. I have no issue with big ag as long as small farmers receive equitable treatment and our food supply is not put at risk
* Small farms are essential for food security. Small farms will maintain diversified food products to keep the variety of our food more plentiful and creating a network of independent farmers makes for a safer environment. Factory farms if they fail, it fails completely. Look at recent failures in our meat supply chain.

* Immigration is critical to our economy and the growth of this nation
* The H2A visa is what we have and it seems to work well, but the burden on small farms is disproportionately heavy. Large farms are able to process Visas, manage compliance and provide for housing, transportation, HR and other costs. However, small farms where the owner is the key source of labor the addition of all these other costs and responsibilities is crushing. The H-2A visa process is not necessarily quick and significant advanced planning is required. As the program develops it will likely incur more, not less oversight which further burdens small farms. As an example the cost of building housing for a H-2A visa worker is estimated at $15,000 per person. For a small farm wanting 20 employees this means an immediate outlay of $300,000 along with the troubles of permitting, construction, maintenance, utilities and all the other costs and effort needed to maintain the housing. There is no thinking in place to assist small farms with these additional costs, skills needed and resource constraints.

* Food insecurity is real; with the US looking to import an increasing amount of our produce the risk grows
* It was reported at the 80th Cherry Institute summit that half of our produce will be imported in the very near future. This is the opposite of food security. Farmers must be profitable and still be competitive with foreign grown crops. This excludes seasonal crops imported during off growing seasons. Small farms lack the margins and the flexibility to withstand stagnant or declining prices. They also are not able to manage crop loss. Insurance pays for part, but it does not keep the farmer whole. The US must take seriously the need to create an environment where our basic food needs are met with sufficient diversity in crops and risk mitigation in the supply chain.

* Costs and supply chain are not understood well and require a further review
* Packing house costs are about equal to all other costs of production combined. Farmers have no control over packing houses. The packing houses pay the farmers at some time in the future and the farmers get what they get. So when we look at ways to make farming more efficient it is important to look at all the factors that feed into cost. Currently the factor getting most, if not all, the attention is field labor costs. There are legions of lawyers, accountants and politicians looking for ways to suppress wages, but I have yet to run across anyone reviewing a packing house invoice. I absolutely do not have anything against packing houses, my concern is that if we truly want to help farmers we need to explore all aspects to find answers.

The answer to our needs is seldom a simple and straightforward answer. What drives public opinion is often emotional and narrow, such as Rep Dan Newhouse blaming food insecurity on China owning 90,000 acres or Biden coming after our water. With clear messaging and solutions in focus we can make things better. Do not believe what you hear, believe what you know. *If anyone is interested I have the speaker decks from the recent WAFLA in Wenatchee conference and the 80th Cherry Institute Summit in Yakima. Much success, Doug

clean_body: Update from WAFLA and Cherry Institute Conferences Central Washington feeds this nation and our high value crops bring in money from foreign | | Can't see this message? | | | | | without farmers therewould be no civilization | | | | Update from WAFLA and Cherry Institute Conferences Central Washington feeds this nation and our high value crops bring in money from foreign markets and help strengthen alliances with other nations. Mike Hullet, CEO of Farm Fresh Direct said at the 80th Cherry Institute’s Summit that if a farmer addresses congress they listen. We have a representative in congress that claims to be a farmer and nobody listens to him! Under our past president and our current representative in Central Washington, challenges facing the farmers of CD4 and this nation have increased and yet the republicans in congress talking points are few: Consumer costs, Immigration and Food Security. And these are discussed in the most narrow of context and most emotionally divisive manner. Foreign Policy/ Markets Water Climate Change Small farms (farmers) Immigration Food insecurity Costs and supply chain Farmers carry the entire cost and risk of their endeavor without knowing if they will be successful or not. How many businesses take such a leap? At the 80th Cherry Institute Summit in Yakima a speaker announced that in the short term the US will import 50% of its produce! What I believe to be true: Foreign policy and markets damaged under Trump and COVID demand more attention by this administration to reestablish and expand our markets. Under the Trump administration, and with the support of CD4 Representative Dan Newhouse, the US pulled away from its allies and markets. The result has been devastating for our higher end produce which benefited from a strong Asia market. Even though we have the superior product, other countries were quick to fill the gap. Water in Central Washington is currently sufficient, but water projects to ensure water security will not get the funding required with Rep. Dan Newhouse in office. Water will always be contentious, however upgrading and finalizing water projects will go a long way to creating efficiencies through conservation, more effective allocation and management thus repairing damage done by overuse of water while expanding our AG industry. Our irrigation systems have sections that are 100 years old and a chain is only as strong as its weakest link. The Columbia Basin Water Project has been slow walked and is still not complete after over a half century. Completion of this project would provide water for 300,000 additional acreage for farming, replenish the Odessa Aquifer, provide clean drinking water, reverse deep well drilling, and through water savings, damage done to lands can be repaired. Climate change is real, but with a Rep Dan Newhouse we will continue to fight to get funding and support for new crop research and to maintain our growing sustainable energy industry CD4 Representative Dan Newhouse has continuously fought to roll back advances in sustainable energy for reliance on fossil fuels. He has written legislation such as the American Energy Independence bill to undermine our sustainable energy industry and lobbied with other states to advance their energy programs over ours. Newhouse has voted and will continue to vote against funding for programs and services for farms and citizens. Washington State University along with other universities and farm organizations continue to be our support for research efforts. Small farmers are always at risk because policy and interest is focused on big agriculture. I have no issue with big ag as long as small farmers receive equitable treatment and our food supply is not put at risk Small farms are essential for food security. Small farms will maintain diversified food products to keep the variety of our food more plentiful and creating a network of independent farmers makes for a safer environment. Factory farms if they fail, it fails completely. Look at recent failures in our meat supply chain. Immigration is critical to our economy and the growth of this nation The H2A visa is what we have and it seems to work well, but the burden on small farms is disproportionately heavy. Large farms are able to process Visas, manage compliance and provide for housing, transportation, HR and other costs. However, small farms where the owner is the key source of labor the addition of all these other costs and responsibilities is crushing. The H-2A visa process is not necessarily quick and significant advanced planning is required. As the program develops it will likely incur more, not less oversight which further burdens small farms. As an example the cost of building housing for a H-2A visa worker is estimated at $15,000 per person. For a small farm wanting 20 employees this means an immediate outlay of $300,000 along with the troubles of permitting, construction, maintenance, utilities and all the other costs and effort needed to maintain the housing. There is no thinking in place to assist small farms with these additional costs, skills needed and resource constraints. Food insecurity is real; with the US looking to import an increasing amount of our produce the risk grows It was reported at the 80th Cherry Institute summit that half of our produce will be imported in the very near future. This is the opposite of food security. Farmers must be profitable and still be competitive with foreign grown crops. This excludes seasonal crops imported during off growing seasons. Small farms lack the margins and the flexibility to withstand stagnant or declining prices. They also are not able to manage crop loss. Insurance pays for part, but it does not keep the farmer whole. The US must take seriously the need to create an environment where our basic food needs are met with sufficient diversity in crops and risk mitigation in the supply chain. Costs and supply chain are not understood well and require a further review Packing house costs are about equal to all other costs of production combined. Farmers have no control over packing houses. The packing houses pay the farmers at some time in the future and the farmers get what they get. So when we look at ways to make farming more efficient it is important to look at all the factors that feed into cost. Currently the factor getting most, if not all, the attention is field labor costs. There are legions of lawyers, accountants and politicians looking for ways to suppress wages, but I have yet to run across anyone reviewing a packing house invoice. I absolutely do not have anything against packing houses, my concern is that if we truly want to help farmers we need to explore all aspects to find answers. The answer to our needs is seldom a simple and straightforward answer. What drives public opinion is often emotional and narrow, such as Rep Dan Newhouse blaming food insecurity on China owning 90,000 acres or Biden coming after our water. With clear messaging and solutions in focus we can make things better. Do not believe what you hear, believe what you know. If anyone is interested I have the speaker decks from the recent WAFLA in Wenatchee conference and the 80th Cherry Institute Summit in Yakima. Much success, Doug | | Apologies upfront for this being English only. Post election I am looking for Spanish language support and it is a big ask to have someone translate this much text. If you know of anyone that will help please let me know.
