President Biden and Senate Democrats are making history -- confirming a RECORD number of judges in the last two years even with a razor-thin majority!

But after 4 years of Trump and Mitch McConnell stacking the courts with _hundreds_ of ultra-conservative, often unqualified judges -- including THREE right-wing Supreme Court justices -- restoring balance to our judicial system has **never** been more important.

President Biden is taking the lead by nominating the most diverse slate of new federal judges EVER, but we need to know if top Democrats like YOU support his efforts.**Our urgent Live Poll is closing soon, and we still need 33 more responses from Pennsylvania! So please -- answer before midnight:**

---

[**2nd:**](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=0900228ca0&e=f653f65525) Geroge Santos defrauded voters in New York to win in a [_Blue Democratic district_](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=72c32631d7&e=f653f65525), giving Republicans the majority.

[**3rd:**](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=40d31350e8&e=f653f65525) Kevin McCarthy wanted to be Speaker so bad, he made [_secret deals with Extremists_](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=e191c8fcf7&e=f653f65525) like Lauren Boebert, Geroge Santos, Matt Gaetz, Jim Jordan, Paul Gosar, and Marjorie Taylor Greene.

name: Team Sherrod
subject: What the Dignity of Work is all about:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
You can see it in everything Sherrod does in the Senate. |
---

| | | | Sherrod puts working people first -- _**always**_. That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about. Thanks to Sherrod’s leadership, the previous Congress took historic steps to make our economy work for everyone and not just corporations and Wall Street: **CUTTING CHILD POVERTY BY HALF**
Sherrod helped pass the American Rescue Plan to help working people and small businesses through the pandemic. It included Sherrod’s measure to save over 1 million people’s pensions as well as the biggest tax cut for middle-class families ever, which cut child poverty by nearly half. **AMERICAN-MADE INFRASTRUCTURE**
Sherrod made sure the bipartisan infrastructure deal included the strongest-ever Buy America rules, so it not only creates jobs building our bridges, broadband, and public transit; it also ensures taxpayer dollars go toward American-made products, including iron and steel.
---
| | **[SEND SHERROD BACK TO THE SENATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562706/388407627/783650534?refcode=sbe230118&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTg1YTdhYy1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6uV73pzHc3zgPjyg6wORGPZkD18ZhxfSCSSC3InUfvY=)**
---
**BURYING THE TERM “RUST BELT”**
With the CHIPS Act, Sherrod helped address supply chain issues and high prices by making historic investments in domestic semiconductor manufacturing. These measures will create thousands of Ohio jobs that can’t be shipped overseas. **LOWERING COSTS FOR AMERICANS**
Sherrod voted for the Inflation Reduction Act to lower prescription drug costs for people on Medicare, create jobs in domestic energy production and manufacturing, and make sure Wall Street pays a bit more of its fair share -- all without raising taxes on everyday Americans. No matter what kind of work you do, it has dignity and Sherrod will fight for you. [_**Now, we need to fight for Sherrod. He’s on the ballot next year in one of the most competitive races in the country. Will you chip in to strengthen our campaign for the road to Election Day?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57562707/388407628/783650534?refcode=sbe230118&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTg1YTdhYy1mZDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6uV73pzHc3zgPjyg6wORGPZkD18ZhxfSCSSC3InUfvY=)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

**Team -- if you want to understand how the outcome of _Merrill v. Milligan_ impacts voting rights and how our efforts will help shape voter protections for communities of color for the next decade, you just need to check out these two outcomes.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57572502/388457797/-1673140014?refcode=20230120_AOTL_F_ALupdategraphic_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxOWRjZDFmLTI5OTktZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UIScvBk1WSK4NkvrDOVHuU6qGuiDQv80ibEa_CIAQ0U=)
---
**This decision could effectively remove significant protections against racial vote dilution and will rollback the VRA's voting protections for communities of color across the country.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57572503/388457798/-1673140014?refcode=20230120_AOTL_F_ALupdategraphic_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxOWRjZDFmLTI5OTktZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UIScvBk1WSK4NkvrDOVHuU6qGuiDQv80ibEa_CIAQ0U=)
---
**This decision could prevent Alabama from conducting future elections under its new congressional map and call for a congressional redistricting plan that includes two districts in which Black Alabamians have the opportunity to elect their candidates of choice.**
**[If you believe Option 2 is the best and only choice, you’re not alone. clean_body: | Team -- if you want to understand how the outcome of Merrill v. Milligan impacts voting rights and how our efforts will help shape voter protections for communities of color for the next decade, you just need to check out these two outcomes. = This decision could effectively remove significant protections against racial vote dilution and will rollback the VRA's voting protections for communities of color across the country. = This decision could prevent Alabama from conducting future elections under its new congressional map and call for a congressional redistricting plan that includes two districts in which Black Alabamians have the opportunity to elect their candidates of choice. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: A Message from Team Gottheimer [via Team Malinowski]
subject: "The Real Power in the New Congress Isn't where Matt Gaetz thinks It is"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Team – did you see this?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=]Today, the real power in Congress lies with those who fight for bipartisan solutions – like Josh. Josh’s record of common sense governing makes his Problem Solvers Caucus crucial to ensuring work actually gets done in Congress this year.
Josh is fighting in Congress to drive real change for Jersey families and communities. He has fought hard for bipartisan solutions that prioritize the families of NJ-05.
Politico’s latest profile [https://www.politico.com/news/magazine/2023/01/13/josh-gottheimer-congress-power-player-00074987] on Josh showcases the power of meaningful Josh’s bipartisan action on big legislation – something he has been cementing into his work for New Jersey, and America, for the past four terms. Because, when it comes to bipartisan, commonsense progress, Josh is at the forefront.
In November 2021, Josh’s firm cross-aisle negotiations brought in votes from 13 of his GOP allies and helped pass the long-awaited infrastructure bill. Josh’s continuous work proves smart, bipartisan solutions matters.
Having served as one of former President Bill Clinton’s youngest speechwriters, Josh learned the importance of working together to get things done from an early age – principles which have successfully guided him during his time in Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=] 2023 may have gotten off to a slow, chaotic start, but as Josh knows, political differences should not deter Congress from getting important work done for the country. Josh has devoted his career to uplifting Jersey Values, and will not let partisan politics deter him from delivering for families.
However, with the 2024 election looming in the difference, we need to ensure Josh has the support needed to continue fighting for the people of NJ-05. Will you chip in $ to help Josh continue to spread his message of bipartisanship? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=]If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Donate $20 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=20&express_lane=true]
Donate $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=50&express_lane=true]

Donate $250 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=250&express_lane=true]
Another Amount » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=15]
With your help, Josh can continue fighting for bipartisan solutions and protecting Jersey values in 2023, and beyond. So, let’s work together to defend and expand all the bipartisan progress Josh has worked so hard to make in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=]
Thank you for all your support,
Team Gottheimer
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-footer-2020?amount=$25&refcode=footer2020] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. name: John Fetterman
subject: Moderna's got some explaining to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is the exact type of immoral price gouging I ran for the Senate to stop.
#
Derek,
U.S. taxpayers contributed one BILLION dollars to develop the covid vaccine -- **but now, Moderna is threatening to price gouge all of us to make a quick buck.**
Yep, that’s right: Moderna plans on increasing the price of the life-saving vaccine by literally 400%.
This is the *exact* type of immoral price gouging I ran for the Senate to stop, and we’ve got to take action.
**[Will you add your name to call on the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) to use their authority and stop Moderna’s price gouging scheme?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-price-gouging-petition-email/?t=1&akid=8219%2E434096%2EcC3JhC)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-price-gouging-petition-email/?t=2&akid=8219%2E434096%2EcC3JhC)**
While everyday Americans face a possible recession, big corporations in every sector have been price gouging everyday folks to make big $$$ for their shareholders, and this vaccine price hike is no exception. **Moderna has some explaining to do.** 🤨
The Biden administration, members of Congress, and advocates across the country have spoken out against this scheme — and now, HHS should use its power to put a stop to it.
**[Sign on here to tell HHS to prevent Moderna from jacking up the price of the life-saving covid vaccine.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-price-gouging-petition-email/?t=3&akid=8219%2E434096%2EcC3JhC)**
Thank you!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230120-8219-footer&t=4&refcode2=8219_434096_cC3JhC&akid=8219%2E434096%2EcC3JhC)**

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ****_**Jim Banks announces his campaign for U.S. Senate another INGOP Civil War kicks off**_ This week, Congressman Jim Banks announced his campaign for the U.S. Senate, and after a few days of campaigning, it is obvious that Banks is an extreme partisan who’ll do or say anything to gain more power in Washington. Just a few weeks ago, Jim Banks [failed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564277/388412461/-1647942001?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) in his bid to become the Majority Whip for the U.S. House so now he sees the U.S. Senate as a new prize for more political power. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564278/388412462/800763856?s=20&t=SyMb_uZXOEKOhPLv28QLYw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)****[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564279/388412463/800763856?s=20&t=SyMb_uZXOEKOhPLv28QLYw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)** Now, it's been reported that Mitch Daniels might put his hat in the ring against Banks, setting up what will likely be a bloody and expensive primary for the INGOP. **Fact is: Jim Banks and Mitch Daniels represent exactly what Hoosiers despise about politics: someone who will say or do anything to gain political power.** Under Mitch Daniels and Jim Banks’ watch, Hoosiers have an [F-rated quality-of-life](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564280/388412464/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) and the state has a [D- rated workforce](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564281/388412465/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), a [C- rated education system](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564282/388412466/-82093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), the [third worst maternal mortality rate in the nation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564283/388412467/-678275945?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), and the [nation’s most polluted waterways](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564284/388412468/-1129088982?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). All while ignoring the warning signs from [Indiana’s top business leaders](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564285/388412469/-1975940939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) and their [taxpayer-funded reports](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564286/388412470/-1244620132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), instead choosing to put their extreme agenda above Hoosier families and workers.
**It’s past time to fix the INGOP’s mess. It begins by electing Democrats up-and-down the ballot in 2023 and 2024 to give Indiana some common sense leadership.** **** This week, the [INGOP’s biggest extremist](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564287/388412471/1761919688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) is in the headlines again after possibly breaking the law when when he went on a media tirade by discussing a “statutorily confidential investigation.” **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564288/388412472/1761919688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)****[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564289/388412473/1761919688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)** Todd Rokita cares more about being the most extreme member of the INGOP than actually doing his job. Rokita continues to use false information & taxpayer dollars to target a doctor who legally helped a 10-year-old rape survivor get an abortion. He is too extreme for Indiana. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564290/388412474/282687656?s=20&t=SyMb_uZXOEKOhPLv28QLYw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)****[Share State Representative Blake Johnson](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564291/388412475/282687656?s=20&t=SyMb_uZXOEKOhPLv28QLYw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)** State Representative Blake Johnson filed bills this week that focus on traffic calming actions, protecting poll workers, and boosting civic engagement. Additionally, Rep. Johnson has started a podcast titled “[Session Sessions](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564292/388412476/698497602?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)” where he interviews fellow state legislators to keep the public up to date on the 2023 General Assembly session.You can find out more about Rep. **Opportunities with INDems**
### **Regional Organizing Directors**
The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. **For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at[https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57564318/388412502/1076440731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMwYzA4ZC0wNDk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X--1r_4czgdP4ayizvw7_8-8dbTaJqvhO8MF71CrQJA=&emci=5d58822c-fc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3230c08d-0499-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**
### **Executive Director**
The Indiana Democratic Party (IDP) is seeking an Executive Director (ED) to lead our team. In partnership with the Chair and State Central Committee, the ED is responsible for deploying the strategy, overall management, and growth of IDP. The ED will be involved in all aspects of the Party’s operations, including but not limited to: election activities, voter protection, fundraising, budgeting, staff recruitment and retention, outreach, and building party infrastructure. General Duties:
* Responsible for overall operational efficiency of IDP, including staff and creation and execution of Party strategy.
* Recruits, interviews, hires, and manages IDP and coordinated campaign staff.
* Manages day-to-day work of Communications, Data & Organizing, Operations, and Finance teams.
* Oversees the day-to-day work of outside consultants and vendors.
* Serves as one of the spokespeople for IDP to the media.
* Other responsibilities as required.

Party Affairs
* Coordinates work and materials for the Democratic State Central Committee, District leaders, County leaders, and precinct committeemen and women.
* Keeps up strong relationships with various constituencies and stakeholders around the state, including organized labor, African-American leaders, Latino leaders, LGBTQ Hoosiers, women’s groups, Indiana Young Democrats, and College Democrats.
* Maintains close working relationships with various party partner organizations including, but not limited to: DNC, ASDC, DCCC, DSCC, DGA, and DLCC.
* Builds and nurtures relationships with Democratic candidates, elected officials, Democratic caucuses, and staff members across the state.
* Supports the building, growth, and success of county parties throughout the state.
* Oversees an annual party retreat, annual fundraising dinner, biennial state conventions, and the National Delegate Selection process for the 2024 Democratic convention.

**C** ampaign & Election Activities
* Shares regular organizing, training, coaching, and other resources online and in-person for Party staff, volunteers, and party leadership.
* Works with IDP and Indiana Election Division to ensure the Party is up-to-date on the current and latest rules relating to elections and voting in Indiana.
* Troubleshoots any issues with campaigns or county parties on behalf of IDP to ensure the Party is represented well and that issues are resolved in a timely fashion.
* Oversees voter protection in-state and in partnership with DNC guidance.
* Oversees GOTV and Election Day efforts and events for IDP.

Fundraising
* Works with the State Chair to raise money for the party through call time, meetings, events, memberships, online giving, and other income generating streams.
* Partners with the finance team to create a robust apparatus for fundraising and cultivating large and small donors.
* Represents IDP at party, media, or community functions across the state.

Operations & Compliance
* Manages office and ensures campaigns and committees have productive workspaces.
* Keeps an updated and working knowledge of campaign finance, election, and compliance laws and works in concert with the compliance team and legal counsel to ensure all Party activities are consistently compliant.
* Works with the State Chair and Party CPA and Treasurer to implement the budget.

**Q** ualifications: Minimum of at least four (4) years with direct campaign experience. Executive experience working on a coordinated campaign, statewide or Congressional political campaign, or with a state political party preferred.
* Experience managing a growing, diverse, and highly skilled team, with demonstrated ability to achieve high levels of performance and outcomes through guidance and management.
* A reputation for leading with integrity and making decisions with the input of the appropriate stakeholders.
* Experience building, managing, and tracking large budgets.
* Excellent verbal, written, and analytical skills.
* Ability to manage several tasks and projects at the same time.
* Ability to prioritize and multi-task in a fast-paced environment.
* Detail oriented and good follow through on tasks.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to interact professionally with staff and external stakeholders and represent the organization with professionalism.
* Ability to maintain a high level of confidentiality.

Salary: Salary is generally competitive and commensurate with experience. Position includes full medical, dental, and vision insurance benefits, a 401(k) account, and monthly tech stipend. Application Instructions: Please email your resume and three professional references to [jobs@indems.org](mailto:jobs@indems.org) with “Executive Director” in the subject line. Thank you for your interest in working with IDP.

| | |

Friend, you probably hadn't heard, but American Bridge helped secure a MAJOR victory recently and we have a lot to be proud of:
We went toe-to-toe with the GOP during the special election in Virginia's 7th state Senate District and **helped Aaron Rouse, a pro-choice Democrat,__ win by _less than 1%._**
**To be clear, this win ENDED any chance of Youngkin's abortion ban passing the VA senate this year.**
With wins in key battleground states like Pennsylvania, New Hampshire and Arizona, Democrats have defied history and expanded their majority in the U.S. Senate.
_**But we didn't stop there. We're committing to fighting these fights in races big and small, and that's exactly what we did in Virginia. **_
This is the work we do at American Bridge: We hold Republicans accountable by _DEFEATING_ them! And that means taking the fight to them at every level of government.

But our work is impossible without supporters like you. As more and more Republicans put their self-interests before the well-being of Americans by stripping them of fundamental rights like reproductive freedom, **our work at American Bridge is becoming more critical than ever. **
That's why we're asking for your continued support today.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Bombshell: restaurant workers forced to fund their own exploitation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1011&akid=3897%2E5885482%2EuQ3RQP ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1012&akid=3897%2E5885482%2EuQ3RQP ]TAKE ACTION: CALL YOUR REPS!

Hi Peter Willis,

Congressman Ro Khanna here with breaking news and an important action you
can take right now — because corporate lobbying to crush workers has
reached a sickening new low.

The NY Times exposed how the National Restaurant Association (AKA the
‘other NRA’) forces tipped workers to chip in $15 for a required class
then deploys their own money to lobby to keep their wages low!

They are literally forcing restaurant workers to fund their own
exploitation, and we're fighting back with everything we have.

That’s why I signed the Pledge to Reject NRA-Pac Money — and why we need
my colleagues in Congress to do the same!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1013&akid=3897%2E5885482%2EuQ3RQP ]Our Revolution is teaming up with One Fair Wage to take on the NRA and
Raise the Wage. You can help by calling your representatives to sign a
pledge to reject NRA-PAC money?

It’s because of the Other NRA’s massive lobbying that restaurant workers
earn far below a living wage — the federal tipped minimum wage has been
$2.13 an hour for over 30 years!

As these workers are mandated to pay $15 for a class ostensibly about
"food safety,” that money is going right to the NRA — effectively making
workers fund their own economic exploitation.

We all need to fight for economic justice, and that’s why I’m proud to
stand with Our Revolution and grassroots activists to empower workers
nationwide. It will take action on the inside and on the outside to
outflank the lobbyists.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8246?t=1014&akid=3897%2E5885482%2EuQ3RQP ]I hope you’ll take action today to stand with restaurant workers and
call on your representatives to sign a pledge to reject NRA-PAC money!

Our work with Our Revolution and workers in 2022 successfully helped pass
sectoral bargaining for fast food workers with AB 257 in my state of
California, and we increased NLRB funding by $25M to take on union
busters. This is a start.

Now, I’m excited to see Our Revolution partnering with One Fair Wage to
pass higher wages in TEN states in 2023 — and work to get higher wages on
the ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in 2024!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1015&akid=3897%2E5885482%2EuQ3RQP ]There’s a lot of exciting work ahead and you can help kick it all off
by calling your Reps today!

When we organize, we win.

Congressman Ro Khanna

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_FR_3MU_20230120_1_1.sdiKmJ&t=1008&akid=3897%2E5885482%2EuQ3RQP ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_FR_3MU_20230120_1_1.drBZ3G&t=1009&akid=3897%2E5885482%2EuQ3RQP ]GIVE MONTHLY

name: Jordan - An America United
subject: He's not just talk...
body:
He keeps his promises...| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=6ec9643724a947c78961700c205bf72d&_e=joGUfw1fi3sfdLFMrMInHgBPxQHd7ou_UaE5lygiEFkvIMmZlhiU0LhwQLdmHgsOhbVspPnu-qTXJp0ZRvwuInG7PURVYdgHt3ELiiLmPmLUzMtumgt3WT21CJHNSqvnHWC1_Z3NB8rKY-Xg9a4uQAR0US0GkFrDW6R0-VtSCk6ho1n5KlBdSH4DvQn-ZseZQ2wcStJHvB_xhmiWvcF36Iu-ZYqNqye9qdiuowyyqci6IdpYDEtL49WsyksYnUhIKrTCW2QT5c2zebH6gqEsRg%3D%3D)
---
Hi there... Despite dire warnings from Governor Larry Hogan, the toxic wedge that has divided our country continues to bury itself deeper into the soul of American politics. In Maryland, Governor Hogan proved that there's a better, more unifying path to get things done and move forward. He promised to never stoop as low as to belittle political adversaries or those who disagreed with him. [**Check out our latest video highlighting the Governor's farewell speech and the need to end the growing division.⇩** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=6ec9643724a947c78961700c205bf72d&_e=joGUfw1fi3sfdLFMrMInHgBPxQHd7ou_UaE5lygiEFkvIMmZlhiU0LhwQLdmHgsOhbVspPnu-qTXJp0ZRvwuInG7PURVYdgHt3ELiiLmPmLv6US-7T9JhnRTrvoJP-l27pfewqm0fNPtwZZxvJ-uqy3sZ8NXxm1A_dlmTh6dTqEssSYd_7o-Jt8DFgyEp71G8ZVx7JOAyZqgdXqtz66jZQSEl_zQd4Tufm_MZd0M2SdK0RCRDl2HOAynL_4GEaMgU7LcIV-V2X4T9DZ_VrQTPQ%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=6ec9643724a947c78961700c205bf72d&_e=joGUfw1fi3sfdLFMrMInHgBPxQHd7ou_UaE5lygiEFkvIMmZlhiU0LhwQLdmHgsOhbVspPnu-qTXJp0ZRvwuInG7PURVYdgHt3ELiiLmPmKG1XBAi6j4cJoiKuUmMqdu1voWPgjyBJj73c2oAUyemFdGqew3CHUqNWXPQ0roU3kTsRcc7TCBzfjJr41jec0eXYbCnj4bGMNTQoPYFirKMgrGsWIQfagFUJgpdSwoQ38Rgp7QwE-lN_R--xWyfY3LDI_6vJQlJLbTA323DB5IfQ%3D%3D)
---
Governor Hogan believes that the successful, unifying work done in Maryland can be achieved in our nation if elected officials choose optimism over negativity, faith over fear, and America over their own special interests. As he says [in his farewell speech](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=6ec9643724a947c78961700c205bf72d&_e=joGUfw1fi3sfdLFMrMInHgBPxQHd7ou_UaE5lygiEFkvIMmZlhiU0LhwQLdmHgsOhbVspPnu-qTXJp0ZRvwuInG7PURVYdgHt3ELiiLmPmIKBwdwih-8BslL2Wgz5NekdlbNRLIl1zNDWxJZUtNfvxnDv8XcEgwlnrFmJDeKdVDpa8CddYjdF0V7guhAApc90nVv1pYIuPv2U058VEmahfutazf-t_ziJILs6ObRVh4Mf9STm3_8KZU0dJpF1DRCORon7YFMbYl-iQCoAr3mgw%3D%3D), _"Deep down, there truly is more that unites us than divides us." _ **Take a moment to[watch the video](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=6ec9643724a947c78961700c205bf72d&_e=joGUfw1fi3sfdLFMrMInHgBPxQHd7ou_UaE5lygiEFkvIMmZlhiU0LhwQLdmHgsOhbVspPnu-qTXJp0ZRvwuInG7PURVYdgHt3ELiiLmPmKB045F8vn50rK_wHDZqCUwIqqh4cVqHCgCgqIhQQAJwVg0Jd5QYs-YTEyXkQhwPcy-UWYxMG2X_ZQFX2vggUb_xypVrtBfuVF-EXM-D21-k60CtBpVNPBBN0tpebqFTDHDXdkMxhD4E95ebeEdZmzIA2mZ94l1pZwP89D4jPgN2g%3D%3D) and join us with a [$10+ contribution](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=6ec9643724a947c78961700c205bf72d&_e=joGUfw1fi3sfdLFMrMInHgBPxQHd7ou_UaE5lygiEFkvIMmZlhiU0LhwQLdmHgsOhbVspPnu-qTXJp0ZRvwuInG7PURVYdgHt3ELiiLmPmKlgPi-sSfjO2jrI7bLNwfw4npdE7Jxn6oj94YiPigFVQrL4gQrSISnl8B_OHhZHqSLVQbJpYQCjg5K1c4zzXn8iF-KkDnthG7WYISGuz5Bnvclx0GDoucL-pQrL0D2D1Gn7Omx3_HBj-r9Iwi-o-R_zJ1mfLsi1-NE-tTnLXqaXg%3D%3D) today to help jumpstart the next steps in our mission to bridge the partisan divide, hold our leaders accountable, and push for common sense solutions.** _👉 This is just the beginning 👈
_ Thank you, **Jordan R.**_An America United_
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=6ec9643724a947c78961700c205bf72d&_e=joGUfw1fi3sfdLFMrMInHgBPxQHd7ou_UaE5lygiEFkvIMmZlhiU0LhwQLdmHgsOhbVspPnu-qTXJp0ZRvwuInG7PURVYdgHt3ELiiLmPmLtLgfnu_ee0LzWBIqHNN5DDN_7NQOby_cevfe8-Ri4PKffMomqKgyQBDe8PEUMN6EJpPWFZyqENDaMDa2wRxQLQ2zxKu2LiHVgUgHXgQ_zcz_oY9GpSRsnlxYoYdhOqataRjs3Ep48ndc0UZhsbE4d_yJ6ffIPetjdeveQAZTZAQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: He keeps his promises...| | | Hi there... Despite dire warnings from Governor Larry Hogan, the toxic wedge that has divided our country continues to bury itself deeper into the soul of American politics. In Maryland, Governor Hogan proved that there's a better, more unifying path to get things done and move forward. He promised to never stoop as low as to belittle political adversaries or those who disagreed with him. | | Governor Hogan believes that the successful, unifying work done in Maryland can be achieved in our nation if elected officials choose optimism over negativity, faith over fear, and America over their own special interests. As he says , "Deep down, there truly is more that unites us than divides us." Take a moment to and join us with a today to help jumpstart the next steps in our mission to bridge the partisan divide, hold our leaders accountable, and push for common sense solutions. 👉 This is just the beginning 👈 Thank you, Jordan R.An America United | | | | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | |

subject: It’s time to get to work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
Are you with me? | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=62d2f8d000&e=fdefed58de)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
As a dedicated conservative, I’ve always remained committed to putting the best interests of the American people first.
And that’s why I’m leading the fight to hold bureaucrats accountable and demand moderates and Democrats do too.
We’ve made our demands clear and have already accomplished so much because of your support...but now we need to ramp up our efforts.
**So I’m taking on the IRS, calling for lower taxes for all Americans, and fighting to preserve innocent life.**
I’m working as hard as I can, **[but I need your help to make sure Congress hears our message and gets these things done.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=91293c6e3b&e=fdefed58de)** | | | | [DEMAND ACTION](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=558a318224&e=fdefed58de)
---
**The IRS is a bloated bureaucracy that wastes billions of dollars every year while stifling economic growth and violating the privacy of American citizens.**

We need to put an end to this and give hard working Americans the freedom to keep more of their own money.

At the same time, we must also work to protect the lives of the unborn. Every human life is precious and should be protected under law.

**We cannot stand idly by while Democrats make it easier to take innocent lives.**

That's why I am asking for your support. With your donation, we can fight to defund the IRS, lower our income taxes, and defend the rights of the unborn with our new Republican Majority.

**[So please, help me put pressure on GOP moderates and Democrats to demand they put Americans first and tackle the real issues.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b85e59b99c&e=fdefed58de)**

Thank you for your support,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=32b1f01a44&e=fdefed58de)

subject: House Republicans are coming for Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAhEqs6AkSYBRHgC_6K6_YCUqj3giBNeHY2B5N1buRupj-BBfxZZoMp5tKeSfyU3bSQ4KwH8gW57_pFDWaGpaAMdsiKOF5D_ZV6XhJv4obYVJPojYMqToigdrluFX5A-5Jue2zzNncieEicZzVmaFqk059UrKr2rtaHhGurCF2NmGfSc3nTJw0WTKBLKeczpSB7dtj0scSKzF-DHHMQXzGJgg_3OVJJrPq3cr8_DdOklomUPqxnH_g-p-NKEeyTZ14l6aufhy4VhytDFPpVxoK3voHFrDyNOkmkJWPBWpFm5VJzDGq_VMl9lvlMBnKSk7Zq2E3bvKjQPmsgE3W-UTa7ng-4Kse1AJiG9GoqIhOmXcAR8V10C-yROkrFZxB4RLy1kyWTpsVKLrJufRPs0hqnMRu6wGTDl5V32ktHSdnQ58/3t0/f00XhWR5Sm2kUknR-aPsxA/h0/fCXArNKNo6xCZLpG_Wh-e-C7doQAol7Yh6T7D7EEm34)
---
Peter – Millions of Americans across the country rely on the Social Security and Medicare benefits that they’ve worked hard throughout their lives to earn. These programs ensure that some of the most vulnerable members of our community receive support and healthcare. It shouldn’t be controversial. But there are extreme Republicans who disagree. Some have pushed to sunsetting these programs. And others insist on raising the retirement age because, in their words, _people “actually want to work longer.”_ **That’s pretty ridiculous,****Peter.** Make no mistake: Raising the retirement age would be the first step in a longer attack on crucial programs like Social Security and Medicare. So, when over a quarter of people in IL-17 are over age 60, one of the best ways I can represent our district is to fight for the protections they earned. That’s why my Democratic House colleagues and I will continue to push hard against any and all attacks on these critical pieces of our social safety net. **[I won’t be asking you to donate today, but I want to know you’re with me on this issue. So will you sign our petition below to show your support for maintaining the current retirement age and protecting Social Security?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmE-UZF0v-hLGyyNHgsAHFoh6qULutnfcH2Lyr3p6ZsRjWLt-8kGR2mR49tU8WwykNSiA4En4cXqEOeeSbzFUXu3h0R0A4YEc93b9tLzqMQZHt1cpxKS9or096goAWp2tf3vY_1h0qZZBZS5dQkNkBFBoNwdWmjPcVyEByMZHUEZl3LCJZQT4V732IYmhI9c6OdBz1Ghbqme23j7IO7bdqEfGcMQtobYmbsFbSk740Sf7qcAAMtrOUlH2p_PyFc9faVykZbviQWcFvk6y-K_CRLCV1JvvNffDUFAPvopMtyH7IfosdZx7UtazvetuNqXfKY2Ieu7txdzH4LMsTMJHdQ/3t0/f00XhWR5Sm2kUknR-aPsxA/h1/1LGJP4Y8xCjA35H5Wk9z053zMTsEhhVVPr7bQiZL01I)**
---
[ **Sign the Petition** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmE-UZF0v-hLGyyNHgsAHFoh6qULutnfcH2Lyr3p6ZsRjWLt-8kGR2mR49tU8WwykNK84oqjhOED4UD1KLkCo7JF2RPLQ410BbhI_eAmRaHDc9N4ChdI5ETuJWZQ-R1b--gHVuW4wn-5yTH37S4wb7yJdqKxDdA_qRv62smp4AAO0b_1Nq8gP2fiihJBl3p5hNQ94sDgsuUdZJ6YQRoasLztjaB0tORBndOjgbdzKUF8MJiXvQZ4ERkLx-yqJ0syGY3mPs8dd1Rda0CVVy452OysJIynUuC1NXtWSpNUVxlZjYt1HWWplTGQ6EwhvUxcf2PlY87cBdIF0SWy9Lr3mZj/3t0/f00XhWR5Sm2kUknR-aPsxA/h2/HbnWCDVsTHgKswnaG2b4S_bGUpMkviWPbbD7f49fG3w)

subject: What matters most to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
Answer now >>

| [ ](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=7090ff32d4da4e51b64faee90ad5368c&_e=cmUWK3_OEE1ze0sIwqk3aXM6TIwrHnxgNX3EmHk0NOTxP3x_qfeNQiN9Tf54SfrR37_YZj-cqOjM6VJyXG9khtjSbEjIpqqHQFvUxsjFPT7L8CXTgZmh7ATPC2QBTHU4FgbQ6L3NzlncwogH36hURKbI9Qoy4TFLnNBl4xbRmZANzYjEOFI0uk3S0YDrn46loCgtRegpUuN_PXpqB1mEdvenhOp809eQAM5_CFPWCCeFFAXjo8KNEp1oixHJau-Yrk4knvenC6SilYRGCRCSWfDUSdV_hb4OnNbIAx3hLtPRfgijHlncioRuXXNrS37M-U_TbkbIOF8Cq_n49kMzIP4GWVMbXuUku1iywF4GotLItEe0QhOiN2E1xfUUELStmUFvhO5bngJeL9mD1OVHftJ_H01KqOORJ0na_pJUL6UlAIK4-mtjTst6Lp3IzsnUHs9FN7i_swTzx6m5TJAFvmn_xKHUoyrkNwY1BqOXbmKrGCX1wS4C6qCI9vATnTSQ)

Hello patriot,

Throughout my time in Congress, I have had the privilege of meeting many Hoosiers who have voiced their concerns about our country’s future. During my Senate campaign, I look forward to meeting many more Hoosiers to learn what issues matter most to them.

So to start off, I want to hear directly from you, friend. [**_Which issues matter most to you in the upcoming election?_**](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=7090ff32d4da4e51b64faee90ad5368c&_e=cmUWK3_OEE1ze0sIwqk3aXM6TIwrHnxgNX3EmHk0NOTxP3x_qfeNQiN9Tf54SfrR37_YZj-cqOjM6VJyXG9khtjSbEjIpqqHQFvUxsjFPT7L8CXTgZmh7ATPC2QBTHU4FgbQ6L3NzlncwogH36hURKbI9Qoy4TFLnNBl4xbRmZANzYjEOFI0uk3S0YDrn46loCgtRegpUuN_PXpqB1mEdvenhOp809eQAM5_CFPWCCeFFAXjo8KNEp1oixHJau-Yrk4knvenC6SilYRGCRCSWfDUSdV_hb4OnNbIAx3hLtPRfgijHlncioRuXXNrS37M-U_TbkbIOF8Cq_n49kMzIP4GWVMbXuUku1iywF4GotKE2iqKWTydQiW3yQ26D8C7A4tfwHqZm9kK40iOAWP2X_ffPOnkwUjpfEAsuJzMzr7v9tcmGEfYOlVZjvSDaMROsG9TxHF2Oui939fudZFFbxNCGJp_2HiS_CeRPmnZloSfQw1NFOnNjo8MbYQsw8lh)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Honest, midwest leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230120 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230120]
Team,
Life never completely slows down when you’re in Congress, which means I’ve had a busy first few weeks of the new year.
I’ve been back home in Michigan this week, and wanted to take you behind the scenes:
Last weekend, I had the chance to attend MLK events in Lansing, Grand Rapids, and Detroit. It felt great to be back to traditional MLK events after COVID – it’s a day that’s meant to be celebrated together.
Then, it was on to Eaton County where I was able to chat with some of my new constituents and meet with local leaders. The next day I was in Shiawassee County for more meetings with leaders in Durand and Owosso. Finally, I was able to celebrate the $2.5 million approval to build a new grandstand for the fairgrounds in Mason. This project is something I’ve been hearing about for years, and I’m excited it’s one step closer to being a reality.
When I was campaigning last year, I joked that it was like running for mayor in 30 small towns at once. Now that I’m officially the representative of Michigan’s 7th district, that really hasn’t changed.
Even though I was on the ground constantly last year, it was impossible for me to meet everyone. Which is why I’m always continuing to build important relationships with local leaders, and meet as many constituents as possible. I believe that good leaders don’t just talk the talk: they walk the walk by showing up and listening to the things that are impacting people in their communities.
Congress needs more leaders who are willing to show up and do the work. If you agree, and want to support my brand of honest Midwestern leadership, chip in below. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230120] [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230113]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230120]
Elissa

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district.

There’s no telling what basic freedoms Republicans will be coming after next, but what we do know is

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57566306/388418754/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230120-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWRkY2JmNC0wYTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rt-hq_qCJuJj-x9laF22QsEHNoonKg-bC41SIcGfz0o=)

| Peter,

In the first two weeks of the Republican-majority House of Representatives, we’ve gotten a chilling glimpse into what the next two years will look like:

**First** , they passed legislation that undoes IRS funding established by the previous Congress, making it easier for the ultra-wealthy and billionaire corporations to cheat their way out of their fair share of taxes.

**Then** , they passed an absurd bill designed to target abortion providers in yet another attack on reproductive freedom.

**There’s no telling what basic freedoms Republicans will be coming after next, but what we do know is that we have to be prepared to take back control of the House in 2024 – and that means building a strong foundation starting right now.** [_**Will you chip in $10 right away to make sure we can stand up to whatever harmful legislation Republicans introduce next?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57566307/388418755/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230120-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWRkY2JmNC0wYTk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rt-hq_qCJuJj-x9laF22QsEHNoonKg-bC41SIcGfz0o=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Louis DeJoy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| After DeJoy decommissioned mail sorting machines, removed absentee ballot drop boxes, and impeded voting by mail in 2020, I don’t trust him.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1599%2E5257348%2EPgUrZ0)
There’s nothing as rewarding as delivering good policy that serves the American people, Derek. Nothing.
But when we can make a Trump appointee and GOP megadonor eat his words in the process, I’ll admit it, that does make it just a _little_ bit sweeter.
**I’m proud to say that thanks to the $3 billion we provided to the U.S. Postal Service in the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , there will be 66,000 electric mail trucks hitting the streets across the country.**
Reversing course from Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy’s pledge for a 90 percent gas-powered fleet.
But this goes beyond fossil fuels vs. electric vehicles.
It’s about whether DeJoy, the former finance chair of the Republican National Committee — who was investigated by the FBI for a campaign finance scheme — can impartially lead the Postal Service in the midst of a presidential election in which the man who appointed him is running against the current president.
After DeJoy decommissioned mail sorting machines, removed absentee ballot drop boxes, and impeded voting by mail in 2020, I don’t trust him. I don’t think the American people should either.
**[Derek, add your name to my petition calling on the USPS Board of Governors to remove Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy. The board should permit President Biden to select a replacement that will work with the administration to improve the Postal Service for the American people.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230120-dejoy-petition-vsp.izEr2L&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230120_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1599%2E5257348%2EPgUrZ0)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230120-dejoy-petition-vsp.izEr2L&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230120_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1599%2E5257348%2EPgUrZ0)
---
It’s simple. Louis DeJoy has to go. Thanks for raising your voice with me today.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1599%2E5257348%2EPgUrZ0) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1599%2E5257348%2EPgUrZ0)**

name: Jenn McClellan
subject: I’ll be blunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Election Day is less than 5 weeks away, and we can’t sprint through the finish line without your help.
| Friend, let me introduce myself:

**My name is Jennifer McClellan and I’m running to represent Virginia’s Fourth District in a special election that is just 1 month away.** [**Virginians deserve a results-driven leader in Congress, and I’m ready to continue this fight in Washington. I’ll explain more in a moment but first, can I count on you to chip in $10 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38756?t=6&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jennifer McClellan and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38757?t=7&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38758?t=8&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38759?t=9&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38760?t=10&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38761?t=11&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 17 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

**But my work doesn’t stop here — because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.**

My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district — but, our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive.
[**We need to raise $3,726 to hit today’s fundraising target, and I’d be really grateful if you could split a $10 donation between our special election campaign and Voter Protection Project. We’re counting on grassroots support to get us across the finish line, and that starts with you. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38756?t=12&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jennifer McClellan and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38757?t=13&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38758?t=14&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38759?t=15&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38760?t=16&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38761?t=17&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
Let’s do this together,

Jennifer McClellan
Democratic Nominee for Virginia’s 4th district
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=18&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6090%2E878179%2Eoze9Td)

subject: CNN’s hypocrisy is on display… again.

body:
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1abd66ce76ee4236a602e779b70360c2&_e=XzzMgApxJMKaA8mtSq4R-RW2aDUbuMzgumdap7LAdQ2YBTEnTGd6ZqN9o7SYuh_yCg_Pu9uOR6FMOSZ1gzdXGyFonmwPMLqYD9W_d5dw3bM-0V4xUge-YK0BMz0ekC2_-RUAmKKaBO35JPY7hKdtCwLLjYsVXdhQmtVhioWu-OC5IQDHp5fu4Q5OQOrXgX8QPUaEaoS1DE5b76MiBquq9AdP0ZG-VRywEkYL-Rh71uXhLbOw1fb6SIUOARyvuryGAP9ozCf8HcIYdlNLWYe2iL_odaiXLPADeEMTWNtljZ-yQzazCwAXH2eFj0mEUYcG4LAGzqtLBA-A8tZ3BUKgwpSzqYkKTUYrsuyAY1QAVKiKedNqsO97ZvQBvNa9RfN6)

| | Friend, CNN "journalists" masquerade themselves as truth-seekers working to "protect our democracy," but they've proven _yet again_ that they're hypocrites. _Just look at the_ _[**_stark difference_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1abd66ce76ee4236a602e779b70360c2&_e=XzzMgApxJMKaA8mtSq4R-RW2aDUbuMzgumdap7LAdQ2YBTEnTGd6ZqN9o7SYuh_yCg_Pu9uOR6FMOSZ1gzdXGyFonmwPMLqYD9W_d5dw3bM-0V4xUge-YK0BMz0ekC2_-RUAmKKaBO35JPY7hKdtCwLLjYsVXdhQmtVhioWu-OC5IQDHp5fu4Q5OQOrXgX8QPUaEaoS1DE5b76MiBquq9HGhS8ZfZh_k2faaiQUBNBgjPMt805eEUzXZc9p7sv_KWL2CUtVUb-4FDwhOSLDxnwX1-WQdN214NH4nieSKj0wRFiNpKgQeate7dxWUFhejCwqokt3S4jfM8XNJYugS6Ht5NeTXKYhYz5jTRSRCo_VloYO-C6OPU7yobkQUAigk)_ ___between how they frame classified documents found at Penn Biden Center vs. Mar-a-Lago ..._

---
Friend, the American people are tired of the mainstream media's hypocrisy and attempts to cover for the Democratic Party.** ** **If they were TRULY interested in informing the American public, they would have released this information BEFORE the midterm elections.** **_[I AGREE >>](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1abd66ce76ee4236a602e779b70360c2&_e=XzzMgApxJMKaA8mtSq4R-RW2aDUbuMzgumdap7LAdQ2YBTEnTGd6ZqN9o7SYuh_yCg_Pu9uOR6FMOSZ1gzdXGyFonmwPMLqYD9W_d5dw3bM-0V4xUge-YK0BMz0ekC2_-RUAmKKaBO35JPY7hKdtCwLLjYsVXdhQmtVhioWu-OC5IQDHp5fu4Q5OQOrXgX8QPUaEaoS1DE5b76MiBquq9GcVb12VQ08yJCdx4r60yjV20Ku-TWB3kiKSnOyKoYfehvgyGAw774QggcPayUai8Q6ksq_BpG-1x4DP07bMULU5N7BN9MnzvMcjAe-Coy02shgq-f8ixySlvq4saRz-hijj_I8yMtV2WyHuinNABYh7OqqgilyjHTZVtO4nTvqI)_ ** It's time to hold outlets like CNN accountable for cherry-picking the facts to fit their agenda and packaging it as "news." _[**_Chip in now to Stand with Rand and hold the mainstream media accountable. >>_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1abd66ce76ee4236a602e779b70360c2&_e=XzzMgApxJMKaA8mtSq4R-RW2aDUbuMzgumdap7LAdQ2YBTEnTGd6ZqN9o7SYuh_yCg_Pu9uOR6FMOSZ1gzdXGyFonmwPMLqYD9W_d5dw3bM-0V4xUge-YK0BMz0ekC2_-RUAmKKaBO35JPY7hKdtCwLLjYsVXdhQmtVhioWu-OC5IQDHp5fu4Q5OQOrXgX8QPUaEaoS1DE5b76MiBquq9DxQNRpZfaUVo7TZQ5N44n9fC9oeU4chjDTmmSRxUG_cjDtitln8wiIVXY-SaI2IzW2UkPRa9uBHKZRyPp1HvKp8WHz9MXcUOx1xw2mmQBVi944tITbfKdyO_kCSxXlRTZDII9V1Dd61A3isuP4N_Z4kteima511wrD2-BmTxYbC)_

name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: First Major Event!
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=isSZoXjcQQve0iI&b=UokrJz_0u.AukjEEBMubwg)
---

> [](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=isSZoXjcQQve0iI&b=NKNkUXA2nXMk4NkRLkJFPA)
> Fellow Conservative,
>
> We are just days away from my first major campaign fundraiser!
>
> This will be a very special event,**held at the fabulous Country Club of Ocala** , and headlined by none other than former Congressman Ted Yoho.
>
> **_WHEN_ :****January 24th, 6:30PM**
> ** _WHERE_ :****The Country Club of Ocala**
> **6823 SE 12th Cir, Ocala, FL 34480**
> ** _RSVP_ :**** Let us know you're coming by **[**clicking here**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=isSZoXjcQQve0iI&b=lERINK1lTW0TWRD9DQXZ6w "https://for.fl.voteryanchamberlin.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=27878192&N=168890&L=98064&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jbGlja3MuYXdlYmVyLmNvbS95L2N0Lz9sPUsyT01WJm09aG01bFk0aVhvUXZlMGlJJmI9MDJZeURldXB4RzR5eXNWS1Rfd3NlQSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamM0TnpneE9USSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249NjM0MDYmdXRtX3Rlcm09")
>
> Ted Yoho exemplifies true, conservative leadership. This man is the antithesis of all things Establishment, which is why I’m so proud to have him headlining the event.
>
> Like Ted, I’m running not to join the Swamp but to DRAIN it! We’ve made strides in Florida, but we still have a ways to go and**I’m the right man for the job.**
>
> I hope you’ll come to this special event, and find out why! I look forward to meeting you soon.
>
> [**Event Details**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=isSZoXjcQQve0iI&b=lERINK1lTW0TWRD9DQXZ6w "https://for.fl.voteryanchamberlin.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=27878192&N=168890&L=98064&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jbGlja3MuYXdlYmVyLmNvbS95L2N0Lz9sPUsyT01WJm09aG01bFk0aVhvUXZlMGlJJmI9MDJZeURldXB4RzR5eXNWS1Rfd3NlQSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamM0TnpneE9USSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249NjM0MDYmdXRtX3Rlcm09")
>
> Sincerely,
>
> Ryan
>
>
>
> **P.S.** The max contribution for any individual or company is $1,000 per entity. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20DNC=20Coalitions=20Team?=
subject: 2 Years in Office
body:
Today marks the two year anniversary of the Biden-Harris Administration. | | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends,
Two years ago today, the 46th White House Administration was sworn into office, led by President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris. Also on this day, Chair Jaime Harrison became the 55th Chair of the Democratic National Committee. Over the past two years, the Biden-Harris Administration has continued to put our communities first, through the passage of the American Rescue Plan, CHIPS Act, PACT Act, Respect for Marriage Act, Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, Inflation Reduction Act, Safer Communities Act, and more. The Biden-Harris Administration has not done this alone. They have done it alongside people of every identity, community and creed. Equity remains at the forefront of every action, and has been paramount in helping the Administration secure its accomplishments. Below you will find just a few of the highlights from this administration’s relentless work for the American people over the past two years. Thank you all for helping us get here, and let’s continue our work over the next two years!
Best,
The DNC Coalitions Team
---
|
---
| [ ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=32e8b52fbc&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
President Biden and Vice President Harris Reflect on the First Two Years of their Administration
|
---
| **In the first two years, the Biden-Harris Administration and Democrats delivered results with an economic agenda that is on the side of workers, here’s a sample: **
* **Record Job Growth: **Strongest two years for job growth on record, unemployment matching 50-year low, annual inflation has come down for the past six months in a row, and a record number of Americans have health insurance.
* **Lowering Costs for Families: **Inflation Reduction Law to lower prescription drug costs, lower health care premiums and energy costs, take historic climate action, and force wealthy corporations to pay their fair share – all while reducing the deficit.
* **Fixing Our Nation’s Infrastructure: **Bipartisan Infrastructure Law is rebuilding roads and bridges, providing clean drinking water, and expanding access to high-speed internet.
* **Making More in America: **More companies are reinvesting in American manufacturing – creating 750,000 good-paying jobs, with an historic $300 billion in investments in new factories.
* Improving Health Care for Veterans: Passed the PACT Act to strengthen benefits for veterans and their families exposed to toxic burn pits.
* **Reducing Gun Violence: **Passed the first significant gun safety law in nearly 30 years.
* **Providing Historic Student Loan Relief: **Providing student debt relief to those who need it most.
* **Appointing Historic Court Nominees:** Appointed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman on the Supreme Court, along with a record number of diverse federal judges in his first two years.
* **Rebuilding the Global Coalition:** Restored our standing on the world stage, and led our allies to support Ukraine and democracy worldwide, making the world a safer and steadier place.

---
| | | _Copyright © 2023 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=8214439ceb) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=8214439ceb).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kari Lake’s dishonest tantrum after losing the race for governorship of Arizona to Katie Hobbs is yet more proof—like we needed it—that Lake is unfit to hold office. Let’s not have her in the Senate?
body:
Kari Lake shouldn’t be a Senator
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ad6180e-250a-460b-8984-0f582c9c169c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _Kari Lake can’t be allowed to be a U.S. Senator. She isn’t morally fit for a position in government, proven again after the tantrum she threw over her gubernatorial loss to Katie Hobbs in Arizona. Election officials have had to go into hiding because of Lake's lies about election fraud--they've received enough credible death threats that they have police protection. _ [**_Can you join us right now in giving Congressman Ruben Gallego--who's been one of the Democrats' strongest voices in the House and would make an amazing Senator!!--$5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0031fc62-b9c7-45b7-9b70-cc48d109dce1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Yet, the result of Kyrsten Sinema's ego driven betrayal of Democrats who worked, donated and voted for her may lead to this tragedy. Democratic firm Blueprint Polling released numbers showing a three-way race with Sinema as a spoiler._ **_Lake leads Democrat, Ruben Gallego, 35.7-31.9%, with Sinema at 13.8%. Sinema can't win, but she can hand the election to a fascist trying to overthrow AZ democracy._** **_We CAN'T let this happen._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T316b4eb5-6e3a-4a59-b59f-7d90eea28265/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Gallego's a young, progressive Latino veteran. He's personable, passionate about helping working people & protecting those GOP policies assault every day. Gallego's so close to matching Lake--within 3.8 points! And nearly 19% of voters are undecided, many of whom Gallego can win._** [**_Can you join us right now in giving Congressman Ruben Gallego--who's been one of the Democrats' strongest voices in the House and would make an amazing Senator!!--$5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0fa24437-4a11-4cf3-813d-ae387a64689b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for supporting a true champion of the people in Gallego. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T103aa180-6b1f-4ee6-b2d3-c7d990fe194b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
