name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Breaking: Judge Rules for DeVore, Against Pritzker on Gun Ban
body:
Effingham County Judge rules against Pritzker in his unconstitutional gun grab bill, as well as other highlights of this tumultuous week.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/bc0318c09e44/breaking-judge-rules-for-devore-against-pritzker-on-gun-ban?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Breaking: Judge Rules in Favor of Former AG Candidate Tom DeVore and over 860 Plaintiffs, Halts Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-judge-rules-in-favor-of-former-ag-candidate-tom-devore-and-over-860-plaintiffs-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Tuesday, Illinois Review broke exclusive news (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-former-il-ag-candidate-tom-devore-files-lawsuit-against-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-seeks-immediate-restraining-order.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that former Republican Attorney General candidate Thomas DeVore had filed suit against Gov. JB Pritzker, State Senate President Don Harmon, D, House Speaker Christopher Welch, D, and Attorney General Kwame Raoul, D, to stop their recent Assault Weapons Ban. DeVore’s motion for a temporary restraining order was heard on Wednesday during a two-hour hearing (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-effingham-county-judge-hears-arguments-during-emergency-assault-weapons-ban-hearing-will-rule-by-friday.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) before Judge Joshua Morrison in Effingham County.

This afternoon, Judge Morrison granted DeVore’s motion and has halted Pritzker’s Assault Weapons Ban effective immediately while the lawsuit proceeds.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-judge-rules-in-favor-of-former-ag-candidate-tom-devore-and-over-860-plaintiffs-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Pritzker signed the Assault Weapons Ban into ** law (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences-for-breaking-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
just last week. After the ceremony, Pritzker spoke to the press, where he had a stern ** warning (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/pritzker-signs-assault-weapons-ban-warns-conservatives-there-will-be-consequences-for-breaking-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
for conservatives across the state: there will be consequences for not following the law.

After more than 80 sheriffs across Illinois signaled that they would not enforce the ban, Pritzker followed up with another stern
** warning (https://wgntv.com/news/illinois/pritzker-threatens-to-fire-police-for-not-enforcing-illinois-gun-ban/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
: “[the sheriff’s] will in fact do their job or they won’t be in their job.”

DeVore’s suit is brought on behalf of more than 860 plaintiffs throughout Illinois and is based on alleged violations of the Illinois Constitution. One alleged violation is of the Equal Protection Clause, because the Assault Weapons Ban provides exemptions for certain groups – for instance, active and retired law enforcement are exempted from the ban, as well as active military and private security guards.

Retired military, however, much like the general population, are not exempted from the ban. DeVore argues that these exemptions create unconstitutional classes of citizens where legislators have decided who is subject to the ban and who is not.

By ruling in favor of DeVore’s motion for temporary restraining order, Judge Morrison has signaled that DeVore is likely to prevail on his lawsuit. The case will proceed towards a final judgment on the merits.

But in the meantime, the ban does not apply against the more than 860 plaintiffs as a result of the judge’s ruling today.

DeVore’s Complaint for Declaratory Judgement can be accessed
** here (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KLcWfHKjqFtNnCv61Yd-a91rjSIys8Cf/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

A copy of Temporary Restraining Order can be accessed ** here (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1MvVjOOuD-kcN4flDyv8evltvfM0cDU3a/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

** Richard Uihlein Backs Harmeet Dhillon for RNC Chair, Says GOP Needs New Leader to Fight "Radical Left" (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/richard-uihlein-backs-harmeet-dhillon-for-rnc-chair-says-gop-needs-new-leader-to-fight-radical-left.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Conservative megadonor and billionaire Richard Uihlein, is weighing in on the race for the next chair of the Republican National Committee (RNC), and it’s not Ronna Romney McDaniel who’s earned his support.

His choice to lead the national Republican party? Respected First Amendment and election law attorney
** Harmeet Dhillon (https://fedsoc.org/contributors/harmeet-dhillon?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
. ** Click to read more (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/richard-uihlein-backs-harmeet-dhillon-for-rnc-chair-says-gop-needs-new-leader-to-fight-radical-left.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/richard-uihlein-backs-harmeet-dhillon-for-rnc-chair-says-gop-needs-new-leader-to-fight-radical-left.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://youtu.be/uLMKkNvJnd4?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Publisher Scott Kaspar and Editor Mark Vargas discuss whether Mayor Lori Lightfoot broke the law, on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas," AM 560 The Answer (Jan. 15, 2022).

** Chicago GOP Couldn't Find Mayor Candidate, Looking to Support a Democrat Instead, During "Nonpartisan" Election (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-couldnt-find-mayor-candidate-looking-to-support-a-democrat-instead-during-nonpartisan-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In a January 6, 2023 opinion piece published in the Chicago Tribune, Stephen Boulton, chair of the Chicago Republican Party wrote,

“The Chicago Republican Party did not have the extensive financial resources required to fund a Republican candidate for mayor...”

But in an email sent by Boulton to Chicago GOP Committeemen on January 5, 2023, the day before his piece was published in the Chicago Tribune titled, “Meeting and Endorsements,” Boulton discusses mayoral race endorsements, writing,

“The Mayor’s race is a major issue, and it’s time for discussion of an endorsement by Chicago GOP...We will have a group discussion on the race, to see if an Endorsement Meeting is justified, meaning whether there is a reasonable prospect of an endorsement to make such an expenditure worthwhile, or if the Committee is just too split on candidates.”
** Click to read more (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-couldnt-find-mayor-candidate-looking-to-support-a-democrat-instead-during-nonpartisan-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/chicago-gop-couldnt-find-mayor-candidate-looking-to-support-a-democrat-instead-during-nonpartisan-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Source: National Committeeman Richard Porter Seeking to Amend IL GOP Bylaws to Permit Third Term (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/source-national-committeeman-richard-porter-seeking-to-amend-il-gop-bylaws-to-permit-third-term.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The IL GOP State Central Committee – the governing board of the Illinois Republican Party – comprises 17 committeemen, one from each of the congressional districts in Illinois, plus a National Committeeman and a National Committeewoman to serve as members on the Republican National Committee.

Richard Porter and Demetra DeMonte are serving in their second terms as the National Committeemen, and under the IL GOP Bylaws, they are termed out in 2024.

But as calls for embattled IL GOP Chair Don Tracy to step down grow louder in the face of an imminent US Postal Service audit, sources confirm to Illinois Review that Porter is quietly whipping the vote among SCC members to amend the Bylaws to provide DeMonte and him with third terms.
** Click to read more (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/source-national-committeeman-richard-porter-seeking-to-amend-il-gop-bylaws-to-permit-third-term.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/source-national-committeeman-richard-porter-seeking-to-amend-il-gop-bylaws-to-permit-third-term.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** (https://youtu.be/5TzevV2yLQs?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Publisher Scott Kaspar and Editor Mark Vargas discuss recent nationwide polling by Matt Podgorski on a potential Donald Trump - Ron DeSantis primary matchup, on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas," AM 560 The Answer (Jan. 15, 2022).

To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7cb200af1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_20_07_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7cb200af1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

body:
We have to make sure that the voices and values of Latinos are reflected at every level of government

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57569085/388426392/992437179?refcode=Dr.YadiraCaraveo&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVjODkzOS0xODk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LDU6PkBERSOxECxVxQMF623NokKw67KLoEMWsIxuTaU=)
Hi team,

I want to tell you about Latino Victory — an organization dedicated to building political power in the Latino community. They work to make sure that the voices and values of Latinos are reflected at every level of government, and in the policies that drive our country forward.

Latino Victory was a key supporter of our campaign, and their work is more important than ever.

**[Will you join Latino Victory and support their work by adding your name today? Their grassroots-powered movement depends on buy-in from folks all across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57569086/388426393/992437179?refcode=Dr.YadiraCaraveo&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVjODkzOS0xODk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LDU6PkBERSOxECxVxQMF623NokKw67KLoEMWsIxuTaU=)**
****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57569087/388426394/992437179?refcode=Dr.YadiraCaraveo&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVjODkzOS0xODk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LDU6PkBERSOxECxVxQMF623NokKw67KLoEMWsIxuTaU=)****
---
In the past midterm elections, Latino Victory worked hard to empower Latino voters, increase Latino turnout, and develop the bench of Latino candidates who support progressive policies — all with the goal of making Latino voters a deciding factor in political elections up and down the ballot.

As part of their work, they supported more than _80_ candidates across _17_ key states — **including me**.

I’m here to tell you that the work they do to increase Latino political involvement and representation is key. It would not be possible without an engaged and passionate movement, so I’m asking if you can join the team as they work harder than ever to continue that work in 2023 and beyond.

**[Having a strong movement begins with you. Support Latino Victory’s work and donate to boost the power of the Latino community today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57569088/388426395/992437179?refcode=Dr.YadiraCaraveo&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVjODkzOS0xODk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LDU6PkBERSOxECxVxQMF623NokKw67KLoEMWsIxuTaU=)**
********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57569089/388426396/992437179?refcode=Dr.YadiraCaraveo&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVjODkzOS0xODk5LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LDU6PkBERSOxECxVxQMF623NokKw67KLoEMWsIxuTaU=)********
---
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you pitching in, signing on, and working hard in key states, we are growing Latino political power. I hope you’ll join Latino Victory’s groundbreaking movement!

Thank you,

Yadira Caraveo

**Friend -- Together this grassroots team _made history_ in the 2022 midterm elections, expanding our _razor-thin_ Senate majority!** Now we need you to continue to stand with Joe and Jill Biden and activate your January Democratic membership.

That’s why we set a goal to activate 100 DSCC memberships from Pennsylvania by MIDNIGHT, to show that this team will never stop fighting for our Democratic Senate. **But we're on pace to fall just short!**

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

63% of ALL voters support banning members of Congress from trading stocks.
Do you?

Corporate Democrats killed our chance to pass a ban on congressional stock
trading last year, even though they held the majority. Our take is simple:
it’s time to ban members of Congress from unfairly profiting from their
roles through trading stocks.

Our representatives were not elected to use insider knowledge for their
own financial gain. Here at Justice Democrats, we believe in an actual
democracy: where leaders serve their constituents, not their own wallets.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125566?refcode=em20230120-27153&t=1001&akid=27153%2E1203867%2E6D62b- ]We need Democrats who will stand up to the political establishment and
push the needle forward on critical issues just like this ban. Your
donation will power our work as we organize to recruit and elect new
Justice Democrats — will you chip in $3 now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125566?refcode=em20230120-27153&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27153%2E1203867%2E6D62b- ]Contribute

A ban on congressional stock trading is a fair, straightforward,
common-sense reform. It should be easy for Democratic leaders to give it
their stamp of approval — because it’s overwhelmingly popular.

But instead, corporate Democrats proved once again that they care more
about personal interest than representing everyday Americans who make up
the 99%. Case in point: just days ago, Nancy Pelosi sold millions of
dollars in stocks that she never should have been able to trade in the
first place.

Justice Democrats like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Pramila Jayapal were
mobilizing enough votes to pass the ban until the Democratic leadership
killed it. We need more progressives in office to build our bloc and push
crucial policies that will make Congress work for the people again.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125566?refcode=em20230120-27153&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=27153%2E1203867%2E6D62b- ]We’re here to elect Democrats of a different kind — progressives who
we’ll send to Congress to fight for life saving policies, not their own
wallets. Can we count on your $3 donation?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27153%2E1203867%2E6D62b- ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27153%2E1203867%2E6D62b- ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230120-27153-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27153_1203867_6D62b-&akid=27153%2E1203867%2E6D62b-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27153%2E1203867%2E6D62b-

name: Team AOC
subject: Explained: the debt ceiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Republicans take the debt ceiling hostage.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230120-3816-header&t=1&akid=3816%2E2526796%2EnJjvmv)
If you’ve been wondering _“What’s the debt ceiling? Why is it in the news? And what does it have to do with me?”_ — then this email is for you!
**What is the ‘debt ceiling’?**
* The debt ceiling refers to the limit on the national debt, or **the maximum amount of money that the U.S. government is authorized to borrow to pay for federal programs.** These programs include Social Security and Medicare benefits, military salaries, interest on the national debt, tax refunds, and other payments.1

**Why is the debt ceiling in the news?**
* This week, we hit the debt ceiling — meaning the federal government can’t borrow any more money. Right now, our bills are only getting paid because Secretary of the Treasury, Janet Yellen, is taking “extraordinary efforts” with the budget — such as suspending investments in government retirement funds — to pay what we owe. The Treasury will only be able to do this until some point this summer, at which time Congress must lift the debt ceiling or the nation will default on its debts.

**What would happen if the debt ceiling isn’t raised?**
* Defaulting on our debts would hurt our economy: up to 6 million jobs lost, even higher interest rates, an estimated surge in unemployment from 5% to 9%, and the likely triggering of a recession.2

**So, why hasn't Congress raised the debt ceiling already?**
* Several Republicans have made it clear they will not support raising it. Arizona Rep. Andy Biggs recently tweeted, _“We cannot raise the debt ceiling. Democrats have carelessly spent our taxpayer money and devalued our currency. They’ve made their bed, so they must lie in it.”_ 3 **In truth, roughly 12% of our current national debt was added in the first 3 years of the Trump administration.** $1.8 trillion in debt was added from the 2017 Trump tax cuts alone, as corporate taxes were lowered from 35% to 21%.4
* It appears House Republicans are hoping to force Biden and Democrats to approve cuts to Medicare, Social Security, and other vital federal programs, in exchange for lifting the debt ceiling.

Make no mistake: when the GOP takes the debt ceiling hostage, it is not about fiscal responsibility, but an agenda to impose their extremist views. We will keep you updated on how this develops.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
**Did you find this email helpful?**
Alexandria and Team AOC are committed to sending regular explainers about legislative topics that impact your daily life. If you think your friends or family would like to receive these explainers too, please feel free to forward this email along! [They can join our mailing list here.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/join-our-grassroots-campaign/?source=em20230120-3816&t=2&akid=3816%2E2526796%2EnJjvmv)

* * *
1 - [US Treasury](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16199?t=3&akid=3816%2E2526796%2EnJjvmv)

clean_body: It’s been two years. | = Peter, two years ago, the nation witnessed President Biden and Vice President Harris make history on Inauguration Day. It was a day of hope and new beginnings for our country. President Biden has shown us what strong leadership looks like: from signing the Inflation Reduction Act to bring down costs, reduce the deficit, and take aggressive action on climate, restoring American leadership on the world stage, and taking historic action to address the gun violence epidemic, to fighting to protect our fundamental freedoms and democracy. We couldn't be prouder of all the work they’ve done — and we can’t wait to see what the next two years bring. We know our President and Vice President will be touched to hear from the grassroots team that elected them to office. ****** Thanks for your support, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | ** Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Doug Lindner, LCV
subject: Democracy at Risk -- Urge the Senate to Confirm Pro-Democracy Judges
body:
? ? ? ? ? Dear Peter,

Few of us have forgotten where we were when a violent mob of armed insurrectionists, many of them proudly displaying symbols of white supremacist hate, attacked the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

One year later, LCV remembers that day and honors the heroism of Capitol police and others who protected our national seat of elected government from attackers who sought to overturn the presidential election results. We also recommit to one of the day's enduring lessons: that safeguarding our democracy and the right to vote is an urgent priority and must never be taken for granted.

Unfortunately, the anti-democracy attacks didn't stop on January 6 ? opponents of free and fair elections have since adjusted their tactics to focus on state-level policies. At least 19 states have passed laws that restrict the freedom to vote, undermine fair voting districts, and raise the likelihood of future attempts to sabotage fair elections.
?
These attacks on fair elections and voting rights are a national crisis, and they disproportionately seek to suppress and discard votes by people of color and young people who have been historically and systematically excluded from full participation in our democracy.

To ensure that U.S. democracy delivers on its promise to be a government of, by, and for the people ? and to make sure we never experience another January 6th ? our nation has a lot of work to do. This includes passing comprehensive voting rights legislation at the federal level to codify the right to free and fair elections.

As a 50-year old environmental organization with voting and elections at the center of our theory of change, LCV has long understood how essential a free, fair, and equitable democracy is to protecting people and the planet. In the last two decades, LCV and our sister organization, LCV Education Fund, have become leaders among our national peers in democracy and civic engagement, while our 30+ state affiliates have become valued partners in efforts to strengthen voting rights at the state and local levels.

Together, we've helped register 1.5 million voters, won ballot measures on redistricting and automatic voter registration, and worked with election officials to expand voting site access. Our Democracy for All https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMW__ program already comprises one of the largest and most dynamic civic engagement efforts in the nation and the largest, most impactful program within the environmental movement.

Yet given the stakes, we need to do much more. That is why this past year, LCV dramatically expanded our democracy work and will continue to do so in 2022 and beyond.
?
For the first time, LCV has also elevated strengthening democracy to a standalone goal in our four-year strategic plan ? and a priority on par with addressing climate change. Our plan through 2024 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~ will advance pro-democracy reforms, defend against voter suppression, and counter misinformation. We are developing a coordinated 10-year plan with our 30+ state affiliates to pursue this work at all levels by advancing policies that can help close the racial participation gap between communities of color and white voters.

The stakes of this crisis couldn't be higher for our freedom, our future, and the health and safety of our communities. Thank you for being part of this work and for believing that our democracy, like our Earth, is worth protecting.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President, League of Conservation Voters

P.S. Later today, LCV and our partners are participating in candlelight vigils at sites across the country. People of different races, places, party affiliations, and backgrounds will be joining peacefully to say: In the United States, the voters decide the outcome of elections. To find an event near you and sign up to attend, click here. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/gryxfjggL0HK/dG5JdUZXbFFNUFR6a0IzOEJXbXJGemhUeTBFRk1uRCs1eGl4ck1TWHBoYTFydGExREN0VnpTOWdMODlqUXgya0VIN0ttcVA0WFBRMmo4THFvdTFlNjZOcUxaN0YwVHVNdDBOUUFEK0ZSdGM9S0/ These events are occurring later today, so we encourage you to click through now to find your event. ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9113998&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDQ3NTcwNAS2&spReportId=MTY2MDQ3NTcwNAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9113998&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDQ3NTcwNAS2&spReportId=MTY2MDQ3NTcwNAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

Washington, DC 20005
